name: President Jessica Post
subject: We weren’t prepared
body:
The best time to get involved in state legislative races was... | | |
---
| | Do you find yourself constantly saying the same thing over and over at work? For example, I often see lots of jokes playfully poking at the overuse of “let’s circle back” or “per my last email.” Well, for me, my personal tagline at work is **“The best time to get involved in state legislative races was in 2010. The next best time is now.”** My colleagues hear me say it repeatedly, but it’s true. In the 2010 midterms, the GOP deployed an unprecedented mobilization effort around state legislative races. Republicans spent $30 million on the cycle alone and as a result, flipped over _680 seats and 22 chambers_ from blue to red. The good news is that we’ve taken the lessons learned from 2010 and applied them to our winning strategy, and the DLCC has been leading a generational shift in focus and resources on state legislatures. But we’re still feeling the effects of the 2010 losses today – and the fall of _Roe_ is a painful example of that. When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , the conservative justices said they were simply leaving it up to the states. But they knew they were shifting the fight to an uneven playing field: Anti-abortion extremists have already taken over the majority of state legislatures, and have spent the last decade stripping away access and passing restrictive laws ready to be enacted the second that Roe was struck down. This was all a coordinated effort that was made possible by the GOP’s investment in local races. **So, I’m going to say it again: The best time to get involved in state legislative races was in 2010. The next best time is now. ** Winning back state legislatures takes time and effort, and I’m not going to over-promise anything: We can’t undo all the GOP’s damage in one election cycle. But we’ve got a plan to defend Democratic majorities, mount challenges in vulnerable GOP chambers, and put dent after dent after dent in Republicans’ state-level powerbase, election cycle after election cycle. And it starts with more and more commitment from Democrats like you to vote for and amplify the state-level Democrats on your ballot in your area. [Will you please take this moment to pledge to get involved and vote in the 2022 midterms this November – with critical attention to state legislative races down the ballot? Add your name to let the DLCC know that you’re in this fight. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0n-W1SICM5rd3HRUvVFF-DUun46dbudcSx1WddIuwOkhI6V83w15i9NPedIVTIDAYuSkXqMAelYfgJfOGJHO_eMLZ80f3iojhzX7JvqrL-BC3_-rE2gmRX_MRMJqhpUOinCrAmpxRKNLjeauIRPMCwvgV0KH3Tb8V72K3azjdRm-KcAwdSv1Ti2KRk8G-hiog3XuZo_TGzb1r0ZhbQEhe5hO_hm1KVwoAUjhzwWjDBlt6skQbc4_5pApE3OY4rE-wHvKPbou0vnxK6RLLHvasw_o4VyYMfyJQ_TGySeKD_xbJQu0d2CXkWDrh9jUkG7Zz4boj6qUOnHe4ZEV0A7DI6JYBZnHM8mAqcW1E0IXglkVJhQdBpvGxhRQjRLxMnsjQw/3oe/Bd_LT7UHRcWXg-2Xmr7lHg/h0/V4bRVSET4E1QLcWTAW5MuT7QjfG9htJT_iC59yT4UXY) Thank you for being on this team. President, Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZBD3kRTEYjFcAcryIttCCkaOAkYmC9ipYxZPuXPPH_Z-E5B16rhMvvHKE4eYRK03770AuCui59gex0-6OLn8HLV540d2-6tuFROiZY0numu8Hz2Ms8JMYaY4IlVE8qPFeDP5geuVzXlN3xDoSVtDSuRM8888waqvraPeYVir1J59HuDl4wB08h2_r4zyEj_mcdlHvCWASTMusaUTUpotkvwv23gVpGyMnbb5zNQPFBsAwzmRpWci0jgCiHAYNWVX76vWMTN7MjPdQA3rLzLg7fXHSeNDFFbBlaL2YkUorl8CO4VyjVzTyiwzNGowFdZ4CcYlCoHVOI9qQMk4gDgbUS7LjmxpG3PMwcbo3GZDpIc4/3oe/Bd_LT7UHRcWXg-2Xmr7lHg/h1/_VJyyyTfZoViym2EZvQgPLRpdyzwIfiq57rBKO_NvrA) [DONATE »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZBD3kRTEYjFcAcryIttCCkaOAkYmC9ipYxZPuXPPH_Z-E5B16rhMvvHKE4eYRK03770AuCui59gex0-6OLn8HLV540d2-6tuFROiZY0numu8Hz2Ms8JMYaY4IlVE8qPFeDP5geuVzXlN3xDoSVtDSuW-qsfMCmgqn-ZoMJpUuFzkl2tSSzK2tUDcEItkrnrCRt_DSH4c2fvyx0S_09Aq6NVdtC8rfd5p04h4B5uL6n5JFxA-TMkY_75GtHiqTW0-sXUuG5-ptHyWsFgfm7E2JbM4c9c87PorNj2CPqSMWX4BcyZgJQmBC0ayHtkLJj_pZ1MqpfTn9LIFPX-HK9TQcP-DtObprsqYDdEEBEGOhZqA/3oe/Bd_LT7UHRcWXg-2Xmr7lHg/h2/svW0eKFzbVtSroSqzK7bs7UrDgrjxsg5r3RG-b4eXaw)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Leftist Media Attacks in Final Days!
body:
Early voting starts on Monday and absentee ballots are POURING in! With 18 days left until the Primary Election Day, I sincerely need your help more than ever
****
| | | **[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xbe763fKxg7IWSj2SHyYjmPw/kNwVPkRqUPS763ydSUNDvqkA)**
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xbe763fKxg7IWSj2SHyYjmPw/kNwVPkRqUPS763ydSUNDvqkA) Early voting starts on Monday and absentee ballots are POURING in!

I knew this was coming.

**The _Daily Beast_ just published a lengthy hit piece trying to discredit me in every way possible.**

The article's fake headline screamed, "Laura Loomer Attacks Opponent for his Age - in Famously Elderly District."

That, of course, never happened, but you can never expect the truth from the Fake News Media.

Here's the truth, America's seniors need our support more than ever before. With Bidenflation rocking our economy, our senior citizens who largely live on fixed incomes, are struggling.

**The only way to truly fix this mess is to boldly reverse the policies of the Biden Regime, and pave a path to make America Great Again!**

And since Day 1 of my campaign, I have been working hard and campaigning on a platform of ending the tax on Social Security for our Seniors!

The largest coalition in my campaign is my "Boomers for Loomer" coalition, given the fact that I'm running for U.S. Congress in the oldest district in the nation, per capita.

[Please help me get to Congress!](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xbe763fKxg7IWSj2SHyYjmPw/kNwVPkRqUPS763ydSUNDvqkA)

I'm taking a short break from door knocking right now to write this email to you to remind you to **stay focused, hold the line, and ignore all of the Fake News lies about me and my campaign in these last final days before we secure an election victory**.

With 17 days left until the Florida Republican Primary, [I need your help more than ever to win](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xbe763fKxg7IWSj2SHyYjmPw/kNwVPkRqUPS763ydSUNDvqkA).

Please donate as much as you can by Sunday at midnight to help fund next week's ground game. I have large signs to purchase, and the costs are climbing by the minute.

So please, chip in and help me win, and let's [send a message to the Left that no amount of lies will work against the truth](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xbe763fKxg7IWSj2SHyYjmPw/kNwVPkRqUPS763ydSUNDvqkA)!

Thanks again for all that you do!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

BREAKING from PBS News Hour >>
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=3985%2E878179%2ELUI_R-)._
---
_BREAKING FROM PBS NEWS HOUR:_
**About half of Americans think former President Donald Trump should face Criminal Charges** The Jan. 6th Committee has done their job and exposed Donald Trump’s efforts to incite the January 6th insurrection and his blatant refusal to end the riot.

**Now millions of Americans are calling for Trump to be charged for his crimes.** But the DOJ won’t act without a _surge_ of grassroots pressure!

[**45,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT: Sign our petition to urge the DOJ to CHARGE Donald Trump for his treasonous crimes »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/charge-trump/?source=VPP_20220805_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=3985%2E878179%2ELUI_R-) | [**TAKE 10 SECONDS TO SIGN: URGE THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE TO CHARGE DONALD TRUMP** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/charge-trump/?source=VPP_20220805_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=3985%2E878179%2ELUI_R-)
---
The January 6th Committee is working day-and-night to hold Donald Trump accountable for inciting the deadly Capitol Riots.

**_Now, the grassroots movement calling for Trump to be charged for his crimes is gaining some _serious_ momentum._**

But if we don’t act _right now,_ MAGA Republicans will try to stall the entire investigation... **and let Trump walk free...**

That’s why we’re gathering 45,000 Democrats on our petition urging the Department of Justice to bring criminal charges against Donald Trump IMMEDIATELY.

[**We can’t let Donald Trump get away with trying to overthrow our government! Sign our petition ASAP to urge the Department of Justice to charge Donald Trump for his crimes »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/charge-trump/?source=VPP_20220805_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=3985%2E878179%2ELUI_R-)
[**TAKE 10 SECONDS TO SIGN: URGE THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE TO CHARGE DONALD TRUMP** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/charge-trump/?source=VPP_20220805_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=3985%2E878179%2ELUI_R-)
---
Standing up for our democracy,
_\- Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=3985%2E878179%2ELUI_R-). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=3985%2E878179%2ELUI_R-).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=3985%2E878179%2ELUI_R-) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=3985%2E878179%2ELUI_R-). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=5&akid=3985%2E878179%2ELUI_R-)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=6&akid=3985%2E878179%2ELUI_R-)

subject: Criminal First Agenda vs. Pro-Cop Agenda?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAW ENFORCEMENT LOYALTY PAC**
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949466:JgRempVNi:m:1:3317145305:7594A20C579E0B7C8234335EB3D7BA10:r "Tweet") Peter: They attacked a NYC Transit Cop without impunity. Even trying to choke out the cop at one point. And what does New York's Woke DA do? Releases this criminal who ASSAULTED a police officer within 24 hours. **If you want to know why crime is out of control, THIS IS IT!** Until we get conservatives in Congress to undo the Left's Defund policies and finally lock criminals up when they break the law, our cities will keep descending into lawlessness and chaos. **[If you want your streets back, your community back, your country back, then help us elect Pro-Cop conservatives to Congress with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949466:JgRempVNi:m:1:3317145305:7594A20C579E0B7C8234335EB3D7BA10:r "If you want your streets back, your community back, your country
back, then help us elect Pro-Cop conservatives to Congress with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today!")** I was a cop - I know what it means to wear the badge and put my life on the line to keep you safe. I joined this organization because I can no longer sit back as politicians foster their Defund agenda that removes cops from your neighborhood and rewards criminals by erasing bail requirements. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949466:JgRempVNi:m:1:3317145305:7594A20C579E0B7C8234335EB3D7BA10:r "Headline")It's time to stop treating cops as punching bags and start reminding politicians that law enforcement is the last line of defense between you and the people who will cut your throats to steal your car, take your TV off the wall in the middle of the night, grab your child's favorite toy off your front lawn, or steal products from the local store when they think no one is looking. **Because every day that Congress is controlled by Defund Democrats like Pelosi and AOC, crime is only going to get worse.** Police officers are leaving the force in droves. Tired of being demonized by the Left, targeted for assassination, and tired of seeing the criminals they arrest back on the streets quickly. **[If you care about the safety of your community, your family, and yourself, then help us undo this Leftist Defund nightmare with your $50, $100, or $250 donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949466:JgRempVNi:m:1:3317145305:7594A20C579E0B7C8234335EB3D7BA10:r "If you care about the safety of your
community, your family, and yourself, then help us undo this Leftist Defund nightmare with your $50, $100, or $250 donation today.")** Don't for a moment think that just because Biden's approval numbers are dismal that pro-cop conservatives are going to sail through without our help. **It. Just. Doesn 't. Work. That. Way.** You've got to jump in as if it all counts on you - **_because it does._** **> >>** **[If money is tight right now, would you consider donating just $15 right now? Any amount can help us reach voters and make a difference in some of these races!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949467:JgRempVNi:m:1:3317145305:7594A20C579E0B7C8234335EB3D7BA10:r "If money is tight right now, would you consider donating just
$15 right now? Any amount can help us reach voters and make a difference in some of these races!")** **< <<** No effort is too small. After all, the lives of my law enforcement brothers and sisters are at stake here. **[Will you help us end the Defund nightmare and bring safety and prosperity back into our communities before it's too late?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949466:JgRempVNi:m:1:3317145305:7594A20C579E0B7C8234335EB3D7BA10:r "Will you help us end the Defund nightmare and bring safety and
prosperity back into our communities before it’s too late?")** For your safety, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949466:JgRempVNi:m:1:3317145305:7594A20C579E0B7C8234335EB3D7BA10:r "Tony Palmer")
Tony Palmer, SGT (Ret), Virginia Beach Police Dept
Chairman of the Advisory Board
Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC | | [STAND WITH LAW ENFORCEMENT - DONATE TODAY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949466:JgRempVNi:m:1:3317145305:7594A20C579E0B7C8234335EB3D7BA10:r "STAND WITH LAW ENFORCEMENT - DONATE TODAY")

name: Rebecca Kleefisch
subject: No regrets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca
body:
Just 1 week left in this 1-point governor's race.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949431:J6NTCpV9N:m:1:3253819041:165FAD32F6C3FC6410C71353F96B72E9:r)
---
Peter,
---
**NEXT**** WEEK**, the fate of our great state is on the line.
---
And when the results roll in on Election Night, I REFUSE to have a single regret about how we ran this campaign, how we fought, and how we put Wisconsinites FIRST.
---
_But that means no stone can be left unturned and no door left unknocked in this neck-and-neck governor 's race._
---
**To ensure we have the resources to WIN on August 9, I 'm counting on your help now more than ever in this final week. **
---
**[Please make a contribution of any amount to my Election Day Fund with just 1 WEEK to go in this 1-POINT race.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949431:J6NTCpV9N:m:1:3253819041:165FAD32F6C3FC6410C71353F96B72E9:r)**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949431:J6NTCpV9N:m:1:3253819041:165FAD32F6C3FC6410C71353F96B72E9:r)
---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949433:J6NTCpV9N:m:1:3253819041:165FAD32F6C3FC6410C71353F96B72E9:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949434:J6NTCpV9N:m:1:3253819041:165FAD32F6C3FC6410C71353F96B72E9:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949435:J6NTCpV9N:m:1:3253819041:165FAD32F6C3FC6410C71353F96B72E9:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949436:J6NTCpV9N:m:1:3253819041:165FAD32F6C3FC6410C71353F96B72E9:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949431:J6NTCpV9N:m:1:3253819041:165FAD32F6C3FC6410C71353F96B72E9:r)
---

Make no mistake, the August 9 primary is about giving Wisconsin conservatives our best opportunity, and in this case, our _ONLY_ chance to FIRE radical liberal Tony Evers.
---
From failing our children in school to ravaging our state's economy, Evers cannot be allowed to remain in power.
---
**_That 's why national Democrats and left-wing megadonors have built Evers a warchest of more than $20 MILLION to protect his failure of a governorship._**
---
But Evers also knows that a general election matchup against me would be his downfall - and the ONE SCENARIO in which conservatives can overcome his massive fundraising advantage.
---
_Peter, I 'm the only candidate polling within the margin of error of beating Evers in just over 3 months._
---
But fulfilling this scenario where we FLIP Wisconsin red all hinges on achieving victory in just 1 week's time.
---
**With so much at stake and such little time left, every contribution - from $1 to $100 - is a game changer at this point in the election.**
---
**[So please, make a contribution of any amount to my Election Day Fund with just 1 WEEK to go in this 1-POINT race.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949431:J6NTCpV9N:m:1:3253819041:165FAD32F6C3FC6410C71353F96B72E9:r)**
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60949431:J6NTCpV9N:m:1:3253819041:165FAD32F6C3FC6410C71353F96B72E9:r)
---
Rebecca Kleefisch
Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin
Republican Candidate for Governor

body:

| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013zDgb7n_6tXWIjjmaLXwi4DGumfhfdevbdFIhwGtrmvBC7ozHdBPm7hzU4CLAhvlen-1nZ0RzabC1oX3PDfPNvEMEjXJMVc_ENyBOOnIWzIpmO3oH8y4-i6tcywMQckoU5-0hTRCLQbzZeTHk_-yHg==&c=SzAqjy-ejDT7Q6Rg3Hl3l7ahu2jYy_JTfCQXJIExm0RX8a_ydeIKCg==&ch=Lnw0TcqafdYAsT7aut1DLJmskPUY0I_GOIGvMfts06CYARx4pFqAeA==)

|
# Weekly Newsletter
---
| August 7, 2022 | Issue XXVII
---
| |
---
| In case you missed it...
---
---
Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt released a statement on the urgency of a special session to repeal the disastrous bail reform laws that have caused crime to surge in our state. NYC Mayor Adams joined the call for the much needed changes.
---
| [READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013zDgb7n_6tXWIjjmaLXwi4DGumfhfdevbdFIhwGtrmvBC7ozHdBPm8nuj3KkKyCrvFAr20wLHUFWZqDSN6gN3s4MRFphSFp4mp_78GHG4Tg2wIEPpI6g2girriNV5pX0cqlWa_fn54iNPmY2MBcKX9Q7Ny6ZlXfJ2Kv8YSkC2N6TYZkQl_lF1QdKIGDnJw_krOLYbz0Fevzge5X7uHthpDYZxArLLIP3&c=SzAqjy-ejDT7Q6Rg3Hl3l7ahu2jYy_JTfCQXJIExm0RX8a_ydeIKCg==&ch=Lnw0TcqafdYAsT7aut1DLJmskPUY0I_GOIGvMfts06CYARx4pFqAeA==)
---
| NY Senate Republicans Release Comprehensive Report on Record Inflation
---
This week, Senator Ortt and the NYS Senate Republicans released a detailed inflation report on historic, record-high inflation and unveiled a plan to provide taxpayers, families, and businesses much-needed relief.
The comprehensive report shines a light on the true struggles of everyday New Yorkers under surging costs. It highlights where and how much prices have increased, how incomes, wages, and household budgets have been affected, and analyzes overall consumer sentiment. The report also links the failed economic policies of Albany Democrats to additional inflationary pressures.
To address these findings, Senate Republicans also unveiled multiple solutions to combat New York's Inflation and affordability crisis.
---
| [VIEW THE RELEASE & PLAN HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013zDgb7n_6tXWIjjmaLXwi4DGumfhfdevbdFIhwGtrmvBC7ozHdBPm2RxGkfeR8FNSRvC_n4dcF_y8LsMfhpRmu3DeHwDCY_SWWMxQO4MK5P9bQABbV6t4RwmBa-kERO87nPjpHisXl_WFqNkrKCAGIJNEdiCIfH97u0Ad24e0ELL10s6CsGqn7MPfnSxg6-hf0cbdUQb5zQCmQexndEiOhl9X6ZVo7rMjy_tDC1lGjYpzaYVhI3dhA==&c=SzAqjy-ejDT7Q6Rg3Hl3l7ahu2jYy_JTfCQXJIExm0RX8a_ydeIKCg==&ch=Lnw0TcqafdYAsT7aut1DLJmskPUY0I_GOIGvMfts06CYARx4pFqAeA==)
---
---
|
---
| On Wednesday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt was proud to announce his full support for Claudia Tenney for Congress.
We need strong, conservative leaders in Washington who put our country and our communities first.
---
|
---
| Friday was a great afternoon where Leader Rob Ortt and Congresswoman [Claudia Tenney](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013zDgb7n_6tXWIjjmaLXwi4DGumfhfdevbdFIhwGtrmvBC7ozHdBPm2RxGkfeR8FNzrYp_6Jz5y-YF91YUIu7W0Vy0_l8LvoI7wFO2CbSaUt5ZjBCyafQVb-IM0ziixgL9vXUQER7B7shG_b39U0WNiMPyTGMckTO0LEbJ6YoxRxA9YrjEHGW6ZLI_F0taih9qRtIihcSseqqNF0KzumVtI2jGO7Ixn5XPABtGuOs4XEkSZGA9qJ2Q4lz0uNl1yKP6wFZIi1fZhaOmuj_YP1v7zVYZ5PyFlU0WGOvjmB1i0c3HpXznK5YyJgthp3auTN53xM883KHtH1QoqOzvs5rfqdovd4Vvrm9a1CMJ5PCQjiZI4WKZWJUWbq6e45Le07nyGY9QwRvg8g7WaBfpffQQT-hTCUSJ5nEJ8gbEuEJX5G8p8VXXmgTtnDBji3ZCtULe6jw8E3wYHs=&c=SzAqjy-ejDT7Q6Rg3Hl3l7ahu2jYy_JTfCQXJIExm0RX8a_ydeIKCg==&ch=Lnw0TcqafdYAsT7aut1DLJmskPUY0I_GOIGvMfts06CYARx4pFqAeA==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013zDgb7n_6tXWIjjmaLXwi4DGumfhfdevbdFIhwGtrmvBC7ozHdBPm2RxGkfeR8FNzrYp_6Jz5y-YF91YUIu7W0Vy0_l8LvoI7wFO2CbSaUt5ZjBCyafQVb-IM0ziixgL9vXUQER7B7shG_b39U0WNiMPyTGMckTO0LEbJ6YoxRxA9YrjEHGW6ZLI_F0taih9qRtIihcSseqqNF0KzumVtI2jGO7Ixn5XPABtGuOs4XEkSZGA9qJ2Q4lz0uNl1yKP6wFZIi1fZhaOmuj_YP1v7zVYZ5PyFlU0WGOvjmB1i0c3HpXznK5YyJgthp3auTN53xM883KHtH1QoqOzvs5rfqdovd4Vvrm9a1CMJ5PCQjiZI4WKZWJUWbq6e45Le07nyGY9QwRvg8g7WaBfpffQQT-hTCUSJ5nEJ8gbEuEJX5G8p8VXXmgTtnDBji3ZCtULe6jw8E3wYHs=&c=SzAqjy-ejDT7Q6Rg3Hl3l7ahu2jYy_JTfCQXJIExm0RX8a_ydeIKCg==&ch=Lnw0TcqafdYAsT7aut1DLJmskPUY0I_GOIGvMfts06CYARx4pFqAeA==)listened and talked to constituents at the Keenan Center in Lockport.
A main topic was the Susan Muffley Act. For years, many Delhi employees spent their lives working long, hard hours providing for their families -- then they had their futures upended when their retirement benefits were taken away from them.
The passage of the Susan Muffley Act in Congress takes a long overdue step toward righting an egregious wrong done to these good people.
---

|

| This week, Leader Ortt had the pleasure of meeting Jeff Vukelic, President and CEO of [Saratoga Eagle](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013zDgb7n_6tXWIjjmaLXwi4DGumfhfdevbdFIhwGtrmvBC7ozHdBPm2RxGkfeR8FNA2-yHjevsgr5umx5TJqIBgk5lh9rggI75pKKgcA8iNAL4gk0AeEZwfh75BSGDYELEsIIHbz0eL6i6HOZromRow==&c=SzAqjy-ejDT7Q6Rg3Hl3l7ahu2jYy_JTfCQXJIExm0RX8a_ydeIKCg==&ch=Lnw0TcqafdYAsT7aut1DLJmskPUY0I_GOIGvMfts06CYARx4pFqAeA==), a regional Beer, Wine, Spirits, & Non-Alcohol Beverage Wholesaler, who gave him a tour of the facility. First established in 1933, Saratoga Eagle is a true American success story and Rob looks forward to working with Jeff on issues that impact the industry.
---

clean_body: Sunday, August 7th Edition | | | | == | Weekly Newsletter | August 7, 2022 | Issue XXVII | | | In case you missed it... Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt released a statement on the urgency of a special session to repeal the disastrous bail reform laws that have caused crime to surge in our state. NYC Mayor Adams joined the call for the much needed changes. | == | NY Senate Republicans Release Comprehensive Report on Record Inflation This week, Senator Ortt and the NYS Senate Republicans released a detailed inflation report on historic, record-high inflation and unveiled a plan to provide taxpayers, families, and businesses much-needed relief. The comprehensive report shines a light on the true struggles of everyday New Yorkers under surging costs. It highlights where and how much prices have increased, how incomes, wages, and household budgets have been affected, and analyzes overall consumer sentiment. The report also links the failed economic policies of Albany Democrats to additional inflationary pressures. To address these findings, Senate Republicans also unveiled multiple solutions to combat New York's Inflation and affordability crisis. | == | | On Wednesday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt was proud to announce his full support for Claudia Tenney for Congress. We need strong, conservative leaders in Washington who put our country and our communities first. | | Friday was a great afternoon where Leader Rob Ortt and Congresswoman and talked to constituents at the Keenan Center in Lockport. A main topic was the Susan Muffley Act. For years, many Delhi employees spent their lives working long, hard hours providing for their families -- then they had their futures upended when their retirement benefits were taken away from them. The passage of the Susan Muffley Act in Congress takes a long overdue step toward righting an egregious wrong done to these good people. | Follow Claudia on social media: | == == == == | | This week, Leader Ortt had the pleasure of meeting Jeff Vukelic, President and CEO of ==, a regional Beer, Wine, Spirits, & Non-Alcohol Beverage Wholesaler, who gave him a tour of the facility. name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2c66h2tu7rivjff6t6j9alc3c5q3198djlno2p0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3jmcor5c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij791lmkp79dhk6eojacpl6er7actl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongcqr63d1j65pn7dbjm9gmdcpgclj77cji65qrcd9n6dg6eobjegr61d3n6gob1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74cb6ephbbdhnm9qmcdb0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6md3oublamonk7philgaele83vvb43dt6psgmkg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3jmcor5c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkqatm8htslduastveqdfe5np14m74d8i4rle0m0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3jmcor5c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zml360h0b5bk3ob9skq8iai8tqiet0p72ibi3bqo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3jmcor5c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

Peter,
---
**NEXT**** WEEK**, the fate of our great state is on the line.
---
And when the results roll in on Election Night, I REFUSE to have a single regret about how we ran this campaign, how we fought, and how we put Wisconsinites FIRST.
---
_But that means no stone can be left unturned and no door left unknocked in this neck-and-neck governor 's race._
---
**To ensure we have the resources to WIN on August 9, I 'm counting on your help now more than ever in this final week. **

Make no mistake, the August 9 primary is about giving Wisconsin conservatives our best opportunity, and in this case, our _ONLY_ chance to FIRE radical liberal Tony Evers.
---
From failing our children in school to ravaging our state's economy, Evers cannot be allowed to remain in power.
---
**_That 's why national Democrats and left-wing megadonors have built Evers a warchest of more than $20 MILLION to protect his failure of a governorship._**
---
But Evers also knows that a general election matchup against me would be his downfall - and the ONE SCENARIO in which conservatives can overcome his massive fundraising advantage.
---
_Peter, I 'm the only candidate polling within the margin of error of beating Evers in just over 3 months._
---
But fulfilling this scenario where we FLIP Wisconsin red all hinges on achieving victory in just 1 week's time.
---
**With so much at stake and such little time left, every contribution - from $1 to $100 - is a game changer at this point in the election.**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republican Senators like Chuck Grassley, who work about half the year, are complaining because they have to go to work. Fine. Help Mike Franken to be the next Senator from the great State of Iowa, and Chuck Grassley’s problem is solved!
body:
If Sen. Grassley wants to retire, we can help with that.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Republican Senators, who work about half the year, are complaining because they have to go to work.** **Senator Chuck Grassley of Iowa, who is running for his EIGHTH TERM, and would be 95 years old when it ends** if elected, tweeted out his anger at the fact he has to be in Washington for a job he just can't seem to quit, voting on truly groundbreaking legislation. This is what he tweeted: Are you kidding me? Can you imagine if any of us whined about a job where we work 171 days of the year--including every Friday off--the way Grassley does here? We'd be fired, of course. If poor Chuck, who first got to the Senate in 1980, when the Rubik's Cube came out, John Lennon was shot and The Empire Strikes Back was released, hates this job so much, why is he running for another six-year term, just like the past seven times? [**We need Admiral Mike Franken in Washington. Can you give $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to help send him to Washington and Chuck Grassley back to Iowa where he'll be far from electoral college certification and can attend all the family reunions he'd like?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T357a9918-dd7b-4d9e-9bbb-0bd8d0f256b6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Worse yet the bill Grassley is complaining about--the Inflation Reduction Act--includes the biggest step ever taken by the U.S. to fight climate change, allow Medicare to finally bulk negotiate for prescriptions, saving many seniors thousands of dollars every year, place a minimum tax on big corporations so they can't get away with paying little to nothing and will crack down on wealthy tax cheats. Grassley, who voted for Trump's ludicrous budget-busting tax cut, is set to vote against this while talking about a "responsible fiscal agenda." Grassley, of course, was also suspiciously close to Trump's coup, tweeting out on January 6th that he'd be certifying the electoral votes, something historically done by Vice Presidents. Why didn't Grassley expect Mike Pence to be there? What did he know that we didn't? I sure hope the Jan 6th Committee gets to the bottom of it.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: MIKE FRANKEN FOR IOWA!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6f05898-34bb-47b3-aba3-91e415700a99/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| We can send this seditionist who refused to impeach Trump like seven of his Republican colleagues and every Democrat, to all the reunions he wants to go to in the future and get him the hell out of Washington where he's dangerous and apparently doesn't like being. We can support Grassley's Democratic opponent, Admiral Mike Franken. Yes, we have a retired three-star admiral who spent 36 years in the Navy running for the U.S. Senate. Someone who spent his life serving the United States, not debasing himself in service of Donald Trump's authoritarianism. Admiral Franken wouldn't be complaining about doing his job, he'd be doing it. He wouldn't be whining about a bill that does so much to help seniors, working people and our climate, he'd be proudly voting for it. And he wouldn't be seemingly aiding and abetting a coup, and then voting to let the perpetrator off afterwards. [**We need Admiral Mike Franken in Washington. Can you give $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to help send him to Washington and Chuck Grassley back to Iowa where he'll be far from electoral college certification and can attend all the family reunions he'd like?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5311d59f-abfb-4a9e-b191-1d711b99f305/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks as always my friends. For engaging in this fight and every other one like it. Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: SUPPORT MIKE FRANKEN FOR US SENATE!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6458bca8-9129-4d5c-ac3f-89cfe18a2da2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Charlie Crist for Governor
subject: Where we stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
With just weeks left, our position is strong, but there are challenges ahead |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48889275/359997970/-1696682215?amount=25&refcode=20220807_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWYwZmUyNS01MDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QWMYkY8owItMVybU11_kSMIRjncgmREXq2rCbEc5PIM=)
---
Friends,
There are just 16 days left until the election folks. Things are going to move fast now, so here’s an update about where things stand (and where we see things going from here).
**[If you’re ready to see this fight through alongside us, please chip in a few dollars now to help us WIN in this final stretch.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48889276/359997971/-1696682215?amount=25&refcode=20220807_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWYwZmUyNS01MDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QWMYkY8owItMVybU11_kSMIRjncgmREXq2rCbEc5PIM=)**
We’re pleased to report that our position is strong. Recent polling has consistently shown us narrowly beating Gov. DeSantis. It’s not just one or two fluke polls, either. _St. Pete Polls_ , _USA Today_ , _The Listener Group_ , and even a secret Republican poll uncovered by NBC News all show that Charlie could really win!
**But things are about to get tough**. DeSantis is spending all his time raising HUGE sums of cash from wealthy donors. If we don’t keep up with his fundraising, he’ll destroy us right out of the gate.
**That’s why we’re worried that not enough supporters are chipping in.**
Our campaign is running low on funds right before the general election against Ron DeSantis! But far-right billionaires are still POURING cash into the DeSantis campaign.
After everything that’s happened these last few weeks, we thought people would be fired up to get rid of Ron. He actually celebrated Roe being overturned and then tried to impose a 15 week abortion restriction on Florida!
With so little time left the actions we take now are more important than ever. Everyone on Team Crist is going to leave it all on the court these last few weeks — and we hope you’ll be right there with us.

clean_body: With just weeks left, our position is strong, but there are challenges ahead | | | | = Friends, There are just 16 days left until the election folks. Things are going to move fast now, so here’s an update about where things stand (and where we see things going from here). = We’re pleased to report that our position is strong. Recent polling has consistently shown us narrowly beating Gov. DeSantis. It’s not just one or two fluke polls, either. St. Pete Polls , USA Today , The Listener Group , and even a secret Republican poll uncovered by NBC News all show that Charlie could really win! But things are about to get tough. DeSantis is spending all his time raising HUGE sums of cash from wealthy donors. If we don’t keep up with his fundraising, he’ll destroy us right out of the gate. That’s why we’re worried that not enough supporters are chipping in. Our campaign is running low on funds right before the general election against Ron DeSantis! But far-right billionaires are still POURING cash into the DeSantis campaign. After everything that’s happened these last few weeks, we thought people would be fired up to get rid of Ron. He actually celebrated Roe being overturned and then tried to impose a 15 week abortion restriction on Florida! With so little time left the actions we take now are more important than ever. Everyone on Team Crist is going to leave it all on the court these last few weeks — and we hope you’ll be right there with us. **Peter, this is serious: I just got word that my GOP opponent has accepted a MASSIVE campaign contribution from a “Stop the Steal” sympathizer.**
Yes, you read that correctly. My Republican opponent, my _main_ challenger in this year’s election, is being _**heavily**_ funded by a MAGA Republican who tried to deny the results of a free and fair election.
At best, this means that my opponent will accept payment of any kind to defeat me – even if it has some serious strings attached. But at worst, this means that my opponent is a conspiracy theorist himself, eager to **_bring far-right extremism to New York._**
**Frankly, as a New Yorker, I cannot accept either option.** For generations, New York’s wealthy and corrupt manipulated and silenced our working class families. Undoing all of the harm done to working New Yorkers has been a painstaking and careful process, and now, my insurrectionist-funded, corrupt Republican opponent is threatening to undo all of our hard-fought progress.
At a moment when the GOP’s far-right extremism is running rampant throughout the nation, we cannot let someone who takes contributions from conspiracy theorists sit in New York’s attorney general office. I’m committed to defeating my GOP opponent at all costs, but I can’t do this alone.
**Peter, in light of the news, my team put together an emergency fund to raise $25,000 before MIDNIGHT tomorrow so I can compete with my opponent’s new MAGA donor – but I’m still falling $4,293 short. So please:**
**[Will you rush a donation of $5 or more now to my campaign for re-election? subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd82dcrk985mfkvh3c82auvkaqdc2ung8ddth4jo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6spiceqjacrnctjm2ollmoo71p77mpqr2opnmorb4chjcorjdc3ksuob2p33e1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8omctj2mmqjfclkcoo71cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdim9o77cth62pj24no)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zshambaotr019jpfj7togk9fruisdtiqkdrodcag_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3jmeoj1cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi9io63cknagjr3brjgrllme8qs44hn477he0uq0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3jmeoj1cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z562j87gbqqhnls6sle9s2sgovosabc36ailohd8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3jmeoj1cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6808%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=zy7F9fCLLagrFptf2rMu3Q&sysid=1)
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72370%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YQ2hewh%2b8uLaCB3FIKFrIQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72371%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jP%2fDrUFHX%2fOt9dVPnjAGMA&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72372%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9QUDUs0hGqwc1%2bG6eje99A&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72373%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ks7vNnoxTODD%2fVq7h1Xkuw&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72374%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DZtkSdUbDvwObXztH%2bvWqA&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72385%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ug7hKpXWybgI6GrPKPV2Ng&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72386%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eEIvH85lZDtTzOxd854V%2bw&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72387%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gWo2B670VoXcI7LHDsZqOQ&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72388%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9IaM44UIUb3bofYxjHhwGA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72389%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YHCrRov6wMiXqKT%2f8G4GtQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72380%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YGppnxFFH8FMBlxdvhQd3Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72381%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dVjGMsz0oiLLT804xKZ%2frA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72382%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WQN6ehYruvJ3Yfl3nTantA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72383%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MD546KluuDeP7%2b9SlnIZlQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72384%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0enOJuUCjclHES4xnkhlMw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72395%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YY60hIfIcrFNrSO%2bxyc5Pw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72396%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lLpHe2H6C2B7WZmvqkB3tw&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c72397%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VK%2fAjXNafU2SQfhXWzAbpA&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6808%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=zy7F9fCLLagrFptf2rMu3Q&sysid=1)_

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: It's time to make change
body:
In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6220%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=SkA8yjq2KsQzvx7OEFQMJQ&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. It was the most destructive ruling in the history of our nation. And it led to an anti-life ideology that still infects America to this day. From what I’ve been told, you are someone who values and respects life in all its stages, and I’m guessing this makes you sick to your stomach just like it does to me. But the tide is changing, and that’s why I asked if I could send you this email today. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64205%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EoIjhsnPHW2gs6XdqV1H0A&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ The U.S. Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe gives us a historic opportunity to rebuild a culture of life. The battle for life has returned to the states. And we have a lot of work to do. Because the laws and needs of each state vary, it will take a supercharged effort to fight for the protection of the unborn. But the American Cornerstone Institute is committed to providing resources to support pro-life efforts in each state. And that’s why we need YOU! **Will you help rebuild a culture of life in states across America by making a tax-deductible gift today?** We have seen that the opposition is more hostile than ever now that the official decision has come down. We got a glimpse at those who are anti-life have reacted since the leak was made public. That’s why we’re asking you to give right now to help us fight back to protect life for the unborn with every tool at our disposal. So, please don’t wait. You can make your tax-deductible gift to protect life in states across America using this secure link: **[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-states-confirmation](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64206%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bUT4b7fTnpwh8hIgYMRJYA&sysid=1)** Thank you so much for any support you can offer. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|

name: Joy Fox
subject: Supporting our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joy Fox for Congress
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95767/images/JF%20email%20banner.png]
Hi Peter -
Recently, the US Senate passed the PACT Act, which provides our veterans who were exposed to burn pits and other toxic substances access to the health care they need and earned. You can learn more about these benefits at this Veterans Affairs (VA) link [https://www.va.gov/resources/the-pact-act-and-your-va-benefits/] [https://www.va.gov/resources/the-pact-act-and-your-va-benefits/] . Please share this information with your family and friends who are veterans.
When I am in Congress, my door will always be open to our veterans - to hear their concerns and to advocate for their needs. Ensuring veterans, like my brother, receive the support they deserve is what drives my priorities for them including:
*
Responsive
constituent
services
to
help
veterans
navigate
the
Veterans
Administration
and
its
complicated
process.
*
Increase
funding
for
job
training
programs
,
including
for
apprenticeships,
so
that
Rhode
Island
businesses
can
benefit
from
their
expertise.
*
Strengthen
mental
health
services
and
programs
so
they
receive
the
complete
care
they
need.
I have seen the sacrifices that our service members and their families make to protect us. I will do all I can to honor their service and be a voice for them in Washington. Please consider chipping in to our campaign right now so I can make it to Congress this fall and ensure that our veterans are living with dignity and honor. [https://joyfoxcongress.com/donate-to-joy-fox-for-congress/]
Thank you,
Joy
CLICK HERE TO MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO JOY FOX FOR CONGRESS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joy-fox-for-congress-1]
Contact Us

info@JoyFoxCongress.com

clean_body: [] Hi Peter - Recently, the US Senate passed the PACT Act, which provides our veterans who were exposed to burn pits and other toxic substances access to the health care they need and earned. You can learn more about these benefits at this Veterans Affairs (VA) link [] [] . Please share this information with your family and friends who are veterans. When I am in Congress, my door will always be open to our veterans - to hear their concerns and to advocate for their needs. Ensuring veterans, like my brother, receive the support they deserve is what drives my priorities for them including: Responsive constituent services to help veterans navigate the Veterans Administration and its complicated process. Increase funding for job training programs , including for apprenticeships, so that Rhode Island businesses can benefit from their expertise. * Strengthen mental health services and programs so they receive the complete care they need. I have seen the sacrifices that our service members and their families make to protect us. I will do all I can to honor their service and be a voice for them in Washington. Please consider chipping in to our campaign right now so I can make it to Congress this fall and ensure that our veterans are living with dignity and honor. [] Thank you, Joy CLICK HERE TO MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO JOY FOX FOR CONGRESS [] Contact Us Joy Fox for Congress info@JoyFoxCongress.com PO Box 8504 Warwick RI 02888 Paid for by Joy Fox for Congress [] [] [] []

Friend, I’ve been saying this for months. We should’ve known all along that Fauci is a complete fraud. He lied about masks. He lied about the origins of COVID-19. Then he lied - UNDER OATH - straight to our faces about all of it.

He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. _I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. But I need your support._
* _**If you help me win,** I promise to subpoena every last document of Dr. Fauci’s unprecedented cover-up._

body:
|

---
Friend – to mark three months until Election Day, here are three reasons you should rush a donation to the NDRC before tonight's deadline:
1. **We have a long-term plan.**
Investing in races this November in our 17 Democracy Target states will make a difference not just this year but for years to come.
2. **We’re effective.**
As President Obama said, “[The NDRC has] been the difference between not just **victory and defeat** , but between a fair shot for the American people and a system that cuts the American people out.”
3. **_Everything is on the line._**
Republicans have shown that they’d prefer minority rule over democracy. They’re willing to do anything for power – and this election could be _one of our last chances to stop them_.

Friend, your donation could make a difference to help us succeed in November. With just three months left, it's time to go all-out. **Will you rush a donation now?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Friend – to mark three months until Election Day, here are three reasons you should rush a donation to the NDRC before tonight's deadline: 1. We have a long-term plan. Investing in races this November in our 17 Democracy Target states will make a difference not just this year but for years to come. 2. We’re effective. As President Obama said, “[The NDRC has] been the difference between not just victory and defeat , but between a fair shot for the American people and a system that cuts the American people out.” 3. Everything is on the line. Republicans have shown that they’d prefer minority rule over democracy. They’re willing to do anything for power – and this election could be one of our last chances to stop them. Friend, your donation could make a difference to help us succeed in November. With just three months left, it's time to go all-out. I'll be honest with you, friend: This is going to be a tough race.
Experts at FiveThirtyEight confirm that Georgia could decide Senate control, so the GOP is coming after me as its top target for defeat. **And now a new poll shows me TIED.**
** Raphael Warnock (D): 46%**
**Herschel Walker (R): 46%**
While I've been busy delivering for working people in the Senate, my Republican opponent, Herschel Walker, has been mobilizing Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their dark money groups against me. They've already poured over $20 MILLION into Walker's campaign to defeat us – and they're launching attack ad after attack ad to flip this seat.
**We've beaten the odds before, friend. But unless we hit our critical midnight fundraising deadline, I simply won't be able to fight back, pull ahead, and win this battleground race.**

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqtm9k75uptac4tugihcbml9262o6a06jt1j6eio_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onj69gedcplc9qm5cbkmpo7acpksmrrcd74emqrdc32c4q31cpj65j74tlleoqefduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74cb6epjjac37mthmcc3gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5o2adnvvd1n0qvag1ebncqi2jtsonu6n3l5faq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z031t3tciugo8np1ogmdc01efj98penb65a09hjo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcf0i09fkj81dvnnld40ljh3ega497b39h21rad0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z89udptj5r68p6or0qubofa0lqibbb33snhj5gso_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znc77g450j6mgglkeqbep5jaoblobugg6p5fckno_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgtmo2pgv40f8bcj09ecugbuun2vi9cqqhi8d1so_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt5ph856h3a5a0qdh4ti4erhpi5s7is14h0rqbq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7tf8crj9hgh70f824ivl66u1oepvd9jni2ri5dg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjucth9f0hlnumq1uqc1at4dkev0h8atkpm3lff0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjt8nh013r3ejb1jpj77a2ejhv8jqdcp320dbsj0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc2bbs95vsaic9l09akquq6hth7gd6p3759fm400_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhplt5velia4b5ja8jv8gqc1pat33tu6194fm528_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuno0tn3rr53gao6ojc2i9urqato84ai71237gs8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk520jlnsrvvdckg00o492fp1n502l3324np3qmg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi4csvi6pstd530ghd7h6co651q726v5nudma5n8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zch74o3g3gfic00b6uuukpfqs3dpgfl5g7t497i0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp75f7tomte9hdd6du6cff5qv65ftnpc92calogg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlk7jken5f27k1rtob7cm3tabcm3ivc8kh130msg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zkb778geuaadb76psvohm9bh5baba0sta42c7dio).

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zga26dctpjle829gck2dlg15pc4n29qug09mb24g_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge0o76cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)
clean_body: But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I’ll share my story ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I’ve dealt with racism... I’ve even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I’m not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
Why I'm in this race
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48896873/360028492/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3957-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmFiODUzZC01OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zDgrXRWlSqwX3jHL95d8KeKIX61O39b_g3BrYRpw61Q=) Friend, I'm in this race for U.S. Senate to expand my unlikely story of opportunity to more Americans. You see, I grew up the daughter of a maid and a janitor – hard-working parents who taught me to "never tire of doing good." So I took their message to heart: It wasn't easy, but I became the first in my family to graduate college, embarking on what would become a long career of public service. After serving as a social worker, I joined the police department where I served for 27 years and made history when I became Orlando's first Black female chief of police in 2007. Today, I proudly represent Florida's 10th Congressional Cistrict as only the third Democrat to hold that position. I took an oath to always fight for what is right – and that's exactly what I did when I held Donald Trump accountable for violating his _own_ oath of office. So I will make you the same promise I made to my family: I will continue working to do good at every chance I get. **With your help, I will defeat Marco Rubio. With your help, I will ensure the Senate reflects the diversity that makes our country strong – and ensure that every voice can be heard.** **[We've set a goal to raise $20,000 today to power my campaign, and I can't reach it without you, friend. Can you make a $5 donation today to help this little Black girl from the South make history again and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48896874/360028493/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3957-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmFiODUzZC01OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zDgrXRWlSqwX3jHL95d8KeKIX61O39b_g3BrYRpw61Q=)** Thanks so much for supporting this historic campaign, it's an honor to share this journey with you.
