body:
Serving the people of New Hampshire has been the great honor of my life.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48898121/360032538/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1390-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTgyMzJlOC01OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m27bAkpZ0AAAJ13S0rvKS9lVAwT6T1SUGeZiNRZC4Kg=)
---
Team –

When I was young, my parents instilled the value of freedom and public service in me and my siblings. Soon after I became a mother, I became an advocate for children with disabilities – children like my own son Ben. As State Senator, Governor, and now U.S. Senator, my focus has been on delivering real solutions for the people of New Hampshire.
Serving the people of New Hampshire has been the great honor of my life. But in order to win reelection and to continue delivering on the issues that matter most, I have to fundraise. So even though I hate asking for money, I’ve got to do it.
Fundraising is a reality of political campaigns, and my reelection campaign in New Hampshire is no different.

As Republicans try to buy this seat – spending more than $25 million attacking me – I need every resource possible to fight back. That’s where grassroots donors like you come in. **[If you could pitch in just $3 right now, our campaign will be able to stand up to the latest barrage of GOP smears.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48898122/360032540/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1390-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTgyMzJlOC01OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m27bAkpZ0AAAJ13S0rvKS9lVAwT6T1SUGeZiNRZC4Kg=)**
When I send emails like these, I’m not sure what they will raise – but I do know that every dollar helps us build a stronger campaign that can withstand Republican attacks.

**[So please, stand with me and chip in $3 right now to help strengthen our campaign. I wouldn’t be asking if it weren't ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48898123/360032541/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1390-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTgyMzJlOC01OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m27bAkpZ0AAAJ13S0rvKS9lVAwT6T1SUGeZiNRZC4Kg=)****[necessary.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48898124/360032542/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1390-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTgyMzJlOC01OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m27bAkpZ0AAAJ13S0rvKS9lVAwT6T1SUGeZiNRZC4Kg=)**

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: Serving the people of New Hampshire has been the great honor of my life. | | | = Team – When I was young, my parents instilled the value of freedom and public service in me and my siblings. Soon after I became a mother, I became an advocate for children with disabilities – children like my own son Ben. As State Senator, Governor, and now U.S. Senator, my focus has been on delivering real solutions for the people of New Hampshire. Serving the people of New Hampshire has been the great honor of my life. But in order to win reelection and to continue delivering on the issues that matter most, I have to fundraise. So even though I hate asking for money, I’ve got to do it. Fundraising is a reality of political campaigns, and my reelection campaign in New Hampshire is no different. As Republicans try to buy this seat – spending more than $25 million attacking me – I need every resource possible to fight back. That’s where grassroots donors like you come in. = When I send emails like these, I’m not sure what they will raise – but I do know that every dollar helps us build a stronger campaign that can withstand Republican attacks. = With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. subject: Andy’s opponent is already attacking him on TV
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Well, it's started.

Andy's Republican opponent is airing ads on TV attacking Andy.

And as we expected, they're purposely misleading and downright false.

We're working hard to make sure people know the truth about Andy. But we need your help to get the word out. Can you chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2022-08-07-itsstarted&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d66f6a11-5f16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a]

This is going to be a challenging race. National Republicans have their eyes on this seat. They'd love to replace a principled leader like Andy with a yes-man like Bob Healey.

And while Healey has the big-dollar support of his mom and Kevin McCarthy, Andy has the support of people like you .

His record of service for New Jersey and our country speaks for itself. New Jerseyans want a leader working to improve our lives, not a pawn in partisan battles.

We're organizing night and day to build the largest grassroots movement that New Jersey has ever seen. Will you join in and donate today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2022-08-07-itsstarted&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d66f6a11-5f16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a]

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: We won’t even have a chance 🤯
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | |
Peter-- Tuesday is a _make or break_ special election in Minnesota- I wanted to take a minute to introduce you to Brad Finstad, who is running for the seat.

Brad is a Pro-Trump, Pro-Gun, Pro-Life, Pro-Family, & Pro-Freedom candidate.

Right now, his team desperately needs resources to fight off Democrats' attack ads, and turn out America First supporters. Endorse Brad now, so we can deliver Nancy her next loss:

---
| | [ENDORSE BRAD](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60950503:6HS9upV6N:m:1:3253819041:AE86ED12A6BCEC5A9B9955FE8593AE68:r)
---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60950503:6HS9upV6N:m:1:3253819041:AE86ED12A6BCEC5A9B9955FE8593AE68:r)
---

Pelosi knows she can win by ending a handful of critical GOP campaigns and she's throwing MILLIONS into Brad's race.

It gets worse. Pelosi's spending is WORKING. Democrats are now ahead of us by 4 points in the polls.

**If we don 't act right here and now, there won't be a red wave.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you. If Brad loses, we lose our path to victory in November.

I'm asking every patriot reading this message to ENDORSE Brad Finstad with a donation of just $5 by midnight tonight. With your help, Brad will have what he needs to WIN his race and help the House GOP FIRE Nancy Pelosi once and for all!

body:
The Georgia voting rights landscape.

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48900558/360040070/1793776944?refcode=em_20220806_f_f_threechallenges&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTNlMjNmZC02MDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMTBxzvEfYyNEmKlZ-JDt620crtG19FnkfunrQoNT_0=&emci=514953e0-df14-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=0a3e23fd-6016-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277)

| | Like the poll taxes and literacy tests of the Jim Crow era, modern voter suppression efforts are relentless and effective. But Fair Fight is leading the charge to protect voting rights — and much of this work lies in educating voters across the country about the issues and solutions that are a part of this fight. Our team has identified the three key voting rights hurdles we face in Georgia, and how we plan to fight back:
* **Voter registration.** From 2010 to 2018, 1.6 million voters were purged from voter rolls in Georgia — making them ineligible to vote and creating additional barriers to casting a ballot. Additionally, 53,000+ voter registrations were held hostage in “pending” status. 80% of these registrations were from voters of color.
* **Ballot access.** From long lines and limited early voting windows to forced provisional ballots and eliminating absentee ballot dropboxes, anti-voter politicians have done everything they can to chip away access to the ballot box.
* **Vote counting.** In 2018, thousands of applications in Georgia were lost or rejected, disenfranchising voters, particularly voters of color.

Anti-voter politicians and their allies have made their goals clear — making voting as inaccessible and confusing as possible so fewer people vote, threatening our democracy as we know it. But Fair Fight knows what it takes to fight back — and we’re tackling these issues through litigation, organizing, advocacy, monitoring disinformation, and voter education programs. We’re working to ensure eligible voters can safely and freely cast their ballots, partisan actors are kept from sabotaging our election results, trusted election officials count every vote, and the will of the people prevails. [_**We can’t do this important work without your support. Can you please rush a $20 donation now so our team can help ensure efficient, just, and fair elections ahead of this year’s midterms and beyond?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48900559/360040071/-1234717836?refcode=em_20220806_f_f_threechallenges&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTNlMjNmZC02MDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMTBxzvEfYyNEmKlZ-JDt620crtG19FnkfunrQoNT_0=) Thank you for everything, The Fair Fight team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48900560/360040072/-1234717836?refcode=em_20220806_f_f_threechallenges&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTNlMjNmZC02MDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMTBxzvEfYyNEmKlZ-JDt620crtG19FnkfunrQoNT_0=)

This bill doesn't do nearly enough to address inflation, but it does make critical investments in everyday Americans.**_

**New bill lowers healthcare costs, closes unfair tax loopholes, and reduces the deficit**
---
---
** _The Inflation Reduction Act may be a misnomer, as it doesn't do enough to address inflation, but it does make critical investments in everyday Americans._** **_**I need your help getting to Congress. We're nearing just 90 days until the November election, but voters will start casting their ballots in September. In the face of misinformation, we have to fund a massive outreach program to spread honesty across the district. Can you make a contribution today?**_****
---
[JOIN OUR FIGHT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48901167/360040733/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzJjNTg4ZC02MTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2U_Pd4IfyijQzE0ycVpBUpGPYhsR4ywWzII9Ow_TUfo=)

| | WASHINGTON, D.C. — Before all bills pass, changes occur, but their general positions do not. The new Inflation Reduction Act addresses: **Fair taxes**
* A new minimum tax on corporations currently paying **little to nothing** to benefit other Americans and a 1% stock buyback tax.
* Taxes on individuals and households **will not** be increased.
* Wealthy corporations, like all Americans, should pay fair taxes.

**Prescription drug price reform:**
* Allow Medicare to negotiate the price of prescription medicine
* Limit out-of-the-pocket Medicare costs to 2,000

**Healthcare affordability:**
* Prevents 10 million Americans from losing health insurance subsidies
* Prevents 3 million Americans from losing their health insurance entirely

**Energy security and environmental investments:**
* Environmental protection
* Clean energy production
* Reducing carbon emissions

We must spend taxpayers' money wisely and require ultra-wealthy corporations to pay their fair share. Affordable drugs for our seniors and medical insurance for our families are essential to a healthier Nation. Without environmental protections, we risk too much for the future. We must advocate and protect Northern Michigan's beauty for generations to come. Will my opponent support this bill? As we review his voting record of abandoning real solutions that would benefit the people in his district, we can predict he won't. This energy, healthcare, environment, and tax bill will improve our way of life, help our seniors, and support families. It's time we have a Congressman willing to break from party lines to support real, hardworking [#MI01](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48901168/360040734/2035906872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzJjNTg4ZC02MTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2U_Pd4IfyijQzE0ycVpBUpGPYhsR4ywWzII9Ow_TUfo=&emci=6405bf36-6016-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=872c588d-6116-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427) Americans. Please make a contribution to help me get to Congress. Thank you. -Dr. Bob Dr. Bob Lorinser [bit.ly/FundDrBob](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48901169/360040735/1280001822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzJjNTg4ZC02MTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2U_Pd4IfyijQzE0ycVpBUpGPYhsR4ywWzII9Ow_TUfo=)

body:
Alito publicly joins Cruz and Youngkin’s glee in the wake of Roe v. Wade

|
---
Derek, This past week, Justice **Samuel Alito** was caught laughing and mocking the foreign leaders who criticized the U.S. Supreme Court decision overturning _Roe v. Wade_. His comment that Boris Johnson “paid the price” for disagreeing with the Dobbs decision was met with laughter and applause. We’ve been saying this for a long time: Republicans are intent on stripping women of their right to choose, _and they’re doing it joyfully._ **[This is why we’re turning to you – we need support from Democrats who are eager to protect women’s rights and hold the ground against these assaults.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48903058/360045982/308851134?refcode=dpva-em-220807-alito&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MThiY2Y5My02MjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTFCcDyJWhQ-2OaUri-kqCCg9x6ow8ZDpb8MJMZzNHw=)** Alito isn’t alone – GOP Senators like **Ted Cruz** proudly touted the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ as “nothing short of a massive victory.” Even Virginia’s own **Glenn Youngkin has promised to sign “ANY” bill restricting a Virginian’s right to an abortion.** The only thing standing between folks like **Glenn Youngkin** and a radical ban on abortion are Virginia Democrats. We need strong Democrats like you who are willing to hold the ground against folks like Alito, Cruz, and Youngkin. **[Can we count on you to make a contribution today and help preserve women’s rights in the Commonwealth?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48903059/360045983/308851134?refcode=dpva-em-220807-alito&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MThiY2Y5My02MjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTFCcDyJWhQ-2OaUri-kqCCg9x6ow8ZDpb8MJMZzNHw=)** Virginia Dems | [****************************](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48903060/360045984/308851134?refcode=dpva-em-220807-alito&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MThiY2Y5My02MjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTFCcDyJWhQ-2OaUri-kqCCg9x6ow8ZDpb8MJMZzNHw=)**********[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48903061/360045985/308851134?amount=10&refcode=dpva-em-220807-alito&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MThiY2Y5My02MjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTFCcDyJWhQ-2OaUri-kqCCg9x6ow8ZDpb8MJMZzNHw=)**********

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a27d45103a83419c8b72f104bbf59d47&_e=VqKBvSoaUp-ruLmzb2Z4RR_LnRn96F1bgYM5q5tWhHkBtX5-oZio-yIPjAV9Q4dlKQtLXc4kYbzdDX-2NLF2eCj5kgkeSl1YOswh9NnGMYeUK7yIUsAHinb49tXXERlsXIGgkaG1F2rjyR5ecgTPOiQJi5hQC2epckQpMYdopMkomM4ymtoWc69SAT7-3A-WmG3vr-BRogGCkkDoTO8B5LdfVSOPLmIb57E3VkUsuLNuOpE90txPP8dg22R0CXLb98OqaaHbtnH1fAlkI5akc0cxcnH30hMknJJ-au2i32hsbiP-jMS-WdN0Ivr25OF4agOTeAD52JWv9WQqGegOt8Z8rCZ867bqao8ZJBoboTGg4dqT2nQKjiD5b0XthMyJfUKjWQ_8R8-kQ4FOIlwO233uMeRolsJOkwLDss4aBHIp7lPQku813N-cZEvyqYCfOGORt9IN6i_83dsYGHEyrg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a27d45103a83419c8b72f104bbf59d47&_e=VqKBvSoaUp-ruLmzb2Z4RR_LnRn96F1bgYM5q5tWhHkBtX5-oZio-yIPjAV9Q4dlKQtLXc4kYbzdDX-2NLF2eCj5kgkeSl1YOswh9NnGMYeUK7yIUsAHinb49tXXERlsXIGgkaG1F2rjyR5ecgTPOiQJi5hQC2epckQpMYdopMkomM4ymtoWc69SAT7-3A-WmG3vr-BRogGCkkDoTO8B5LdfVSOPLmIb57E3VkUsuLNuOpE90txPP8dg22R0CXLb9bxj0bNfLhjMY7RauOn_AC5iFSi03z9ziimXSNAnFUzHhFJXoLMNKT-hMFo4US75GcKZ8Eli2WXNqVcg-Wmags7X6xMjWQtx8JuQSiBl8zbfc26yYzsBRwFJwMknEGdRHiTZTiRa_RJH0ORJAHFXLiu6_CGRRrCMwMawsbAIa6IhGl-iLi7d0LTlBxfu81axHL_lZiYu6nBg8JfVayJR5w%3D%3D) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a27d45103a83419c8b72f104bbf59d47&_e=VqKBvSoaUp-ruLmzb2Z4RR_LnRn96F1bgYM5q5tWhHkBtX5-oZio-yIPjAV9Q4dlKQtLXc4kYbzdDX-2NLF2eCj5kgkeSl1YOswh9NnGMYeUK7yIUsAHinb49tXXERlsXIGgkaG1F2rjyR5ecgTPOiQJi5hQC2epckQpMYdopMkomM4ymtoWc69SAT7-3A-WmG3vr-BRogGCkkDoTO8B5LdfVSOPLmIb57E3VkUsuLNuOpE90txPP8dg22R0CXLbyptee6XSEP9hThtF9Ng6NVPi3140XJjbkEBWeKoXLKil3xbFBvWPXj6gqQpAIOYQsX9M6-o0wjzxErNqIoOteHK8c1_Y4IIwAl_3MeJuE1Z79vOnI2Y7XTyAta8ALIXU6rpL2JVfFb5wfW5aJAl24S7AUuTQdg_CUZxnyMY5uglb36shhM4cCGU8tVd8Os3QFZ3Zq_2oWpY4YPI5q6u-qw%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e2f7f53d8df24f27a67d79c56ef5eb48&_e=qZZ3AKh5qdUMLSn5zFX2vm3VZi8e9G37nW1qDEbS6jcS5jgLITfAo6GKgR8pG1W1bySwDcGK7i5pqrkIQpRf0xfk7CbOF8zHqlHYnYOjzt-CreJpDVEfM8qBZnQXpVfuvoGJ-3_Nn5DnfpL1GjHekunDmDprPhhvI0t9gMBQIAUMKnlgTt_ekrs5QlahqM9d2Z6-qliu0SjECsBTP2w1wlJ6cy8m9i_O8j72wggopV4vgU2Rk_C3csDZkPmmqSi11k66hrlRphLmq6dppQdLLXT64dD1UJHBfReTi5RBcHhPius1FTxUViE4Io3IC32xjUuRvnLg-WDWemYLtEh0GPH36LY_Eb5Fu7RadxzTtcE%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -_Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you’re thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, “what about them is influential?!”

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren’t, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

clean_body: Friend, I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you’re thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, “what about them is influential?!” This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren’t, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here’s how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: - HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, “What does BLEXIT mean?” It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. “If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.” - Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but Republicans have fallen behind in the polls and in fundraising – and the consequences could be devastating for Republicans if we don’t catch up NOW. To get us back on track, I pulled our supporters’ records to see who’s given this month. Does this look right? | NAME | EMAIL | STATUS ---|---|--- Patrick T. | — | Contributed ON FILE | "dpwillis67@gmail.com" | "PENDING" Madison W. | — | Contributed Peyton K. | — | Contributed $4.99 – It's not a ton, but it's all we're asking. If everyone reading this gave $4.99 we wouldn’t need to reach out for the rest of the month. But we’re worried Republicans are starting to get complacent – which is why we’ve lost our ground in the polls and completely plummeted in the fundraising game. "Can you chip in an urgent $4.99 right now to help our team close the gap?" Every dollar will be put to work right away to help elect House Republicans & FIRE Nancy Pelosi! | | | | Falling behind on our fundraising right now has me nervous, and here’s why: Pelosi & her puppets have already dumped in MILLIONS of dark money to unseat Republicans, and elect the likes of AOC and the Squad Democrats’ allies in the media and Big Tech are working OVERTIME to collude against us – which means we desperately need resources to out-organize, out-message, and out-work them The stakes are higher than EVER - inflation, crime, the border, election integrity - there is simply too much on the line to put this election on the back burner That’s why I have to ask one more time: Be one of the 10 patriots we need in your area to fight back and pull ahead of Republicans: Rush a small gift to help us elect Republicans and save this great nation: | | | | | | A note from Kevin: | | "McCarthy Footer" | As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- "EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>" The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started. Kevin McCarthy Leader, House Republicans | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Amanda Makki launches Second Fox News Ad, Our “Community Conservative” | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=1961a6774d&e=c2296cffff)

| | | **Amanda Makki Launches “Community Conservatives Unite Behind Amanda Makki”
Second of Two Campaign Ads now airing on Fox News & Spectrum Bay News 9** Hello Friend!

Today, we launched our “Community Conservative Unite Behind Amanda Makki” commercial which is now airing on Fox News and Spectrum Bay News 9, and highlights why 13 Pinellas County Mayors, and the family of former Congressman Bill Young, have endorsed Amanda who will be a partner to Governor Ron DeSantis in Washington.
I’m Amanda Makki, the Community Conservative in this race who has earned the endorsements of the Pinellas leaders we trust. Don’t take my word for it, take theirs:

Former Congressman C.W. Bill Young’s wife Beverly Young:_“My husband, Bill Young, would be very proud of Amanda.”_ Madeira Beach Mayor John Hendricks: _“Amanda supports term limits and so do I.”_ North Redington Beach Mayor Bill Queen: _“No one is going to push around Amanda Makki, I can tell you that!”_ Redington Beach Mayor David Will: _“She is a strong conservative who cares.”_ Join our fellow neighbors, friends, and Pinellas leaders in voting for conservative fighter Amanda Makki for Congress in this critical primary. Election Date is August 23.

📺Can you share it on Facebook, YouTube, Twitter, Instagram?

👉 I would like to ask for your financial contribution so we can pay for yard signs and bumper stickers to ensure a win on August 23!

name: Jacob
subject: Here’s our plan going forward
body:
| |
---
Friend, In just three days, Brenda Siegel is set to become the Democratic Nominee for Governor of Vermont. This is a major victory for our campaign, and we couldn’t have done it without you! But our work’s not even close to being done yet. **** We’ll be facing off against the incumbent Governor in the general election. Beating him will be a challenge. But we’ve overcome odds before, and the pieces are in place for us to shock the world again this November. **** We have seen over thirty state legislators endorse Brenda, including Brenda’s close friend Senator Kesha Ram Hinsdale. Former Governor Howard Dean also joined our team and endorsed Brenda. We have gained the support of the three most prominent grassroots climate advocacy groups in Vermont: Vermont Conservation Voters, Sierra Club Vermont and VPIRG Votes. Rights and Democracy early endorsed and we have more announcements coming very soon!
---

**We’re succeeding because our campaign has the right plans for Vermont.** We’ve unveiled plans to support Vermont families, stand up for state employees, take bold climate action, and to meaningfully address our housing shortage. From now until November, we’re going to need to spread our message on a wider scale. Every voter needs to hear about how our plans will benefit Vermont. In order to do this, we must send mailers out across Vermont and get on TV. And we need money to do that. This means we need your help advertising our plan for Vermont. By the time polls close on Tuesday, we’re hoping to have enough money to get on TV, send out mailers and get Brenda to every corner of the state. [Can you help us get the word out about our campaign with a donation of $50?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yx3cUQBGNTQ0X9M8L6qTDFi8aR_-WfqCWPKq9_hBe1GsHWXDofBbkR5NmV4qPRO-BGV4wXyiEDynrkQ1I5GegfxZeko1ZqISikR4vwHaHXtoLI1JEyYsGHjwFxMC9-sM0gaEapMKHroUNUv1_8wwvVgkJQjBOXdELksz5jWFNPE94HgCQWkQNVJfukWCExpPAEAGyjagdy4AnsZUkerKar-d7G-gCFYF33E7hiPNP02JXlmk7fs6JOkP80XyZpyT1rTBBEpfaf9jXg4NKPNEmpqadufD1pllPPtx5DKlqK5oT3njmkqTX9phYfbc1-oX1nF2atHletHW97Fa5qvMQ7/3oe/1vEHuKAERwqPUAGFWim8VQ/h4/HdgI7rx_wxGQoF56gHJm0VgpyzhZcpn70hwbfVMfJ4U)

clean_body: | | Friend, In just three days, Brenda Siegel is set to become the Democratic Nominee for Governor of Vermont. This is a major victory for our campaign, and we couldn’t have done it without you! But our work’s not even close to being done yet. ** We’ll be facing off against the incumbent Governor in the general election. Beating him will be a challenge. But we’ve overcome odds before, and the pieces are in place for us to shock the world again this November. We have seen over thirty state legislators endorse Brenda, including Brenda’s close friend Senator Kesha Ram Hinsdale. Former Governor Howard Dean also joined our team and endorsed Brenda. We have gained the support of the three most prominent grassroots climate advocacy groups in Vermont: Vermont Conservation Voters, Sierra Club Vermont and VPIRG Votes. Rights and Democracy early endorsed and we have more announcements coming very soon! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We’re succeeding because our campaign has the right plans for Vermont. We’ve unveiled plans to support Vermont families, stand up for state employees, take bold climate action, and to meaningfully address our housing shortage. From now until November, we’re going to need to spread our message on a wider scale. Every voter needs to hear about how our plans will benefit Vermont. In order to do this, we must send mailers out across Vermont and get on TV. And we need money to do that. This means we need your help advertising our plan for Vermont. By the time polls close on Tuesday, we’re hoping to have enough money to get on TV, send out mailers and get Brenda to every corner of the state. Thank you, Jacob Elpern, Campaign Manger for Brenda Siegel PS: Today Brenda will be attending the Franklin County Field Days In Highgate and a Candidate Meet And Greet at Parker Pie in Glover. Come join us!** | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Brenda for Vermont. All rights reserved.

| | Happy 43rd Birthday, Omar! Some of us have known Omar for months, and others for decades. We all agree there is nobody else like Omar. He inspires and comforts us with his tenacity, resilience, humor and good nature. He challenges all of us to do more to help our fellow humans. He is setting an example - to young people, the disenfranchised, and the politically-disconnected - showing all of us that is ok to speak-out against injustice and to speak-up for what we believe in. His actions tell us it's ok to dream big, and his message to the other candidates in this race - some of whom act as if they are already the nominees - could not be more clear: he is not a token-candidate, and he intends to win. [Please join us in wishing Omar a wondeful 43rd birthday by making a $43 contribution to his campaign, today](https://www.bahforcongress.com/so/b3O9s3pYV/c?w=g0QCNH0KWBXXZ5DgutpL7huRY91zeikjuviHTwtRgAo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JhaC1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMiIsInIiOiI2NjljZWI3YS05Y2VlLTQ5MGUtMTI0Ni1kNWIwNGU1Y2ZkOTkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiZTY3ZDc2Yi05M2JkLTRlOWItOTJhOC04OTI0NDdiYzc2MzkifQ) We have tremendous momentum and we need your help to sustain it. \-- The Bah for Congress Campaign Team

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: I’m proud of this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
The bill I personally sponsored l to commemorate the fallen heroes of WWII just passed the House.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48911607/360057005/812264984?refcode=EM_FR_220807Coin_N_MK_90DO_5_NG_N_TESTB_logo_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZThkOGYyZi02YTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLFTnUk3CjUW18BOAbkA8VDeajNkfqiVw9KkgPpEjsg=) Team, I was fortunate to be born into a family steeped in patriotism and military service. Since I was young, I was taught to treat our veterans with dignity and respect. Those teachings have not only followed me to my role in Congress, but have been the driving force behind many votes I’ve made and bills I’ve sponsored. Servicemen, women, and military veterans occupy an important place in the heart of our nation, and their legacies deserve to be preserved and protected. That’s why I fought tirelessly for 17 years, spearheading the campaign for the creation of the National World War II Memorial, dedicated in 2004 in our nation’s capital. I’m proud to say the work honoring WWII heroes has not stopped there. Just last week, the House passed my bill – the Greatest Generation Commemorative Coin Act, which received bipartisan support. The President signed it into law this week. The Act will benefit our country two-fold. Through commemorative coins, we will unite to honor the legacies of those who fought to protect our freedoms while sales of the coins will fund repairs and enhanced educational programming at the National World War II Memorial. The passage of the Greatest Generation Commemorative Coin Act is proof that we can unite and bridge the gap of partisan politics - **because our service members will ALWAYS come first.** Sincerely, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48911621/360057019/812264984?refcode=EM_FR_220807Coin_N_MK_90DO_5_NG_N_TESTB_thumbnail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZThkOGYyZi02YTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLFTnUk3CjUW18BOAbkA8VDeajNkfqiVw9KkgPpEjsg=) Marcy Kaptur [**_P.S. I will never stop fighting for our veterans so long as I’m able to serve in Congress and be the voice of Ohioans. My Republican opponent wants to flip this seat red. We can’t let him succeed. Can I count on your support and your $5, so we can continue to honor our military and protect our country from dangerous extremism?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48911639/360057039/812264984?refcode=EM_FR_220807Coin_N_MK_90DO_5_NG_N_TESTB_l1_&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZThkOGYyZi02YTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLFTnUk3CjUW18BOAbkA8VDeajNkfqiVw9KkgPpEjsg=) | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. **Can you help Marcy by giving monthly?**
---

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Give me a moment to explain, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48911771/360057453/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg2YTdmYy02OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pOtYVPDV07USjFUU37FqwjYVJxQl5OyZhIJvLzhBkEw=)
Can I explain something, team? [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48911772/360057454/1827709641?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220807_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg2YTdmYy02OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pOtYVPDV07USjFUU37FqwjYVJxQl5OyZhIJvLzhBkEw=) In 2009, I was appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate for Colorado. Polls pegged my name recognition at a whopping 3%. Republicans called me the “accidental Senator.” Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” To say the least, I was not an obvious choice. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48911773/360057455/1827709641?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220807_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg2YTdmYy02OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pOtYVPDV07USjFUU37FqwjYVJxQl5OyZhIJvLzhBkEw=) And it’s true, I had never run for office before. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48911774/360057456/1827709641?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220807_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg2YTdmYy02OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pOtYVPDV07USjFUU37FqwjYVJxQl5OyZhIJvLzhBkEw=)
_Source: The New York Times_ But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses, where we could do better, what our neighbors needed help with. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48911775/360057457/1827709641?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220807_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg2YTdmYy02OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pOtYVPDV07USjFUU37FqwjYVJxQl5OyZhIJvLzhBkEw=)
_Source: The Denver Post_ So I knew — with the right team — we could do some good in the Senate. clean_body: Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” | = Can I explain something, team? = In 2009, I was appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate for Colorado. Polls pegged my name recognition at a whopping 3%. Republicans called me the “accidental Senator.” Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” To say the least, I was not an obvious choice. = And it’s true, I had never run for office before. = Source: The New York Times But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses, where we could do better, what our neighbors needed help with. = Source: The Denver Post So I knew — with the right team — we could do some good in the Senate. = I was ready to fight for the state we loved and the country that welcomed my and many others’ immigrant families. thanks to folks like you, we’ve been here ever since working to expand opportunity for all.= But now we’re up for re-election and Mitch McConnell has already made me a top target. All Republicans have to do is flip one seat to retake the Senate majority, and it’s clear they have their sights set on Colorado. = To make matters worse, Mitch McConnell and National Republicans recently launched TV ads supporting my opponent, and we're already being outspent. We cannot afford to lose the Senate majority. Can I personally count on you to donate $10, so we can have the resources to fight back and protect this seat? you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= I’m refusing to accept a single cent of corporate PAC or lobbyist money, so I mean it when I say I’m counting on your grassroots donation (and videos with Hick and his banjo) to fuel our campaign. = Thanks, Michael = Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Hello,
I’ve got 15 minutes before my next meeting, so I wanted to send you a quick email about the latest in my campaign against Chuck Grassley.
Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020, and it’s going to be even closer this November. Every poll shows Grassley is more unpopular than he’s ever been, and I’m gaining ground quickly. We’re in a statistical tie in our latest poll.
I’m running for Senate because our democracy is under attack. We need to address climate change, take action to stop gun violence, protect voting rights, and finally get corrupting money out of our politics.
But Chuck Grassley has no interest in any of that. His big source of cash is corporate PAC checks from the NRA and Faux News – yes, even Fox “News” gave Grassley a big campaign check last quarter.
Whether or not we win and turn Iowa blue will decide if Democrats keep control of the Senate – or hand the reins off to obstructionist Mitch McConnell. That’s why I’m staring down unprecedented amounts of Super PAC spending.
**I’m ready to fight for everyday Iowans in the Senate. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. But with the polls this close, I need your immediate help now to fight back against the lies being told about me, and to win.**

clean_body: If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Hello, I’ve got 15 minutes before my next meeting, so I wanted to send you a quick email about the latest in my campaign against Chuck Grassley. Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020, and it’s going to be even closer this November. Every poll shows Grassley is more unpopular than he’s ever been, and I’m gaining ground quickly. We’re in a statistical tie in our latest poll. I’m running for Senate because our democracy is under attack. We need to address climate change, take action to stop gun violence, protect voting rights, and finally get corrupting money out of our politics. But Chuck Grassley has no interest in any of that. His big source of cash is corporate PAC checks from the NRA and Faux News – yes, even Fox “News” gave Grassley a big campaign check last quarter. Whether or not we win and turn Iowa blue will decide if Democrats keep control of the Senate – or hand the reins off to obstructionist Mitch McConnell. That’s why I’m staring down unprecedented amounts of Super PAC spending. I’m ready to fight for everyday Iowans in the Senate. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. But with the polls this close, I need your immediate help now to fight back against the lies being told about me, and to win. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I truly couldn’t do this without you. Your support means the world. Thank you, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

She's been working around the clock for our district and campaigning hard to be re-elected, and we want to show her just how much support our campaign has. Thank you,
Team Spanberger
* * *
Peter,

I wanted to reach out with a surprise message before Abigail's birthday on Sunday!

Abigail and I have worked together for four years, and every year her birthday is a chance to bring a bit of fun to the campaign trail.

Our campaign team sees how hard she works for our community every day - from traveling around the district to connect with voters to advocating for policy to improve the lives of Virginians - and we know it would mean the world to her if you'd sign her birthday card.

Our campaign is fueled by community support, and we want to show Abigail just how much VA-07 has her back just like she does ours! [_**Will you sign her birthday card today so we can surprise her Sunday?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/kx2qAHhPpYz_Vu6rZWlfJCTpeGlBSOLX6-N65-aiTXE=/on-35a0YdNgNmkYoeQHd6paxx3weMQND8rckA2er3C8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220807-1-EM&amount=25)

Friend –

Polling shows I'm just a few points behind Marco Rubio, and experts are saying that I could flip this seat in November – but only if I have the resources to reach more voters.

That's why I need to build more resources to surge ahead in this race that will determine Senate control – and so far, thousands of supporters have chipped in. I'm so close to hitting my midnight goal.

There's just one donation that's missing: yours.

Take a look at your supporter record:

Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Today's donation: **PENDING**
Suggested contribution: $5
---

---
**Deadline: 11:59 p.m. **
---
CNN is calling Florida a top pickup opportunity for Democrats, and The Miami Times even reported that I'm closing the polling gap, friend – but there's a problem:

Peter – Election Day is right around the corner, and we're in crunch time. We've got to do everything in our power between now and November to keep New Mexico blue.
And you are an integral part of our efforts, Peter. That's why we're asking you today: **Will you sign up to volunteer with Team MLG?**
**[_Your time is just as valuable as your dollar in critical moments like this, and volunteering makes a huge difference to this campaign. Please, sign up here to volunteer with the Democratic Party of New Mexico. >> _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48912157/360059115/-1265060336?code=jtk1411-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTYzZGJiMC02YTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kdujc9LzlM6kEdDgPTP_0V945T0opKul44YeZHspfsc=&emci=4a63048e-7e13-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d963dbb0-6a16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)**
Gov. Lujan Grisham has fought tirelessly to protect our bodily autonomy and defend our earth from the increasing climate crisis. But all these efforts will be lost if we allow her GOP opponent to win.
**[_The Governor has a bold vision for the future of our democracy – and if you believe in it too, we want to have you on this team: Please, sign up here to volunteer with Team MLG and the Democratic Party of New Mexico. _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48912167/360059124/-1265060336?code=jtk1411-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTYzZGJiMC02YTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kdujc9LzlM6kEdDgPTP_0V945T0opKul44YeZHspfsc=&emci=4a63048e-7e13-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d963dbb0-6a16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)**

Folks,

Joe Biden doesn’t seem to know whether he’s the President of the United States, or the Merriam Webster Dictionary. He’s already tried to change the definition of ‘woman,’ and now he’s trying again to redefine the word ‘recession.’
| [**YOU CAN'T MAKE THIS UP**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2nd6p25ol1migq80qlk7060jqlbv28t0cb3pbeo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge1o37c5h2bs)

**Americans aren’t stupid and can easily see through this nonsense.**
I’ll give Joe a lesson. A recession is two straight quarters of economic decline (which is right now), and a recovery is when we Take Back the Senate (which we’ll do this November with your support).

_**[Will you step up to the plate and help me get our country back on track?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4erf4tt7gu4ih4t1anl0tqhq9b72fg20iragvio_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ge1o37c5h2bs)**_

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: State Democrats lead on environmental and abortion protections and everything else you need to know in the states recently.
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, July 24th, 2022. | | |

name: Lilian Rodriguez-Baz
subject: Which way is America going?
body:

As a matter of fact, as TPUSA contributor Drew Hernandez recently documented at the gates of Disneyland, the Leftists will _VICIOUSLY_ attack parents and concerned Americans who dare defend their right to protect children from harmful Left-wing ideology. That's why it is CRITICAL that Real Americans like you and me fight back by boycotting the companies who are trying to sexualize and indoctrinate our children! TPUSA Faith is on the front lines in the fight against these destructive forces -- chief among them Disney -- and we need you in the fight as well! [**Please join the growing movement of faithful patriots who refuse to bow to radical ideology and Boycott Disney.**](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyMTktNDEwZjViMmFiN2UyNDQ4MTk2ZjIwODVjNTkxNzI2YWUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFuZWRvdC5jb20vdHVybmluZy1wb2ludC11c2EvYm95Y290dC1kaXNuZXktcGV0aXRpb24_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UE0yOTk1NyJ9/55vKm1ogY0jR49UzC7mMdw)

Make no mistake, Fellow American -- Disney is actively working to break the generational cycle of liberty that has kept America free. _They're undermining not only the innocence of precious children, but the very fabric of American society._ We **_CANNOT_** let them continue unopposed! clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | | | Fellow American, Across the nation, Real Americans are fed up with Disney aiming their radical, "not-so-secret gay agenda" squarely at our kids. Producers within the company have publicly admitted their desire to expose children to radical gender theory concepts as early as possible. The company itself has advocated for the grooming of children in public elementary school classrooms! | | | How much longer will we continue giving our business to this massive "woke" corporation while it actively works to rob children of their innocence, indoctrinate them in radical gender ideology, alienate them from biblical truth, and undermine the American family? Disney has run out of time. I'm boycotting Disney -- and I want YOU to join me and THOUSANDS of grassroots patriots. It's no secret that the radical Left has its sights set on America's children. Radical Leftist activists are hard at work in America's largest corporations, in classrooms across the country, and in the media our children consume -- trying to groom a generation of American children and indoctrinate them into their Woke beliefs. And grooming isn't just a pastime for them; it's central to their strategy, and they're ready to fight for it. As a matter of fact, as TPUSA contributor Drew Hernandez recently documented at the gates of Disneyland, the Leftists will VICIOUSLY attack parents and concerned Americans who dare defend their right to protect children from harmful Left-wing ideology. That's why it is CRITICAL that Real Americans like you and me fight back by boycotting the companies who are trying to sexualize and indoctrinate our children! TPUSA Faith is on the front lines in the fight against these destructive forces -- chief among them Disney -- and we need you in the fight as well! Make no mistake, Fellow American -- Disney is actively working to break the generational cycle of liberty that has kept America free. They're undermining not only the innocence of precious children, but the very fabric of American society. We CANNOT let them continue unopposed! No other group in America has impacted as many young people as Turning Point USA. Our 3,000+ student chapters and 500,000+ student activists are a testament to our influence among America's youth. But Disney has spent nearly a century infiltrating the minds of children, and it's going to take every single one of us to unwind that insidious work -- and it all starts with this nationwide boycott of their Woke products. Your support in this fight will provide the pressure needed to show that Real Americans are willing to take a stand for our children, for our values, and for the future of our nation! Disney has gone too far, and has become Too woke. It's time they realized that if they go woke, then they go broke! Thank you for your support -- For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Team DeSantis
subject: The Ron DeSantis Round Up
body:
Check out what the campaign has been up to this week.
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=422e204e613e214a7291868a8ea0fe52f50011efbe045c06e5a2d94aef7c97f26ea63fe6ff83de23afcafba2a0be73d1f9ed0b8675f7ce7c)
---

_**Welcome to the Ron DeSantis Round Up! This is a chance for the Freedom Team to keep you up-to-date with America 's favorite Governor and his freedom agenda in the Sunshine State. Keep reading to see how Governor Ron DeSantis is fighting for all Floridians this week.**

_**[We are less than 100 days away from Florida's gubernatorial election. Will you chip in now to help Governor DeSantis bring home a resounding victory for freedom? >>>](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=422e204e613e214a99c01c3f0520888df74e8344fbd2b365c7ee151b6e576ec763da4c5cef09b0ff2cc9c1ce224146df50ce15855f528f24 "We are less than 100 days away from Florida’s gubernatorial election. Will you chip in now to help Governor DeSantis bring home a resounding victory for freedom? >>")**__

---
|
---

On Wednesday, the first television advertisement of the election cycle supporting the Governor was released. Entitled, "Dear Governor," the 60-second ad shares Floridians' stories about Governor DeSantis and how his work to Keep Florida Free has impacted them. _**[WATCH THE FULL AD>>>](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=422e204e613e214a4eae0d115049444e7cff031cb5bfe4f4803c84282114069a17d30ae043c6fa89db7adcb15001d184bcfc06528bf103f0 "WATCH THE FULL AD >>>")**_
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=422e204e613e214a6a82ef74ea32836d40af715ebab0d8415ec9b0a6f8b6bc16260a7d2abf4307137bbdefc4a0cc8c4b281c9184059699fe)
---

---
|
---

Governor DeSantis put activist prosecutors on notice by suspending the State Attorney in Hillsborough County who declared that he would refuse to enforce laws he doesn't like. Under Governor DeSantis's leadership, Florida is, and will continue to be, a law-and-order state.
_**" State Attorneys have a duty to prosecute crimes as defined in Florida law, not to pick and choose which laws to enforce based on his personal agenda. It is my duty to hold Florida's elected officials to the highest standards for the people of Florida." -- Governor DeSantis**_

---
|
---

Governor DeSantis is making it clear woke corporate bullies will not be tolerated in the state of Florida. He recently announced legislative proposals and administrative actions to protect Floridians from the environmental, social, and governance (ESG) movement, in which financial corporations defy their fiduciary duty by favoring individuals and business who advance a woke ideological agenda. This is a direct threat to the vitality of the American economy and Americans' economic freedoms.
__**[Do you stand with Governor DeSantis's fight to protect Floridians from woke capital? Rush in any amount now to help keep WOKE out of Florida >>>](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=422e204e613e214a1eb5efcf0b516e4b9619151d949b5e956c20d576cd33ee65e1ccf7958053560a6a82916d284e465059cf21952336ec13 "Do you stand with Governor DeSantis’s fight to protect Floridians from woke capital? Rush in any amount now to help keep WOKE out of Florida >>>")**__
_**" The leveraging of corporate power to impose an ideological agenda on society represents an alarming trend. From Wall Street banks to massive asset managers and Big Tech companies, we have seen the corporate elite use their economic power to impose policies on the country that they could not achieve at the ballot box." -- Governor DeSantis**_

---
|
---

Florida's First Lady Casey DeSantis this week unveiled Florida Cancer Connect, an initiative which focuses on providing information on cancer treatment, caregiver tools, and stories from brave Floridians who have battled cancer on a centralized website.

---
|
---

_**" Today we launched the Florida Cancer Connect initiative, a centralized website that provides Floridians with valuable knowledge while instilling hope to those facing cancer by sharing positive survivor stories." -- First Lady Casey DeSantis**_

---
|
---

As Florida students prepare to head back into the classrooms this fall, Governor DeSantis took to Twitter to simplify the media's "confusion" about appropriate curriculum in Florida schools:

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=422e204e613e214a9cb73dbb90e4784abf7c87320bae5153c7b90c64a60d0c3aa8bf1b7af07947445c90dee53d8b76420af7ea27dc7679e9)
---

---
|
---

Before he was America's Governor, Ron DeSantis had a long history with America's pastime. From competing in the Little League World Series, serving as captain of his college's varsity baseball team, to now going to bat for freedom in Florida - nothing gets past this hitter.

To celebrate America's pastime, we've released 100 Special Edition Refractor Autographed Governor DeSantis Baseball Cards. They're going quickly! __**[Secure yours now before they're gone! >>>](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=422e204e613e214ab6af4410b8c190951b2a588e6fbc2febda8cbcfabf37ab31b20af4a666ef1ab6f87990b9aa1aed44f4b200cee4304552 "Secure yours now before they’re gone! >>>")**__

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=422e204e613e214a2fd27865bfbae09abd15b747b1de59a41156b0a6609bab078daf845adca6b21ecfd98ceb70c04bede3edc873a2d3e329)
---

---
|
---

First Lady Casey DeSantis is mobilizing a million mamas on a mission to re-elect Governor DeSantis this November. Florida parents are fired up and ready to do what it takes to stand up for their children. Read more about the First Lady's recent talks with moms across the state here.

Support the movement and find out how to get involved by visiting __**[MamasforDeSantis.com](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=422e204e613e214a0012abd035254deb73bb169ee8772a0415dac27b88bd3c21becb6a311c9545f12bafa1e1e8afb2d6cf837fb59ed15e19 "MamasforDeSantis.com")**__

---
|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Brian=20Dahle?=
subject: RE: water
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Dahle for Governor 2022
body:
|
---
| |
---
| ,
I – as I’m sure are you – am completely outraged that (yet again) Gavin Newsom is putting every resident on water rations!

Just four years ago we had one of the wettest years on record in CA history, yet he did nothing to keep the water for future years of inevitable drought and instead sent it on to the ocean.

Maybe Newsom doesn’t realize water can actually be stored?

We need to commit to finishing reservoir projects and actually store water from rainy years - so that we have a surplus during a drought.

With proper management, there is no reason we should be told how often we can water our lawn or take a shower.

Agree?

[Sign my petition: Say you’ll support my policy to store more water in California and stop the need for water rationing in CA.](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=7609f656fc&e=f9133ea432)

---
| [SIGN HERE](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=0aa9ba28d5&e=f9133ea432 "SIGN HERE")
---
| Let me also remind you how important this is.

California has the world’s 5th largest economy.

We have a surplus budget of BILLIONS of dollars.

There’s no reason why we can’t revamp our water infrastructure in order to adequately supply a constant flow of water for your needs.

The government should not be telling you how many showers you can take.

It’s their fault you don’t have water to spare - not our natural weather patterns.

We are not going to sit quietly here.

This is exactly why I’m running for Governor - we will not become a 3rd world country here in CA.

California will no longer restrict your rights.

Not on my watch.

Do you agree?

[Sign my petition: Say you’ll support my policy to store more water in California and stop the need for water rationing in CA.](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=3cc42b1ffb&e=f9133ea432)
---

---
| Thank you for doing your part.

\- Senator Brian Dahle.
---

subject: Kyrsten Sinema got what she wanted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| Peter Willis,

Kyrsten Sinema, a Senator who took a paid internship at a billionaire hedge fund manager’s winery while in office, threw a tantrum over the possibility that hedge fund managers might have to pay just a tiny bit more taxes.

**According to her statement, she made a deal this week because Democratic leadership agreed not to close a tax loophole for her hedge fund donors.**

While she does the rounds on TV congratulating herself, don’t lose sight of what happened here.

She was willing to tank a plan to lower drug prices, invest in clean energy, and more — all because a few billionaires told her to.

Is that the best we can expect from our democracy?

We refuse to accept that as our fate.

[ Pitch in now to help Our Revolution elect progressives who care about Americans more than they do about lining their own pockets! If we keep electing corrupt corporate Dems like Sinema, we will never get real change. ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6207?t=8&akid=3236%2E5885482%2EO--YZC)

name: Tim Ryan
subject: no MAGA rallies here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4944%2E3611125%2EFza4aG ][IMG]

“While other candidates dream of arenas filled with screaming fans, Tim
Ryan asked to meet Monday with just a handful of teachers.” — The
Chronicle-Telegram

Some politicians only care about lining their pockets and pumping their
egos by hosting big campaign rallies with the most extreme of the
extremists.

Me? I’m more interested in connecting with folks on the issues that
matter. Like earlier this week, when I sat down with a group of teachers
in Lorain County and on Wednesday when I met with undecided voters who are
fed up with politics as usual.

That’s what our campaign is all about, folks—listening to
hardworking Ohioans and understanding how I could best serve them as our
next Senator.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18645?t=1015&amount=25&akid=4944%2E3611125%2EFza4aG ]So, if you’re ready for a leader who listens and not just another
politician who only cares about getting rich and famous, will you chip in
to help me defeat right-wing millionaire JD Vance and flip Ohio blue?

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Forgive me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Please forgive me.

|
---
| | | Friend,

Please forgive me. It’s Mike Pompeo and I’m reaching out because Marco Rubio is on track to miss his biggest deadline of the year. This would be DISASTROUS with only 3 months until the election, Friend.
_**Now, his ENTIRE budget is in jeopardy.
Political pundits will say he is even MORE vulnerable to losing to a Trump Impeachment manager.
And the whole country is ONE STEP closer to socialism.**_
If you don’t care about taking back the Senate, that’s fine. **But please don’t complain if the Democrats win this year and you didn’t step up.** Since Marco’s entire campaign is funded by donations of $5, $10, and $25, I am respectfully giving you ONE LAST CHANCE to try and help him reach his goal and put him back on track.

**[I know things are hard right now, but if Marco gets outraised by his opponent again, he will officially fall millions of dollars behind while his opponent is actively spending over $10 MILLION on ads as I type this. Please, I'm giving you another chance.](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e143bc451c8a4a4b8fc3632b0804cca5&_e=JcINSH1s4l7W9mACCr997zRhHtmHRFFfRKHKpbeg_wLRg2n1xYfUjUXnuggRDSZPEBpM_-D85W8V8ltJOYnB8wKdDK7AOoUX_17SZlRn18SnO9tL1KBGXdj92qRfO0kndlRekkjXc5lZOeRhb1pTtpzr1OzNKqdn1hr41iUiB6-0XBxdSDhH9PTtIO3vgbY4t60QaPB4A6g3mEtTUiHmwc13Sbczvc2lXk3iFA5VCjzmxSaWk85iUgyaKWdH8PFfPgYx-Ef4mlw5tRtpEgo596fVTASkwnbJaaFcyizhmWTNUL7GElQ46poDLNcUV7pv1LEvAmMvYY-5mxhgP05rVmfzdo6zMCKUa9DOrLS6_4WtYxjGx_fTkeT46YWi21kHbBdeyxaT7TZerWnnB7aPwkiXDuXDUmNwRmZbz15D_SxELKl4Gq_kvPEIjyqMV4e5W1zbulaF5-x5Asl_p-OcBg%3D%3D "I know things are hard right now, but if Marco gets outraised by his opponent again, he will officially fall millions of dollars behind while his opponent is actively spending over $10 MILLION on ads as I type this. clean_body: Please forgive me. | | | | Friend, Please forgive me. It’s Mike Pompeo and I’m reaching out because Marco Rubio is on track to miss his biggest deadline of the year. This would be DISASTROUS with only 3 months until the election, Friend. Now, his ENTIRE budget is in jeopardy. Political pundits will say he is even MORE vulnerable to losing to a Trump Impeachment manager. And the whole country is ONE STEP closer to socialism. If you don’t care about taking back the Senate, that’s fine. But please don’t complain if the Democrats win this year and you didn’t step up. Since Marco’s entire campaign is funded by donations of $5, $10, and $25, I am respectfully giving you ONE LAST CHANCE to try and help him reach his goal and put him back on track. "I know things are hard right now, but if Marco gets outraised by his opponent again, he will officially fall millions of dollars behind while his opponent is actively spending over $10 MILLION on ads as I type this. Please, I'm giving you another chance." | | | "HELP MARCO HERE >>>" Thank you for taking advantage of this opportunity, Mike Pompeo | | | "HELP MARCO HERE >>>" | | | | | | "Footer Graphic 1" I talk to folks every day who say they haven’t donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn’t close. Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we’re only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads. With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference. "Please, can you give $4, $8, $12.55, or $17 today?"** | | | "DONATE NOW >>" | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate PO Box 530650 Miami, FL 33153 Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Haley Stevens
subject: i'm a nerd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48915449/360073448/-1653583832?refcode=ste_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDEyYzFiZi03YTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xt1dArocYeM53QbZWl2jQxTXjmJm1DmBnJOKjg_ej1E=)

| | Folks – I’ll be honest with you: **I’m a bit of a policy nerd.** I’m not in Congress to get TV interviews or see my name trending on Twitter. I’m in Congress to uplift Oakland County in any way I can. One of my proudest accomplishments is recovering over _$100 million_ in federal funds for MI-11 residents and businesses. Now, I know making sure people receive the benefits they’re entitled to probably won’t get me a primetime interview on _CNN_ , _but this stuff matters._ These funds come from my casework program that helps everyday people with issues before the federal government – like veterans trying to untangle bureaucracy, people whose disability checks got lost, or small businesses seeking assistance with COVID-19 relief paperwork. These are real conversations and real work I have done for the people of Oakland County. Being a Congressperson is more than just interviews or notoriety. **It’s about showing up and getting the job done.** For four years, I’ve been getting the work done for MI-11 in any way I can, and with your help, I’ll keep fighting for this district for another term. [I’m in Congress to put the residents of MI-11 first, not the special interests. clean_body: | = | | Folks – I’ll be honest with you: I’m a bit of a policy nerd. I’m not in Congress to get TV interviews or see my name trending on Twitter. I’m in Congress to uplift Oakland County in any way I can. One of my proudest accomplishments is recovering over $100 million in federal funds for MI-11 residents and businesses. Now, I know making sure people receive the benefits they’re entitled to probably won’t get me a primetime interview on CNN , but this stuff matters. These funds come from my casework program that helps everyday people with issues before the federal government – like veterans trying to untangle bureaucracy, people whose disability checks got lost, or small businesses seeking assistance with COVID-19 relief paperwork. These are real conversations and real work I have done for the people of Oakland County. Being a Congressperson is more than just interviews or notoriety. It’s about showing up and getting the job done. For four years, I’ve been getting the work done for MI-11 in any way I can, and with your help, I’ll keep fighting for this district for another term. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your support.
