clean_body: “The 2022 midterms may actually be the most important elections of our lifetime.” | I like to think we’re pretty solution-oriented at the NDRC, friend. We see a problem? We work to find a solution. After Republicans manipulated the maps to gain unearned majorities in 2011, A.G. Holder and the NDRC team launched a multi-year, multi-pronged campaign to prevent them from doing it again. Now, as we see unprecedented attacks on our democracy from the GOP... | = ... we've come up with a comprehensive plan to stop them in their tracks. It involves helping to elect Democrats this year who will help block any attempts to undermine fair elections. Will you chip in to help us do this and so much more? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | = = | = = | = Here’s the deal: We’ve identified dozens of key races in 17 target states where our investment can make a huge difference. If we invest in these races, we can help elevate Democracy Defenders to positions of oversight and thwart the GOP’s plans for minority rule. But it’s a big if, friend, and it depends on our fundraising. I know we ask you for a lot, but Joy Reid of MSNBC has it right: "The 2022 midterms may actually be the most important elections of our lifetime." = Thank you! Ben = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60951007:6jYWEpV7N:m:1:3317145305:90347F307EBF07D2F3C07B54745D323B:r "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")**

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

November might feel far away while we are in the midst of summer, but these next couple of months are going to _fly by._
Winning our primary was a major victory. But make no mistake: A lot will happen between now and Election Day. **We need to be prepared for it all – and that preparation can't happen without your support.[Can you chip in $5 right now to power Trudy's campaign and elect a senator who will be the 51st vote to protect abortion access, voting rights, and more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48915855/360075028/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk210-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMThjNmU3NC03YjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EeKrhGndumItN2yv4zgbXlAS3pOdus-VsIpo21bE810=)**

In his book, Ben Carson tackles the issue of race in America and uses his experiences growing up in the toughest parts of Detroit to help us chart a better course.

While the Radical Left continues to use race to divide and tear us apart, we know there's a better way forward that can unite our country and bring us together.

This debate is so critical to America's future, and that is why every Conservative should read his new book.

_**[Claim your signed copy of Ben Carson's new book Created Equal HERE >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6vdei1tf8dng870gvnpf3gnd1t1dpds5vrt5o5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3ieaoj6cph2bs "Claim your signed copy of Ben Carson’s new book Created Equal HERE")**_

Elisa

name: Giffords.org
subject: Jason Kander
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Jason Kander has been a friend to the Giffords organization for a number of years.
#

Friends -
Jason Kander has been a friend to the Giffords organization for a number of years.
When he ran for Senate in Missouri in 2016, he showed that the issue of gun safety could be a potent one for Democrats even in what is considered a “red state” by many.
What few knew during that race, however, was that Jason was battling PTSD after his service in Afghanistan.
Shortly after that campaign, while heading toward a runaway victory in the Kansas City Mayor’s race, Jason was forced to drop out after being overtaken by depression and suicidal thoughts.
Thankfully, he sought help.
Jason wrote a book about it. It’s called “Invisible Storm.” It’s an account of his struggle and his courage to take it head-on. It’s a hopeful book. And when he asked if we’d help promote it, we agreed.
[**Use this link to learn more and buy a copy of Jason Kander’s new book, “Invisible Storm.” You’ll be glad you did.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/20004?t=1&akid=2288%2E3935704%2ES6VLGQ)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/20004?t=2&akid=2288%2E3935704%2ES6VLGQ)
**[BUY THE BOOK](https://go.giffords.org/go/20004?t=3&akid=2288%2E3935704%2ES6VLGQ)**
Thank you,
The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2288%2E3935704%2ES6VLGQ) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Joe Calvello, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: TheSopranos.gif
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I wanted to make sure you caught this.
#
Hey Derek, it’s Joe, John Fetterman’s Director of Communications.
I wanted to make sure you caught this...
The team recently found an old clip of ultra-millionaire Dr. Oz saying “it's very hard to discern significant differences in happiness in someone who's making $50,000 and $50 million."
**How out of touch from reality do you have to be to literally say something like that???**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220807-1?refcode=em20220807-6763&refcode2=6763_434096_FKLmqO&akid=6763%2E434096%2EFKLmqO)
_There’s a Sopranos quote for every situation 🤌_
Clearly Oz does not give a sh*t about the working people of Pennsylvania + doesn't have a clue what people are going through.
**[_So we’ve gotta beat him. Could you please make a donation right now to help us keep up with Dr. Oz’s self-funding campaign? With less than four months until the general election, we need youse guys to chip in whenever you can._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220807-1?refcode=em20220807-6763&refcode2=6763_434096_FKLmqO&akid=6763%2E434096%2EFKLmqO)**
**[Contribute »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220807-1?refcode=em20220807-6763&refcode2=6763_434096_FKLmqO&akid=6763%2E434096%2EFKLmqO)**
__
Want some more proof Dr. Oz is completely + utterly out of touch?
💰 He owns 11 houses, including 5 mansions. (At least one of them has a basketball court + private movie theater in the basement!!!)
💰 He brags about wearing custom-made Turkish suits (I don’t think John even knows where his one suit is from.)
💰 This photo....
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220807-1?refcode=em20220807-6763&refcode2=6763_434096_FKLmqO&akid=6763%2E434096%2EFKLmqO)
Yeah, **news flash to Dr. Oz:** Just because you and your rich friends are doing so well doesn't mean the rest of us are.
This guy has zero understanding of what day-to-day life looks like for the working people of PA who are struggling to pay bills + afford groceries.
And he wants to write the laws for us?? Fuggedaboutit.
**Let’s send Dr. Oz packing back to his New Jersey mega-mansion. You in?**
**[_Please consider chipping in $5 or whatever you can, cuz unlike Dr. Oz, we’re actually relying on small-dollar donations to win this race._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220807-1?refcode=em20220807-6763&refcode2=6763_434096_FKLmqO&akid=6763%2E434096%2EFKLmqO)**
Thanks for reading.
More soon,
Joe
Joe Calvello
Director of Communications
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220807-6763-footer&t=1&refcode2=6763_434096_FKLmqO&akid=6763%2E434096%2EFKLmqO)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=6763%2E434096%2EFKLmqO)

name: Dick
subject: Fwd: new survey for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend, I wanted to quickly follow up to make sure you got the chance to share your thoughts in the survey I sent around (see below).
---
With the GOP primary fast approaching and less than 100 days to go before Election Day, our campaign is energized and on task. **But in this pivotal final stretch when I need all hands on deck, I 'm still waiting for another 17 grassroots members of this team to share their input before my strategy meeting tomorrow.**
Hearing directly from top supporters like you is essential to building a winning campaign strategy that will protect the Senate for Democrats and deliver progress for the American people. **[So please, before midnight tonight, will you take our new August Priorities Survey (only takes about 45 seconds) to shape our strategy in the crucial weeks ahead?](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-august-prio-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1229-su-nd)**
Thanks so much for taking the time. Your input will be a big help. **
Dick **
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Sat, Aug 6, 2022
Subject: New survey for you

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=lLbmYZJowg2yRy%2B5jXu6T3eEL3PabGvO&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Our nation is approaching a critical turning point - and the fates of _millions_ all depend on whether we take decisive action right now. Just look at what's at stake:
* Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are threatening to institute a _nationwide_ ban on abortions if they take back the Senate in November - all made possible by the Supreme Court's egregious decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and strip millions of women of their reproductive freedom.
* Justice Clarence Thomas signaled that the precedents protecting contraception and same-sex marriage could be in jeopardy next.
* Formerly "once-in-a-lifetime" climate-related disasters are happening with almost weekly frequency, but the fate of historic climate protecting legislation hangs in the balance in this Senate, with its 50-50 split.

The facts are clear: We _must_ do everything we can to protect and expand our control of the Senate and stop the GOP's extremist agenda - or millions of Americans will be in danger of losing their most fundamental personal rights. **That 's why, as Election Day closes in on us, my campaign is ramping up its efforts to protect this seat - and your direct feedback is critical to improving my strategy. **
**[So Friend, I have to ask: Will you please take a moment to share your top priorities and concerns with me? My team just put together this quick survey, and I'm counting on 38 more grassroots supporters to respond before midnight. ](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-august-prio-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1229-su-nd)**
The Supreme Court's latest term was awful for progress, but it wasn't random. For decades now, the GOP has been gearing up to restrict the rights of women, block our attempts to stop the gun violence epidemic, and limit our ability to fight climate change - and they've finally built the Supreme Court of their dreams.
But there are signs of hope. This week, voters in Kansas - traditionally a politically conservative state - voted overwhelmingly to reject an amendment that would have removed the right to a safe and legal abortion from their state constitution.**
Friend, this much is clear: The GOP's far-right, extremist agenda is not representative of the majority of Americans' priorities - but if we don't do everything we can to maintain and strengthen current control of the Senate, we may be powerless to stop them. That's why I'm committed to doing everything in my power to keep this seat blue, but first I need your support to help me build the best possible strategy.**
**[Please, will you share your feedback on our newest strategy now? We just added a number of campaign strategy meetings to our calendar for next week, and I wanted to give this powerful grassroots team a chance to be centered in our work.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-august-prio-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1229-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=uAiLDeMUcUqVhG8rgFi0IneEL3PabGvO&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

Beat Blake Masters. Re-elect Mark. It will only happen if we all do our part.

He wants to flip this seat by spending millions of dollars smearing Mark’s name over the next few months. He will buy ads on TV, radio, billboards, and all over the internet to blanket Arizona with misinformation about Mark.

subject: Rick Scott + Ted Budd + Dr. Oz + Herschel Walker + JD Vance
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Here’s what the Senate would look like under Republican control:
#

We just got word that Senate Republicans are hosting a MASSIVE fundraiser to bankroll our opponent’s campaign, defeat us and take back the majority.
They’re charging $50,000 a plate to assemble these guys in Nantucket:
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-aug22.dwKUnu&refcode=em220807-1-ma&t=1&akid=1405%2E357359%2EeSWiBk)
Yep, Rick Scott, J.D. Vance, Dr. Oz, and Herschel Walker all together. And our opponent is joining them because he shares their extreme far-right agenda:
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-aug22.dwKUnu&refcode=em220807-1-ma&t=2&akid=1405%2E357359%2EeSWiBk)
The money that they’re raising is going to be used to flood North Carolina with desperate ads to try to hold this seat.
Our opponent is raking in cash from corporate special interests and the ultra-wealthy at events like this. But Cheri isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money, and instead, we’re counting on people like you pitching in whatever you can. So please:
[**Make a $3 donation to our campaign to ensure we have the resources to compete with the corporate money flowing into our opponent’s campaign. This fundraiser is just a preview of what the Senate could look like if we don’t fight back.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-aug22.dwKUnu&refcode=em220807-1-ma&t=3&akid=1405%2E357359%2EeSWiBk)

name: Team Olikara
subject: A huge endorsement for the campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
https://www.stevenolikara.com [https://www.stevenolikara.com]
Last year, the Hon. Paul Higginbotham, a retired Judge of the Wisconsin Court of Appeals, and the first African American to serve on the court, endorsed our campaign.
And this week, he wrote an incredible op-ed in The Capital Times about why he endorsed Steven and why he is still excited to support our campaign.
Please read the full op-ed here [https://captimes.com/opinion/guest-columns/opinion-i-endorsed-olikara-when-he-announced-and-i-still-do/article_64196dcb-7a90-53c3-97a9-57bea11050a5.html] and consider sharing it with your friends, family, or posting on social media. Here are some highlights from the article.
“I believe it is very important to have a serious primary where voters feel a genuine opportunity to make their voices heard and choose their candidates for the November elections. Olikara is the only one who can offer that and much more.”
“He demonstrated that he is most prepared to go toe to toe with Ron Johnson this fall.”
"Anyone who meets Olikara quickly sees that his sense of mission moves him and those around him to do what's right — not what's politically expedient. We need more like him in Washington."
“Olikara would not just be a great senator. He would be the best among all of them.”
It's an honor to have Hon. Higginbotham's endorsement and support. We hope to have your help over these final few days.
Thank you!
Team Olikara
Want to help our campaign in the final days?
1. Remember to make a plan to VOTE. You can do that here: MyVote.wi.gov [http://myvote.wi.gov/]
2. Think of as many friends or family members that you can and ask them to vote for Steven and make sure they have a plan to vote.
3. Consider volunteering to text or call voters in these final days, even an hour helps! Sign up here: stevenolikara.com/volunteer [stevenolikara.com/volunteer]
Ready to shock the world on August 9th? Help get the word out about our campaign – $25 pays for a yard sign, $250 covers a neighborhood, and $2,500 gets us on TV [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamolikara?refcode=augemail3] .
Paid for by Olikara for Senate.
https://www.facebook.com/olikaraforsenate [https://www.facebook.com/olikaraforsenate] https://twitter.com/stevenolikara [https://twitter.com/stevenolikara] https://www.instagram.com/stevenolikara/ [https://www.instagram.com/stevenolikara/] https://www.tiktok.com/@stevenolikara [https://www.tiktok.com/@stevenolikara]
Olikara for Senate
P.O. Box 510216
Milwaukee, WI 53203
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Vm-mq4Gg5UqIJ2AlcfSDqw2?unsubscribedata=jZuIQaigvHCDIhL0YpNMmyuCWRTubavtDHawGxFTWbKQ904j9haYbpGsQG1Dz86ugBsYFSZVLVt0QOlRQXCbSR0fL2zXf08HKkUz9V5Vk0cu5MBpY0KleqnOCS%2Bx6sULKom85vL3lAaFdcZn1fsLUMjASLIEK25b7gPi3lkRjgXCJJQzi4MsrOA7qxDSe9%2F2HSy771FdwZ17H4AExaycMG%2FQ2SPN3U2C%2BXrk7wQGJ7doUuJlwHgfh%2BkgPyQFn8APtIxeGmQQE4Nz0I4iq2vNOOTmdInsfwm2hT9zoqDP89s%2Fb8gxdlETqvNVWH6s35zM90fKs%2FTbID9ghcmKqWyq%2BfEkKDDsJZy4x294SHnWoaP0klE330mDhD01Aqvw9D4QqUy48bVbQ422cgssUWf9o8QQbgzfCfotVihGKKSBdccwb2c%2FC4k6kzUTaEGM77IF .

Friend, you already know that Maggie won her last race by only 1,017 votes – one of the closest Senate races in history.

But did you know that those 1,017 votes helped save the Affordable Care Act in 2017, when Maggie cast a deciding vote to protect it?

body:
|
---
| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60950570:6f6SEpVUN:m:1:3253819041:DD4410296C13A12C5BE5F808B50DA8E2:r "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")**

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustaining Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60950570:6f6SEpVUN:m:1:3253819041:DD4410296C13A12C5BE5F808B50DA8E2:r "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2
consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away? ")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60950570:6f6SEpVUN:m:1:3253819041:DD4410296C13A12C5BE5F808B50DA8E2:r "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60950570:6f6SEpVUN:m:1:3253819041:DD4410296C13A12C5BE5F808B50DA8E2:r "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60950570:6f6SEpVUN:m:1:3253819041:DD4410296C13A12C5BE5F808B50DA8E2:r "Renew before
it’s too late >>>")**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---
| |
* * *

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**"WARNOCK HAS A THREE-POINT LEAD OVER WALKER."**
Fellow Conservative,

**A new poll from Georgia's largest newspaper shows that Senator Warnock holds a lead of 3 points over our campaign.**

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0274d16c263345b4863acf1e019d9624&_e=SRqpZFtWzr5kUNHlLOPWxoHKyPOVqwak5HkWRma6aoEQY0Iaa8Fspgsz7_dMQ5Su3sDeVCxgfmaarGiDeyomJR7tKMf0vcOx6CnsTDM5uGK-mO0lJP7zdHdY8CRyc63_7KkpAJOqlQU3lSP6ubFcaMzHRvVAEQdaXF6c3n_W_dXXOQSrljhGojHLel4KLtKJ3jURjWZ1RL8TQ4mRV9l1v9n8Oa9jb-gHXvyTBibHSRyjtX4ppyyDtA-BpsVqXtmUxnOTaSzbfEchEGlvJO31LCKH2LFpzBDz7SUdvPE2GWuv2-V5I2RV7qwIZSgShkXmaYP1tv8di_dRClhBIK_rvadCnZ5JDPjf3Ig7WlCIi7iaCx3HU-P4dg9SJjK9TsckfYd6d4N2iqhk1hIn7HY2jSQ52YDH3dWxaiR0iAeAr0nMs9A714rY6iGsEyDYhuglHs1j6OPJORdqLZPKY3dcxPo8DC7RxNiZBdMVcL-69zg%3D)
**The bad news:** We're 103 days from Election Day, and Georgia Democrats are hanging on to the lead in what forecasters are saying is "the race" to watch in the 2022 election cycle.

**The good news:** The poll is within the margin of error - meaning that this race is a statistical tie. Additionally, my opponent is below 50%, which is never good news for an incumbent. Despite Raphael Warnock and his dark money Washington allies spending $25 million so far to attack me on TV, radio, and online, Georgia voters still aren't sold on the idea of sending Senator Warnock back to DC for another six years.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0274d16c263345b4863acf1e019d9624&_e=SRqpZFtWzr5kUNHlLOPWxoHKyPOVqwak5HkWRma6aoEQY0Iaa8Fspgsz7_dMQ5Su3sDeVCxgfmaarGiDeyomJR7tKMf0vcOx6CnsTDM5uGK-mO0lJP7zdHdY8CRyc63_7KkpAJOqlQU3lSP6ubFcaMzHRvVAEQdaXF6c3n_W_dXXOQSrljhGojHLel4KLtKJ3jURjWZ1RL8TQ4mRV9l1v9n8Oa9jb-gHXvyTBibHSRyjtX4ppyyDtA-BpsVqXtmU5JSx6cMbai1iHGVNpOjIh3d7AUITu5Nm3yKyHy8nEyAG3Ue1tO-VBqzEAZrNIwL8qqf8IIfhZOHW6iTVfZwdcPllOb8REPQkdCp_XM-zTEha2L8tEeBtaCku3HlslhtcAdS9ZLTwGPfZdALmzVyXAs59uy76i_oL9go5ubnvBxCaVO5f4lNk6wkQ6v1-xY78FlScHjbFdx4v2-nNeeFnomSfkFYDsaK3_KmF1jlTDDs%3D)
**This email today is a call to action.** Republicans, including myself, are having an extremely difficult time raising the funds we need to be competitive in tight races across the country.

For that reason - and considering this new poll showing me trailing our opponent by 3 points, **[I'm asking you to be one of 103 supporters to chip in $10 before the top of the next hour.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0274d16c263345b4863acf1e019d9624&_e=SRqpZFtWzr5kUNHlLOPWxoHKyPOVqwak5HkWRma6aoEQY0Iaa8Fspgsz7_dMQ5Su3sDeVCxgfmaarGiDeyomJR7tKMf0vcOx6CnsTDM5uGK-mO0lJP7zdHdY8CRyc63_7KkpAJOqlQU3lSP6ubFcaMzHRvVAEQdaXF6c3n_W_dXXOQSrljhGojHLel4KLtKJ3jURjWZ1RL8TQ4mRV9l1v9n8Oa9jb-gHXvyTBibHSRyjtX4ppyyDtA-BpsVqXtmUwWcoo4NSovbgeNR3bo5oXtoiKIQ7usfUcvCtMh1iKGRen_XOClidgmx7hJ2lKtcVVxV3I80LM7BZT0W5E-UTG0YK1nwLGlUtxSZNaoy-I82L9lSKV4TlDqEqRcxqswMokJ4SwEATXxRaftWT4D_GsuVSczMhAo7UXK7_B_zZJAe7Go0IGLaRUTfNNnKraDswNnYRvm4sKTUtpSxBqeSW1ifJC0U9Jr9UlCipO3NPvms%3D)**

[** Chip in $10 Today -> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0274d16c263345b4863acf1e019d9624&_e=SRqpZFtWzr5kUNHlLOPWxoHKyPOVqwak5HkWRma6aoEQY0Iaa8Fspgsz7_dMQ5Su3sDeVCxgfmaarGiDeyomJR7tKMf0vcOx6CnsTDM5uGK-mO0lJP7zdHdY8CRyc63_7KkpAJOqlQU3lSP6ubFcaMzHRvVAEQdaXF6c3n_W_dXXOQSrljhGojHLel4KLtKJ3jURjWZ1RL8TQ4mRV9l1v9n8Oa9jb-gHXvyTBibHSRyjtX4ppyyDtA-BpsVqXtmUGZTv8pVngCJglh0zxIKUwVOjlyqO634MHHSVpwa-7LxfpO2B9deEuABh3fhGVoTrs4fZYV0Q3gkngRiUbnkvdzZoSEQV50OEfuAKDz7phX_ARSwBEQwxOtfXLqohzz3ZKHY-eSJVRkCLFZWemzYjenOm0e0jeKEviQxK8Xp-uxak-euWBAHp9W2mqGMbrtkyKjQ_Y5fq5Ul7RmWqRFu1FEi8jNFjFFuRu_A-xgQhvrg%3D)
I don't know how else to say this since it's been the case for much of the last year, _**[but if you're going to donate to any Republican running this cycle- I hope it's me.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0274d16c263345b4863acf1e019d9624&_e=SRqpZFtWzr5kUNHlLOPWxoHKyPOVqwak5HkWRma6aoEQY0Iaa8Fspgsz7_dMQ5Su3sDeVCxgfmaarGiDeyomJR7tKMf0vcOx6CnsTDM5uGK-mO0lJP7zdHdY8CRyc63_7KkpAJOqlQU3lSP6ubFcaMzHRvVAEQdaXF6c3n_W_dXXOQSrljhGojHLel4KLtKJ3jURjWZ1RL8TQ4mRV9l1v9n8Oa9jb-gHXvyTBibHSRyjtX4ppyyDtA-BpsVqXtmUV06PZPZO6Zl4htTJD5eGMPTkjgMfSxpvTSuqjMOtpDKuHjznvpnFOAvXT1ViLmAmgLsxwlxz8Gv18cpWfXHae4fIDqCPJfKf_C-3WjTWeX8K4lF65nXyhEU5G2bL_HftFs0P0bSh4OP0Z8cGU0sTz5nqqzOxfznpXAkaDx8cDdFBRa_kZlJB8-n4odbJJjvsafHjFLU7H7e7xfhil3zZAxZV7d0PGP9aqJyljs5HPVA%3D)**_ I'm running against the most successful fundraising senator in the country, so we need the most assistance.

_The New York Times_ reported on Republican and Democrat fundraising numbers a couple days ago, and one stat about online donations stood out:

| _**"The money gap is so pronounced that Senator Raphael Warnock of Georgia, an endangered Democrat incumbent, raised more online last quarter - $12.3 million - than the combined quarterly hauls of the Republican Senate nominees or presumptive nominees in seven key contests."**_
---

With only 103 days left until Election Day, there is literally no time to waste. I'm asking you to be one of 103 supporters to act RIGHT NOW.

We're already behind in the fundraising race for today. **[Will you donate something now to help us catch up?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0274d16c263345b4863acf1e019d9624&_e=SRqpZFtWzr5kUNHlLOPWxoHKyPOVqwak5HkWRma6aoEQY0Iaa8Fspgsz7_dMQ5Su3sDeVCxgfmaarGiDeyomJR7tKMf0vcOx6CnsTDM5uGK-mO0lJP7zdHdY8CRyc63_7KkpAJOqlQU3lSP6ubFcaMzHRvVAEQdaXF6c3n_W_dXXOQSrljhGojHLel4KLtKJ3jURjWZ1RL8TQ4mRV9l1v9n8Oa9jb-gHXvyTBibHSRyjtX4ppyyDtA-BpsVqXtmU5SvleT7DlFBsT92fy8B306yMv1EMQRrLWZaJwFHvMtMlCeUni0WV-35fDnJ0QSlFXmp2QJrQfRFjNXF3DRYIwRZQmsgHQ8gQDOo0k1iog-2vABbmucS3SWiiFD6KlWMfk2rZPYMQRdldk7vgDP7Ge40W4Gc2Rw2r2o1-AoxyWceKLHnAmEDUSqsJMt4QDrwSzmSteO7tpMQ058jnbdPpic66UTuZcjFVx0KFxM5Nhi0%3D)**

clean_body: “WARNOCK HAS A THREE-POINT LEAD OVER WALKER.” | "WARNOCK HAS A THREE-POINT LEAD OVER WALKER." Fellow Conservative, A new poll from Georgia's largest newspaper shows that Senator Warnock holds a lead of 3 points over our campaign. The bad news: We're 103 days from Election Day, and Georgia Democrats are hanging on to the lead in what forecasters are saying is "the race" to watch in the 2022 election cycle. The good news: The poll is within the margin of error - meaning that this race is a statistical tie. Additionally, my opponent is below 50%, which is never good news for an incumbent. Despite Raphael Warnock and his dark money Washington allies spending $25 million so far to attack me on TV, radio, and online, Georgia voters still aren't sold on the idea of sending Senator Warnock back to DC for another six years. This email today is a call to action. Republicans, including myself, are having an extremely difficult time raising the funds we need to be competitive in tight races across the country. For that reason - and considering this new poll showing me trailing our opponent by 3 points, I don't know how else to say this since it's been the case for much of the last year, I'm running against the most successful fundraising senator in the country, so we need the most assistance. The New York Times reported on Republican and Democrat fundraising numbers a couple days ago, and one stat about online donations stood out: | "The money gap is so pronounced that Senator Raphael Warnock of Georgia, an endangered Democrat incumbent, raised more online last quarter - $12.3 million - than the combined quarterly hauls of the Republican Senate nominees or presumptive nominees in seven key contests." With only 103 days left until Election Day, there is literally no time to waste. I'm asking you to be one of 103 supporters to act RIGHT NOW. We're already behind in the fundraising race for today. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48917134/360080720/-2057546413?refcode=20220807_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE1MDU2Ni04MzE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ny7Uy0G4PO11OhfSCbAiWcVGKDflwoAd68p69cwabQE=) This is not a drill. National Republicans are swooping in with a MASSIVE TV ad buy to try and buoy JD Vance’s floundering campaign. Can I count on you to rush a donation to our campaign and Serve America $25 ASAP? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48917136/360080722/2038802527?refcode=20220807_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE1MDU2Ni04MzE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ny7Uy0G4PO11OhfSCbAiWcVGKDflwoAd68p69cwabQE=) JD’s campaign is barely treading water, and we always knew national Republicans and billionaire-funded super PACs would try to buy this Senate seat with dark money and misleading ads. name: Tony Evers
subject: Derek, this is the time to get involved
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

The general election begins after Tuesday's
primary, and the stakes are so high.

If any of the extreme Republicans win, we will lose all the progress we've
made.

Wisconsin is the most important state electorally in the country, and
national Republicans will be going all out to try and beat me. That's why
now is the perfect time to get involved in this fight.

clean_body: Summer is traditionally the slowest fundraising season for campaigns. | = | | | | = Peter, I’m so sorry to bother you on the weekend, but I just checked our ActBlue and I saw an upsetting trend: our fundraising is slowing down – at the most critical time of the election cycle. = | = | = Summer is traditionally the slowest fundraising season for campaigns. Folks are away from their computers, spending time outside with friends and family – and they should be! But summer is also when we make crucial campaign budget decisions, so we need grassroots supporters like you to step up now. Please, Peter, I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important, but with abortion rights, infrastructure investments, and affordable health care on the line, we can’t afford to slow down. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Gratefully, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Team Abrams
subject: this race is going to be decided by the thinnest of margins
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek, in 2020 and
2021, victory in Georgia was decided by the thinnest of margins. And
elections analysts are all saying the same thing: it’s going to be just as
close in 2022.

But don’t just take it from us, check out this poll:

Stacey Abrams: 44%
Brian Kemp: 45%
(SurveyUSA July 21-24)

That’s why Stacey is building the most robust grassroots team in Georgia’s
history. We’re going to every corner of the state to lift up every voter
who Brian Kemp has left behind. And with less than 100 days until Election
Day, we can’t afford to slow down if we’re doing to defeat a dangerous
incumbent governor.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220807_B1_Polling_S1_T1_TA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=1341%2E1862389%2EeXxQO8 ]Can you help us keep the momentum going by donating $5
to this campaign? We have a path to victory in November, but it relies on
continued and sustained investments from committed
supporters like
you, Derek.
Please, chip in now >>

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220807_B1_Polling_S1_T1_TA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1007&akid=1341%2E1862389%2EeXxQO8 ]DONATE

As we travel across the state, it’s clear that Stacey’s positive vision
for One Georgia is connecting with voters, but with a race this close, we
can’t afford to slow down now.

Derek, the
fact that we’re in a dead heat with Kemp is proof that our grassroots team
has the momentum. But if we learned anything from 2020 and 2021, it’s that
Georgia elections can come down to the slightest margins — so we can’t
stop fighting for every last vote.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220807_B1_Polling_S1_T1_TA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1008&akid=1341%2E1862389%2EeXxQO8 ]Can we count on you to donate $5 now? With less than 100
days until Election Day, we’re relying on grassroots
supporters to keep
our momentum going. With your help, we can defeat Brian Kemp, win this
race and get to work for the people of Georgia.

Thank you for all you do,

Team Abrams

name: Katie Hill
subject: Our most helpful to-do list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/UxbLy8Zpl36teanodvQB4TWT5ESSZADbf6E_9o1daJM=/2vyWMjBHl__n03nC1gT6yu_adngYPVZQ0NVJ1SQmR-A=)
---
Seriously.
When _Roe v. Wade_ was officially overturned by the Supreme Court, it was really hard to know how to fight back -- and how to make a real impact.
So here at HER Time HQ, we started with the basics: making a list. And thus,** **[**HER Time 's Guide to a Post-Roe World**](https://act.myngp.com/el/UxbLy8Zpl36teanodvQB4TWT5ESSZADbf6E_9o1daJM=/BpPErhSpDaXz3u4ir67OgrJg8Cs-Y6Cmbq1ktYQ2hCY=) was created!
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/UxbLy8Zpl36teanodvQB4TWT5ESSZADbf6E_9o1daJM=/e-2RWOZAXDQjPQxCyGVJb6M-n_1DU_YpIidPXfpUuLg=)
---
**We want this to be a go-to guide for EVERYONE. From those seeking out-of-state abortions to those seeking to take action against archaic new laws. **It includes the best way to seek an abortion depending on where you are in your pregnancy (and the US). It also has a clear guide for how to take political action -- including three different petitions you can sign urging governmental action.
**[We want to make sure we get as many eyes as possible on this guide -- so we can fight back and SAVE LIVES. Will you help us spread the word by donating a little now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/UxbLy8Zpl36teanodvQB4TWT5ESSZADbf6E_9o1daJM=/D-unPB6Rcwj7lb1iGIXmsiQ2hEu0nuUOUOuabhCo2Hw=?refcode=X_080722_AbortionRightsGuide)**
More to come,
-- _Katie_

* * *
In 2018, Katie Hill beat the odds and flipped CA-25 blue for the first time in over two decades. Her message of systemic change resonated with voters, and though she's no longer in Congress, she's still fighting to make a difference. **After stepping down from her seat, Katie founded HER Time to help elect candidates like her: women who are overlooked and underestimated.** **You can help HER Time **[**support Democratic women up and down the ballot by donating now**](https://act.myngp.com/el/UxbLy8Zpl36teanodvQB4TWT5ESSZADbf6E_9o1daJM=/ef8mTmHe3tIL_K_-RrokAIWNrCjHw74aKSyC_SKqOtE=?refcode=footer)**, and **[**learn more about our mission here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/UxbLy8Zpl36teanodvQB4TWT5ESSZADbf6E_9o1daJM=/2vyWMjBHl__n03nC1gT6yu_adngYPVZQ0NVJ1SQmR-A=)**.** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:
Support police and their families | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mattbirk.com/burger-2?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Join us tonight at Jameson's Irish Bar tonight and help support families of our law enforcement officers. Tim Walz and Peggy Flanagan want to talk about ANYTHING except the lawlessness they've allowed. **Scott Jensen and I will support the work our police do.**

After far-left activists pressured restaurants to cancel the "Matt Birk" Burger, we're bringing it back tonight at 6 PM! Join us, eat good food, and help us raise money for _Backing the Blue Line_ \- which supports police and their families!
**Swing on by and let's have a good time! It's for a good cause!**
_**Here are the details:**

Date:_ Sunday, August 7th
_Time:_ 6 PM - 8 PM
_Location:_ Jameson's Irish Bar
_Address:_ 886 Smith Ave S, West St Paul, MN 55118

**Click[ this link](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=2d178335d6&e=33b11688c1) or the graphic below to let us know you're coming:**
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c0331c678e&e=33b11688c1)
---
|
[Hope to see you there!](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=af62b9d34b&e=33b11688c1) If you can't make it, no worries. We have plenty of events coming up!

In Freedom,

Matt Birk
Republican Candidate for Lt. Governor
Dr. Scott Jensen's Running Mate

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Prioritizing Big Pharma’s profits over lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48917693/360083147/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDNhYTMxYy04YTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uJs01-mgZ4DmriaajwaD2_s0aZVDw9R0yX_yqeKZ5kE=&emci=0f2c50f4-8416-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1d3aa31c-8a16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9818364)
---

| | I know most folks don't spend their Sunday mornings tracking the slow and arcane voting process on the Senate floor, so I wanted to give you a quick update about how it's going. The Senate went through an hours long process to pass Democrats' historic _Inflation Reduction Act_ to tackle the climate crisis and lower prescription drug costs. But just a few hours ago, Senate Republicans voted to remove a monthly $35 out-of-pocket cap on insulin for Americans on private insurance. Yes, you read that right. **Senate Republicans are now on the record in favor of expensive insulin.** Insulin is a life-saving medication for millions of Americans, but too often, is priced out of reach for patients. That's unacceptable and exactly what Democrats are fighting to change. Lowering the cost of insulin should be a nonpartisan no-brainer. **I'm still in disbelief that Senate Republicans could be this blatant about prioritizing Big Pharma's profits over saving lives, but their cruelty knows no bounds.** When it comes to slashing taxes for their donor buddies or corporations, Senate Republicans move mountains to get it done. But when it comes to helping Americans afford the cost of life-saving medicines, they're working overtime to block common-sense reforms. Lowering drug costs for Americans is a matter of life and death, and I won't rest until we get it done. More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | Peter, being Deb’s campaign manager has truly been a privilege. I want to share a quick reflection on our work over the last 9 months, but first, [I wouldn’t be a campaign manager if I didn’t ask you to chip in to keep us going strong!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48911430/360056480/-174114498?amount=5&refcode=ea.1486a7fc-6916-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.1486a7fc-6916-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDg2YTdmYy02OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jhjXy4iS0VeVO2zULBqZo36-aJhuehWGu_dJXA3pEc=)

I’ve gotten to know our WI-03 community, to hear about the issues that matter to our neighbors, and to work with Deb on her plans and solutions.

Through it all, I’ve been 100% certain that Deb will be the BEST possible representative for the people of western & central Wisconsin. She has the experience to solve tough problems, the skill to lead coalitions and bring people together, and the determination to deliver change that makes a real difference.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48911433/360056486/-174114498?amount=5&refcode=ea.1486a7fc-6916-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.1486a7fc-6916-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDg2YTdmYy02OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jhjXy4iS0VeVO2zULBqZo36-aJhuehWGu_dJXA3pEc=)
**I’m so proud of how far we’ve come, Peter, and it’s really all thanks to grassroots supporters like you.**

Now, with just two days before this primary election is over, I’m looking _forward_. I KNOW that we can bring home a win on Tuesday, and I KNOW we can defeat Derrick Van Orden and the GOP in November - as long as we still have you with us.

[We’re just $3,085 short of our $10,000 pre-primary goal, and I absolutely refuse to fall short now. If you’re ready to elect the FIRST woman to represent WI-03 in Congress, make your first donation before time runs out >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48911435/360056492/-174114498?amount=5&refcode=ea.1486a7fc-6916-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.1486a7fc-6916-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDg2YTdmYy02OTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jhjXy4iS0VeVO2zULBqZo36-aJhuehWGu_dJXA3pEc=)

clean_body: All thanks to you. | = | The WI-03 Primary is on Tuesday, August 9th! = Peter, being Deb’s campaign manager has truly been a privilege. I want to share a quick reflection on our work over the last 9 months, but first, = I’ve gotten to know our WI-03 community, to hear about the issues that matter to our neighbors, and to work with Deb on her plans and solutions. Through it all, I’ve been 100% certain that Deb will be the BEST possible representative for the people of western & central Wisconsin. She has the experience to solve tough problems, the skill to lead coalitions and bring people together, and the determination to deliver change that makes a real difference. = I’m so proud of how far we’ve come, Peter, and it’s really all thanks to grassroots supporters like you. Now, with just two days before this primary election is over, I’m looking forward. I KNOW that we can bring home a win on Tuesday, and I KNOW we can defeat Derrick Van Orden and the GOP in November - as long as we still have you with us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = I believe that we will win! Kayla Campaign Manager Deb McGrath for Congress | Deb Baldus McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. name: Team Welch
subject: “Peter has always been there for Vermont…”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Peter’s ready to serve each and every one of us on Day One:

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=766%2E61531%2Em2RDCJ)
Hi there,
One of the unique things about our campaign is that we're not just seeking endorsements from high-profile public figures and do-gooder organizations, but also from everyday Vermonters. And we're proud to say that we already have **over 1,300 grassroots endorsers so far!** Let's take a look:
**“Peter has always been there for Vermont. I remember his leadership in the Vermont Senate and have been grateful for how easy it has been to contact him in DC. Peter works hard on the very issues that matter to me.”** _–June, Jericho, VT_
**“Peter Welch is the best person to represent Vermont. He will carry the views of Vermonters into the Senate.”** _–Julie, Perkinsville, VT_
**“Peter has been a hard worker and a consistent voice for thoughtful and inclusive policies for many years. We are lucky that he has stepped into the senate race. He deserves our strong support.”** _–Tino, Montpelier, VT_
**“I've known Peter for over 40 years. As attorneys we were opponents. He was always honest, pragmatic, and reasonable—focusing on problem solving, just as he has done in Congress. I was eager to support his candidacy for the House and I am equally so as he seeks a seat in the Senate.”** _–Bob, Burlington, VT_
**“There can be no better qualified and experienced candidate for U. S. Senator than Peter Welch. He has spent his entire career listening to the needs of everyone, and working to achieve them.”** _–Susan, Norwich, VT_
**“I'm all in for Peter for Senate! I've known him (mostly from a distance) for many years. He's been a great supporter of Vermont agriculture and many of the other issues that are important to working Vermonters. Whenever I was in D.C., I told colleagues from other parts of the country that Vermont had the best congressional delegation—period. As our U.S. Senator, I believe that legacy will continue.”** _–Steve, Montpelier, VT_
The support of this team means the world to Peter. Quite simply, this campaign wouldn’t be possible without it. Peter got into this race to deliver progress on some of the most critical issues facing our communities—Medicare for All, lower prescription drug prices, a Green New Deal, and so much more.
**People power is how we’re going to keep building momentum and win this race.[ If you can, please chip in $5 or more to help take this movement all the way.](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3739?t=3&akid=766%2E61531%2Em2RDCJ)**
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---

---

---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3739?t=11&akid=766%2E61531%2Em2RDCJ)
---

---
Thanks so much for being on this team,
Team Welch

---

name: V. Demings (personal)
subject: I am determined to meet this moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
This may be my toughest challenge yet
| | |
---
Friend: Each and every day it is not lost on me that I'm in what will undoubtedly be the most expensive race for the U.S. Senate in 2022 – a race that could decide the Senate majority and will be anything but easy.
But I know a thing or two about persevering, and _winning_ , even when the odds are stacked against me.
I've overcome plenty of adversity in my life, friend. **There is nothing easy about growing up as a poor Black girl in the segregated South.** But my family's faith, and faith in opportunity, taught me perseverance. It was my family, particularly my mother's words of "never tire of doing good, Val," that pushed me to where I am today.
I carry the spirit of her words with me even still – as I reflect on my career of service to Floridians and my path to being a candidate for U.S. Senate.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918257/360087376/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3959-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBmMDM4My04YjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glc7cBdeg71HbcdB-B8Ab4SsP9YFEvAOSQSCOFpAIjg=)
**There was nothing easy about being a first-generation college graduate** – nor was it easy working my way up the ranks of the Orlando Police Department. For 27 years, I served when it wasn't exactly ordinary to see a woman on the force, let alone a Black woman. But I never tired, and eventually, I became the first woman to lead my department as chief of police.
And friend, I know firsthand there's nothing easy about winning elections in Florida. My first run for Congress was one of my toughest fights – but even in defeat I never tired, because I knew I could do good for my community. And it certainly wasn't easy to hold a lawless president – a habitual offender – to account. But I served as an impeachment manager, prosecuting Donald Trump in the Senate, because no one should be above the law.
My road to this moment was not easy. But I'm not sure that there’s anywhere except America where a little Black girl – the daughter of a maid and a janitor who grew up in the '60s South – could have a story so filled with opportunities like these. And I am determined to meet this moment, to win, to never tire of doing good, so that anyone can have a story of opportunity.
This may be my toughest challenge yet, which is why I'm urging you – every last person reading this email – to chip in whatever you can to ensure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and win in Florida: [**Please, will you give $5 or more to help me flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar you give increases our ability to compete and win this tough battleground race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918258/360087377/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3959-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBmMDM4My04YjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glc7cBdeg71HbcdB-B8Ab4SsP9YFEvAOSQSCOFpAIjg=)
With so much gratitude for all you do,

–Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918259/360087378/1417698435?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBmMDM4My04YjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glc7cBdeg71HbcdB-B8Ab4SsP9YFEvAOSQSCOFpAIjg=&emci=98c2001f-5013-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6b0f0383-8b16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

[Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918262/360087381/1731636184?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBmMDM4My04YjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glc7cBdeg71HbcdB-B8Ab4SsP9YFEvAOSQSCOFpAIjg=&emci=98c2001f-5013-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6b0f0383-8b16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) & [Terms of Service](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918263/360087382/43942087?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBmMDM4My04YjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glc7cBdeg71HbcdB-B8Ab4SsP9YFEvAOSQSCOFpAIjg=&emci=98c2001f-5013-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6b0f0383-8b16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100). I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider [making a donation today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918264/360087383/-890400302?recurring=0&refcode=jtk3959-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBmMDM4My04YjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glc7cBdeg71HbcdB-B8Ab4SsP9YFEvAOSQSCOFpAIjg=). You can also click here to [receive fewer emails](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918265/360087384/-144803992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBmMDM4My04YjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glc7cBdeg71HbcdB-B8Ab4SsP9YFEvAOSQSCOFpAIjg=&emci=98c2001f-5013-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6b0f0383-8b16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) or click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hmC0qfqgmEqyHNrEYyYQgg2?unsubscribedata=nXmgQYReHtXtyU%2FPcJ0rjfHWesStxqAyQ9hr%2B%2F71QRw3tNWG1nIUcTpn8xS5WEJR5A4leROzwowTOCC5JINNp3y%2FPyGueFxAvOxlJTVxXx2nXj3%2Bu%2BaIMxepcxJaGFJfnAp18XXDyjpXS6n%2FC6tHNqblr%2BCO1McsIXuGINRKkwooGPrIFAD8W2qizsJyUgPdvAxUVKI30PynCVaSEFGClVSlbN%2BjVMiQZmXsOcoHCcjVTpUXpaNla6QnzdwQz8YQ0pb%2Bl34dip0S%2BoYzs1AFMEBq6Lkhl98%2FX8XFWHXb6n4zOMlYAbWdIHG5G6SpWzOBhULDMse3HsAHSxW1evnGdR4d2sFqxFZttTk9TZdiQZrKfnEckAd%2FYtOXz34oGmJXRtq2mm7Oatap%2BAjmNSRJS5abSE8yURDBR5mylehvV%2FNipnebx50CeK3WgxyO27Mv).

This may be my toughest challenge yet, which is why I'm urging you – every last person reading this email – to chip in whatever you can to ensure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and win in Florida: = With so much gratitude for all you do, –Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. You can also click here to or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

name: Team Schmidt
subject: It’s time for a change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
This week, Derek and Katie officially became our Republican nominees for Governor and Lieutenant Governor. Team Schmidt is officially on the ballot...| | |
---
| | Friend,**

** This week, Derek and Katie officially became our Republican nominees for Governor and Lieutenant Governor. Team Schmidt is officially **on the ballot this November.** Your support and hard work to get us here are the reason we are able to say that, friend.

Kansans are fed up and **fired up.** We know that the last four years of Laura Kelly’s governorship has left us behind the rest of the nation. Under Kelly’s administration, big-government spending has skyrocketed, fewer Kansans are working, more Kansans are leaving our state, student achievement is falling behind, and our tax burden remains too high. Team Schmidt has a serious opportunity to **change course on all of these issues AND MORE, but WE NEED your help.** Friend, chip in anything you can**today** to help us keep pushing and WIN this November!
---
| | [**CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=55448af53b1048259a81ef8290447c3b&_e=dzCvlqjzTuq8eskmMBAoKNdDMqVvUvaXBbJfsu3AvCC14VbbAhCJU8kIeu1FnNFivKq8AArogUO-Q18uyaDAgy1gWh2Qf6hcSXE1w0yAfkYmHLua5eDT-6FLUHVJg31T0DDcaekTVvuz1Upswq5wdmB17TLdomUBWMgxxnlX5vFIj1b8g6EhN82H4Pfk8Zj3pm8QFIDEUxEKVO0NBbL2KxFhtQigxzNpr4yLcAU3XzY8LjxE9QytuoGViczBFEGmEARe60LRifKYZjA1o4SB0DBLMVebfIbXY-Bwdj3aeeqglb9xKt5iwvOQnVDpQq9Rb5fqXr7JtUMxDoBmEhoY5YEWfKt3sefHG1iePaFlyhGqSiQ_t1wMXWmB_8BxadXrxbZ7R02jUi52hx0bbi9T7_ub1Jkh4MR1i7LV46XfLNCXHGT8q1JPjluli1-4k5S9Rq7DqGCxH0a7qsyKbUUiGr9o6X-d85FvWK4sWXP9m_ZYxyWuWBFVxbw5DV_83ImDjHAB2kAOdZGPLcWAA25jwA%3D%3D)
---
Now that Derek Schmidt is our **official Republican nominee for Governor of Kansas,** we have just one objective remaining: **to win this election on Tuesday, November 8th!** Friend, this isn’t going to be easy. Laura Kelly and her allies have helped get a third party candidate spoiler on the ballot. She knows a majority of Kansans want a new governor, so she wants to split the vote.
Kelly’s team has been pulling in **millions** from her out-of-state supporters that will stop at **nothing to get another four years**. We are going to need **extra resources** to overcome all of the other candidates in this race and get the job done.
---
[**CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=55448af53b1048259a81ef8290447c3b&_e=dzCvlqjzTuq8eskmMBAoKNdDMqVvUvaXBbJfsu3AvCC14VbbAhCJU8kIeu1FnNFivKq8AArogUO-Q18uyaDAgy1gWh2Qf6hcSXE1w0yAfkYmHLua5eDT-6FLUHVJg31T0DDcaekTVvuz1Upswq5wdmB17TLdomUBWMgxxnlX5vFIj1b8g6EhN82H4Pfk8Zj3pm8QFIDEUxEKVO0NBbL2KxFhtQigxzNpr4yLcAU3XzY8LjxE9QytuoGViczBFEGmEARe60LRifKYZjA1o4SB0DBLMVebfIbXY-Bwdj3aeeqglb9xKt5iwvOQnVDpQq9RfI8qcPqbZHDpDaNNI0NwM3xHqC7NZZxTESiovTUz15RkOSqh6zgAhwwVj9CB8riALeEZc-741QjrRITTsEoESEejuVQf7oHL-Qbgk0OCbiY-pyyMymIxnTyPJJ1k8xqR-RKUL3KaZULhi1kU-lmq8G4ALbs5TKiFKoAo_ikURvp33DVX5pjKWnvSxKtIMlTO1OCZnIYY7uvQl2ovRDvMLA%3D%3D)
---
Kansans are ready for a change. Derek Schmidt and Katie Sawyer are working hard **every day to DELIVER the change we need.** **Make no mistake, friend:** your freedoms, your values, your taxes, your children’s education, and so much more are **on the ballot this November.** Derek Schmidt and Katie Sawyer are prepared to fight for you at every turn, and have just one fight left to win before they can do so.
[**Will you chip in anything you can, RIGHT NOW, to help them win that fight?**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=55448af53b1048259a81ef8290447c3b&_e=dzCvlqjzTuq8eskmMBAoKNdDMqVvUvaXBbJfsu3AvCC14VbbAhCJU8kIeu1FnNFivKq8AArogUO-Q18uyaDAgy1gWh2Qf6hcSXE1w0yAfkYmHLua5eDT-6FLUHVJg31T0DDcaekTVvuz1Upswq5wdmB17TLdomUBWMgxxnlX5vFIj1b8g6EhN82H4Pfk8Zj3pm8QFIDEUxEKVO0NBbL2KxFhtQigxzNpr4yLcAU3XzY8LjxE9QytuoGViczBFEGmEARe60LRifKYZjA1o4SB0DBLMVebfIbXY-Bwdj3aeeqglb9xKt5iwvOQnVDpQq9RTUet9LKUHVnzIHN9QE4hEPuCv3QwwPjWVZnNAvm1UQMxIejejhfmo9N8hpYp7tVGxw5pnptmAsK5xSKo7YUTtRj23HPMMZpkSRoTnNakTd_hSq_iAYPhAdJw7mTpInFFRDSuRgCVvlXWXr4SGLjbU9dq_dyDrNOKbcO7QqPbQ3lOrH__ViwNylD_XFmSXsowMqdhcoFvPFMAlDlVOQWNnQ%3D%3D)

[**CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=55448af53b1048259a81ef8290447c3b&_e=dzCvlqjzTuq8eskmMBAoKNdDMqVvUvaXBbJfsu3AvCC14VbbAhCJU8kIeu1FnNFivKq8AArogUO-Q18uyaDAgy1gWh2Qf6hcSXE1w0yAfkYmHLua5eDT-6FLUHVJg31T0DDcaekTVvuz1Upswq5wdmB17TLdomUBWMgxxnlX5vFIj1b8g6EhN82H4Pfk8Zj3pm8QFIDEUxEKVO0NBbL2KxFhtQigxzNpr4yLcAU3XzY8LjxE9QytuoGViczBFEGmEARe60LRifKYZjA1o4SB0DBLMVebfIbXY-Bwdj3aeeqglb9xKt5iwvOQnVDpQq9R8Jytyo-VHpfZDtBVuw01KQXqt4wBgcBDHsookEfmdIMc20haixG4ChD2xR2gIpOiPB6ttXD_j2NoSRYk2JdWvqWrM3d-lxLz2FloWo6RqCP90W11S7Fvcpbgq8QHR1sFNwVKHz-NmtCAxMAGlYe8qP8n3s67KX0OEk2bCr42MURGzGYClgW2K5YrU2gsPCoPMoSmQn1BjCD9oLU_g-o44g%3D%3D)

Your support helped us win this primary and will be **critical** as we focus on election day. We can’t wait to see what we accomplish together through the remainder of this race.
Thank you,
Team Schmidt

name: Rebecca Kleefisch
subject: It doesn’t have to be like this
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=999334537fb74ecfa8a7bd06c5892d20&_e=ymN6AB_QvyXnW_j5a3CdqxpfMhxAyguaRS1sD8svnqt8cfkQEP9bTRrLQiQ1Esm1t1RQRI1TWbNd7k6Mmf7QAPlifaacCm1nuKzeRbUUeRuCs6aaYeCfTdpBynkjszAmg0G4QKfZLqi5Ud-m3-5Wq4sI816HeDN4dbygM1eV_nSwH0uspNaYMLZVOJjwCuy4ZJHXW5R4_8wDzs6Ks7pJQYkSWJyi4fsbyyZj_ZzQMCsX-jlgDMqofFqA5R0xleHWkK4r_axZ0Di_7exCNIrwn-0ESUthLhzY7feTtedQ_ABxMKcE0nOisN3-IkNij8nnefv26CpJg-zXZuueqQZm1SWUkxMin34T9dvovaWxB5g3P2pBKgs9TnP87PiKGDUdM40QdCPP7oD0zWAq95ueigSxk0QU1El4T1fFL9H3ds8Tyq54V5O5Zuotr9OM9Jz3)
---
Friend,
---
I get that times are tough.** ** Being a middle-class mom isn’t easy in Biden’s America. Trust me, I know.** ** Every day is a struggle raising two kids when the economy is on the brink of collapse, and our communities are getting more dangerous by the day.** ** I think about it every time my daughters leave the house.** ** Life has taught me that actions beat words every time.** ** I know the only way to ensure a bright future for my daughters is to roll up my sleeves and do it myself.** ** [**That’s why I decided to get off the sidelines and run for governor of Wisconsin, and it’s why I’m asking you to join my campaign.**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=999334537fb74ecfa8a7bd06c5892d20&_e=ymN6AB_QvyXnW_j5a3CdqxpfMhxAyguaRS1sD8svnqt8cfkQEP9bTRrLQiQ1Esm1t1RQRI1TWbNd7k6Mmf7QAPlifaacCm1nuKzeRbUUeRuCs6aaYeCfTdpBynkjszAmg0G4QKfZLqi5Ud-m3-5Wq4sI816HeDN4dbygM1eV_nSwH0uspNaYMLZVOJjwCuy4ZJHXW5R4_8wDzs6Ks7pJQYkSWJyi4fsbyyZj_ZzQMCveUrmEuXkvaUs7IR7HUrKoor8ujX9_hSwygxzSmNQbLivPhzkzMHeuPLF8_AyPOxoDHpYSKYk0mERhr1TN74njMdSwqaAHwZVhNuNP1h4l1sL4GsQPGGrp4g5ZH_SDc-G6aIvO1lb_Vz69KpDzh7HWEVLDKI47ceM9z49Js2-g7_DzZ1u4VhbGkY8L1EEZbcn40sYpQaT453h3exHT63Gd)** ** As a two-term lieutenant governor and cancer survivor, I’m not intimidated by the Democrat Party’s massive political machine.** ** But I’ll be honest, fellow conservative, it would be a lot easier to defeat Biden’s hand-picked candidate if I had you on my side.** ** My Democrat opponent and out-of-state liberals are already spending BIG to tip the scales against me.
---
[**DEFEAT THE LEFT’S POLITICAL MACHINE**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=999334537fb74ecfa8a7bd06c5892d20&_e=ymN6AB_QvyXnW_j5a3CdqxpfMhxAyguaRS1sD8svnqt8cfkQEP9bTRrLQiQ1Esm1t1RQRI1TWbNd7k6Mmf7QAPlifaacCm1nuKzeRbUUeRuCs6aaYeCfTdpBynkjszAmg0G4QKfZLqi5Ud-m3-5Wq4sI816HeDN4dbygM1eV_nSwH0uspNaYMLZVOJjwCuy4ZJHXW5R4_8wDzs6Ks7pJQYkSWJyi4fsbyyZj_ZzQMCsYXwpZ6YkBDPfqWOLwrFachMaX9cW0MgJzV3XdXwA4apdsrefzfiA5S6eeebr2dsXpp6jBXHBxdcGP1MyYmn6HKlUh4NaLlH7crAb0_jWsQcoVQYh4KfJBpypgHyyVhceETHl5SLUxhHL66zPsRBrpe-qGlULTHaF3lAxlMX_eQIAsQ_rMHNgXaYEvNQ_VHgsZbCKO8NdeTs2Vcihu_9Xz)

clean_body: | | | Friend, I get that times are tough. Being a middle-class mom isn’t easy in Biden’s America. Trust me, I know. Every day is a struggle raising two kids when the economy is on the brink of collapse, and our communities are getting more dangerous by the day. I think about it every time my daughters leave the house. Life has taught me that actions beat words every time. I know the only way to ensure a bright future for my daughters is to roll up my sleeves and do it myself. As a two-term lieutenant governor and cancer survivor, I’m not intimidated by the Democrat Party’s massive political machine. But I’ll be honest, fellow conservative, it would be a lot easier to defeat Biden’s hand-picked candidate if I had you on my side. My Democrat opponent and out-of-state liberals are already spending BIG to tip the scales against me. I can’t afford to sit back and hope for a win when so much is at stake. Our children's safety and our country's future are on the line. Will you help me keep the red wave surging by joining my campaign at this crucial moment? subject: Some bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Take a look.
#
With Greg Abbott planning to spend over $100 million against Beto, we can’t afford even small slowdowns in our grassroots fundraising.
Which brings us to some bad news: Our fundraising was strong at the end of the month, but since then, we’ve had a massive slowdown. Here’s a screenshot from our fundraising data:

clean_body: If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Hello, Facebook took down some of Chuck Grassley’s ads against us – but not before they were seen by tens of thousands of people and targeted over one million: This is what we’re up against. Chuck Grassley was running ads so misleading that they’re being taken down – but they were still running for over a week. Come on, Facebook! I’m facing millions of dollars ads full of lies and twisted disinformation. Chuck Grassley has already started smearing me on TV and even attacking my military record. I’m a hard target to attack, but with Senate control at stake, they’ll make up and say anything. In order to fight back, we need to raise another $75,000 before our critical deadline at midnight, but right now we’re still $9,130 short with time running out. I’m not taking corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if I’m going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Your donation today will help me fight back against all of Chuck Grassley’s and the Super PACs’ lies. Thank you so much for your support. I salute you! Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Glenn Beck on RegionSmart
body:
Glenn Beck at CPAC In March of this year, the Mississippi Freedom Caucus became aware of a bill that passed the Mississippi Senate and was making its way through the House. The Chairman of the Wor | |
---

| | | Glenn Beck at CPAC |
---|---|---
| |
---
In March of this year, the Mississippi Freedom Caucus became aware of a bill that passed the Mississippi Senate and was making its way through the House. The Chairman of the Workforce Development committee had been tasked with the job of getting this bill through the process with as few objections as possible.
Once members of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus read through the bill, we knew it was something that had to be stopped. Even though all the mayors of cities in Desoto County had asked for this bill and all senators had signed onto the bill as authors, then chairman of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus, Steve Hopkins, described the bill as "the most heinous piece of legislation" he had seen since in the legislature.
The members of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus knew our only chance to defeat this bill and overpower the mayors, senators, and committee chairmen was by alerting the citizens of Mississippi through our network of emails, Facebook posts and radio programs, so they could wield their power and kill this horrible bill.
National radio host Glenn Beck became aware of this effort by the mayors to sign over power to a quasi-governmental entity and asked Steve Hopkins to come on his show[ [listen Here]](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/4eJCPBOQ6oq_47r1qx6Nyg) to explain what the bill was attempting to do.
Hopkins explained to Glenn that the bill would give a company called RegionSmart the power to issue bonds, assess fees (a politician's way to describe taxes) and take property through eminent domain. All of this would be done by a board consisting of unelected individuals who are insulated from all oversight by the citizens of Mississippi. This entity that had been granted governmental powers would not be subject to Mississippi's open meeting laws or open record laws and could not be audited by the state auditor.
Glenn Beck felt so strongly about how heinous this bill was and that this bill was such a danger to our state and nation that he discussed it this weekend at CPAC in his speech just before Donald Trump.
[](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/fNTY3rESY9Y4D26rdnd2-g)[**Click Here to Listen**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/fNTY3rESY9Y4D26rdnd2-g)to Glenn Beck at CPAC.
---
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is proud of our part in killing this horrible bill and are especially proud of the people of Mississippi who took a stand, sent thousands of emails and made countless phone calls that prompted the committee chairman to announce from the House floor that the bill was "dead, dead, dead".
You can be ready to Take Action the next time a politician tries to undermine your rights, by completing a simple form and submitting your email address. Also, please share this email with your friends and ask them to sign up for the Freedom Caucus Newsletter.

** **[**Sign Up Here**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/_oIJWte-0VfBDegWW0nl_Q)** **

Be Ready to Fight! Be Ready to Take Action!

|
* * *
| The Caucus is a political organization dedicated to promoting the ideals of individual rights, limited government and free enterprise within the state of Mississippi.
| Mississippi Freedom Caucus
530 George Street, Suite 200
Jackson, MS 39202
www.FreedomCaucus.ms
662-469-6242
info@freedomcaucus.ms
---|---

You are currently subscribed to a mailing list of Mississippi Freedom Caucus. If you wish to unsubscribe, please click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/VGRviJMLxNTBxsC1ch_vzw).

body:
Codifying same-sex marriage is too important to wait.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918695/360090253/-1741633287?refcode=em_eng_2022.08.07_b1_te_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGJmMGU0NS05MDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZOuP1AzXCP6Seax2IkoAWlBaWqeivDexFOVbdrX6qM=)
Peter,

**In the aftermath of the Supreme Court striking down the constitutional right to choose, the House of Representatives just passed legislation that would enshrine marriage equality into federal law.** Now this legislation is stuck in the Senate, awaiting further action. But Peter, codifying same-sex marriage is too important to wait.

[**Marriage equality is a fundamental human right – and our federal laws must reflect that. Peter, will you join Emilia in calling on the Senate to urgently codify the right to same-sex marriage?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918696/360090254/1964196613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGJmMGU0NS05MDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZOuP1AzXCP6Seax2IkoAWlBaWqeivDexFOVbdrX6qM=&emci=b21403e0-3914-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=54bf0e45-9016-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11703046)
| [**ADD MY NAME »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918697/360090255/1964196613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGJmMGU0NS05MDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZOuP1AzXCP6Seax2IkoAWlBaWqeivDexFOVbdrX6qM=&emci=b21403e0-3914-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=54bf0e45-9016-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11703046)
---

Let’s be clear: The House did pass marriage equality, but that was no thanks to House Republicans. In fact, 157 House Republicans – including Kevin McCarthy – tried to stand in the way.

**Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans have made it clear that they are not willing to stand up for our most fundamental rights – and instead will actively try to undermine them.**

Bottom line: The House majority has never been more important.

[**Here on Team Emilia, we believe love is love. Will you stand with Emilia and call on the Senate to urgently codify the right to same-sex marriage?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918698/360090256/1964196613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGJmMGU0NS05MDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZOuP1AzXCP6Seax2IkoAWlBaWqeivDexFOVbdrX6qM=&emci=b21403e0-3914-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=54bf0e45-9016-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11703046)
[**URGE THE SENATE TO PASS MARRIAGE EQUALITY »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918699/360090257/1964196613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGJmMGU0NS05MDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZOuP1AzXCP6Seax2IkoAWlBaWqeivDexFOVbdrX6qM=&emci=b21403e0-3914-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=54bf0e45-9016-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11703046)
---

In solidarity,

Team Emilia

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918700/360090258/-1741633287?refcode=em_eng_2022.08.07_b1_te_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGJmMGU0NS05MDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZOuP1AzXCP6Seax2IkoAWlBaWqeivDexFOVbdrX6qM=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918701/360090259/-1741633287?refcode=em_eng_2022.08.07_b1_te_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGJmMGU0NS05MDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dZOuP1AzXCP6Seax2IkoAWlBaWqeivDexFOVbdrX6qM=)
