name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk5l3cpb7ldrpcejiqetmnnjhcsttom4iu1ekps8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfccj3c6rrepb6eloj2o5l6iob8o71clhj4t72c1r7atdkcepb8pdkcjh72c9j63jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8omcsln6dh6fcljcoob1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdim9p70c5h6cp324no)
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo1qkch93tpf9gdl0vqg164qhe75nb77g5bhmebo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zao205ct4i7refjlq226ps3bcf9scdg9hhh7484g_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z47mmqgn6h9blgt54r6ff8vnlt64iaibep5o97fg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpe0ui8fv8v2vocifakcvkg5a04iqkvp6raqfgt0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhedl9vahpduc080mpr98c12q549osp9dlt5fd5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoanu9a1uk1euuf248jeh60vvqf0lm64oiilug1g_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcppaidt030g71uoill3s85unip0dolne7fhghj0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpghdbeao7s405rc9n9fl62op2hcibcqqr5sd898_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z59kt76aa804q4l57hpqgigrnv1ablji4d428sto_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuhpc8mj23vcqb1697rpefcaf6f5ma4ocufnktlo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6dhmgh5n5885arfe6srgkio1url3ijlnfjbg5d0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdm6a305qkvtg7p2eq21ov9a0jis1831u6tefmv0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrh18adtgmsvaqpoi8as9edio1r1m1g9qs7j4jfo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8oufj479bu4joefmfjsi8tqkhsdqmff665sitmg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z51278inv5f1csu9i5756aj8k976pppsjskjf4po_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi0tbftg900h3pvv52llp75dmbeadbhmn0ecua1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfi86le0lejh6hoc188h62kkfiqhieretkv6dn0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb4sjg62oj6chh2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

clean_body: I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. " If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

If John Fetterman continues to take the lead in the polls - Pennsylvania could turn BLUE. | I encourage you to ask yourself - next year, when you are paying even MORE money at the gas station, experiencing higher inflation, crime is skyrocketing, and the American dream is fading - Chip in now, so you won’t have to pay WAY more later... ** I need you - Pennsylvania needs you, God Bless, Dr. Mehmet Oz Dr. Mehmet Oz is a Trump-endorsed, America First Conservative running for U.S. Senate to reignite our divine spark, fight for freedom and return the power to you. to ensure that he has the support he needs to become Pennsylvania’s next Senator. Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate If you would like to donate by mail, Our mailing address is:** Doctor Oz For Senate PO Box 576 Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006

We did it, team: Senate Democrats just passed the _Inflation Reduction Act_! In addition to reducing prescription drug prices and making corporations pay their fair share, this legislation includes critical measures investing hundreds of billions of dollars for our climate. **It's a one-two punch for fighting inflation and the climate crisis.** Speaking of addressing the climate crisis, I’m proud to share that this bill includes a rebate program mirroring my _Zero-Emission Homes Act_. This program will support families as they electrify their homes and put money back in their pockets, too. **This is a big step — but it’s only the start of what we can do as a Senate majority to address the dueling inflation and climate crises. **Welcome to the Miyares Roundup!** ** Attorney General Miyares and our team had another busy week working hard for Virginians. ** **National Night Out** Attorney General Miyares supports our law enforcement officers and he will always #backtheblue. The Attorney General and his team celebrated National Night Out, a once-a-year event that brings the law enforcement community and the people they protect closer together. The event aims for police and communities to come together, promoting police-community partnerships and neighborhood camaraderie to keep our neighborhoods safe.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| | **Fighting Robo Calls**

Robo-calls and scammers no more! Attorney General Miyares is taking action to stop these annoying and criminal calls that violate Americans every day. The Attorney General announced that Virginia is joining a nationwide Anti-Robocall Litigation Task Force. The force’s purpose is to investigate and take legal action against the telecommunications companies responsible for bringing a majority of foreign robocalls into the United States.
---
| | **Virginia Association of Commonwealth's Attorneys Event** Attorney General Miyares also spoke at the VACA convention this week, welcoming them to his hometown of Virginia Beach – the “City of Heroes” and emphasizing the important role their positions play in keeping our communities safe.

clean_body: | | | Welcome to the Miyares Roundup! Attorney General Miyares and our team had another busy week working hard for Virginians. National Night Out Attorney General Miyares supports our law enforcement officers and he will always #backtheblue. The Attorney General and his team celebrated National Night Out, a once-a-year event that brings the law enforcement community and the people they protect closer together. The event aims for police and communities to come together, promoting police-community partnerships and neighborhood camaraderie to keep our neighborhoods safe. | | | | | | | Fighting Robo Calls Robo-calls and scammers no more! Attorney General Miyares is taking action to stop these annoying and criminal calls that violate Americans every day. The Attorney General announced that Virginia is joining a nationwide Anti-Robocall Litigation Task Force. The force’s purpose is to investigate and take legal action against the telecommunications companies responsible for bringing a majority of foreign robocalls into the United States. | | Virginia Association of Commonwealth's Attorneys Event Attorney General Miyares also spoke at the VACA convention this week, welcoming them to his hometown of Virginia Beach – the “City of Heroes” and emphasizing the important role their positions play in keeping our communities safe. | | | | | The Vince Coglianese Show AG Miyares made an appearance on Newstalk 105.9 to discuss the current legal issues in Virginia. | | Until next time,Team Miyares | | ---|--- | | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Miyares for Virginia | | PO Box 3193, Virginia Beach, VA 23454 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Charles Booker
subject: Rand Paul’s #1 priority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we can’t
afford six more years of Rand Paul.

This is Rand Paul’s top priority if he wins re-election this year: getting
his dangerous Life at Conception Act through the Senate.

The “Life at Conception Act” is the next step for dangerous anti-women
legislators – a total and unequivocal nationwide ban on abortion, without
exception for rape or incest. Peter,
this law is so extreme, 80 percent of the
country does not support it.

I wish this man cared as much about Kentuckians as he does about his
obsession with sending reproductive rights back decades.

While Rand is plotting his next anti-science, anti-women bill, the people
of the state he represents — my family — are suffering.

We are at the bottom of nearly every quality of life index. Our schools
are underfunded, hundreds of thousands of people haven’t had clean
drinking water in decades, and one in four people in Appalachia are living
in poverty.

I can promise you,
Peter, playing political games
isn’t going to be on the top of my mind if I get elected to the Senate.
The people of Kentucky are — and have always been — my top priority.

From ensuring that folks can afford their prescription drugs to creating
economic opportunities in communities that have been left behind. These
are the things that people care about. And that’s exactly what I’m going
to do when I get to the United States Senate.

We’re working to build a campaign that represents ALL of us, from the hood
to the holler. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220807.E7PMWG&refcode=em20220807-2325&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=2325%2E346206%2ErA9tEm ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can
right now to support our movement to replace Rand Paul?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220807.E7PMWG&refcode=em20220807-2325&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=2325%2E346206%2ErA9tEm ]Contribute $5

Rand Paul has voted down countless bills that would support workers and
families who have been hurt the most in this pandemic. And now instead of
focusing on ways to help Kentucky — he’s planning his next political show.

Enough is enough. I’m running to replace Rand Paul because the cost of
inaction is too high.

I’ve lived in poverty. I’ve been unhoused. I’ve lost family members to gun
violence. I am still paying off my student loans. And I know that when our
politicians ignore these struggles, our pain only continues.

Together, we have the power to change the future of Kentucky. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220807.E7PMWG&refcode=em20220807-2325&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=2325%2E346206%2ErA9tEm ]But this
kind of deep organizing work requires significant resources and funding.
Please chip in $5 or anything you can today so that we can
sustain this work to replace Rand Paul.

Together,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220807-2325-footer&t=1023&refcode2=2325_346206_rA9tEm&akid=2325%2E346206%2ErA9tEm

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2325%2E346206%2ErA9tEm

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office | | | [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=adf0cb66df5b4268a05da7a54869992d&_e=Tam1PqNYCoZJ3NWVjlz9mjmTwJQu2q8AKbrmyxxj5RwmrHnkRcVP71UsSbOwv_RV6yUDkGTxjNfCRhHZNz6CJNsXJTjg8OGgfJK6_ZBMl5dHexSWBawyE7U3cQda3ufV7dILASK7fq8SrQB38pRIofRw32S3h-RPja6e3RCFXz2fGk7c1TlqseOtSBwIi-TrjqWeHc2Lsqt6Vu-E07PFWwdWGqlLKzA6QQYdq4zGncQuROAv6xSOe8yo4H0-zey9cVjM2JYPxsNKyBWXME1iojAPujoBQaJnxE8lH5r9KxODTlRbhFKniRWjvVMnC-F2FSKE_ADSuJ2fXuGc9CmoRenwIuzaj3q6L1AsDdAS6zdGz-SDUF5HOM1L5sNUlcZdzYVe4CBae8MvLgt6YPoDLWjjLPjoOCyWYFUZodSWNgE7Ur70bwh4eqP35Almu3Lw)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=adf0cb66df5b4268a05da7a54869992d&_e=Tam1PqNYCoZJ3NWVjlz9mjmTwJQu2q8AKbrmyxxj5RwmrHnkRcVP71UsSbOwv_RV6yUDkGTxjNfCRhHZNz6CJNsXJTjg8OGgfJK6_ZBMl5dHexSWBawyE7U3cQda3ufV7dILASK7fq8SrQB38pRIofRw32S3h-RPja6e3RCFXz2fGk7c1TlqseOtSBwIi-TrjqWeHc2Lsqt6Vu-E07PFWwdWGqlLKzA6QQYdq4zGncQF2fvfUae_AOh6fs0SrAqYk8IkZyU7PL21qkLJCAIvNHHK8YVWeN8MEqG9bPmbLs0VLPMSTG50rxt1e4m0SoCI6-h0c04rGb8pJvM3Dwu-8vnX6rzFdzApZAFvsLb6T9AlOyVxYON3BLUFnqfA1QZnlVM8_yA6X7JVWhj9m7A2L5U321a40BpkHArM2JAcJLiM8DDyvQ_cDoYK9OEMvfx-) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=adf0cb66df5b4268a05da7a54869992d&_e=Tam1PqNYCoZJ3NWVjlz9mjmTwJQu2q8AKbrmyxxj5RwmrHnkRcVP71UsSbOwv_RV6yUDkGTxjNfCRhHZNz6CJNsXJTjg8OGgfJK6_ZBMl5dHexSWBawyE7U3cQda3ufV7dILASK7fq8SrQB38pRIofRw32S3h-RPja6e3RCFXz2fGk7c1TlqseOtSBwIi-TrjqWeHc2Lsqt6Vu-E07PFWwdWGqlLKzA6QQYdq4zGncTQaidFhL0vPn4aJoW_ikwIPABNqWrXvypc0MECszYWw3dlex_uTQFHBayuEtqstsOMVPOQOZyRzrm3PSeJBeDYdjORkeazykNk22n-PUWT80RE5tYG0CgbL8uEg_yA1U3y4mnO-SeyeOjqIf3Gfx9yh1DMmEvUm9o87LH0S3PfHr72x-kp60Q8F6aV-KDwRkAJGGdPBrRacBnYDmSyf9eW)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: You’ll want to read this
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsslQFEhUN

State of education

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osslQFEhUN

Hello,
Public
education today is failing our nation's young people-and their
parents.
As each
generation moves on from the public school system, more and more
Americans are growing unaware of our country's great history and
civic traditions.
But
unfortunately, civics and history are too often forgotten or
overlooked in the 21st century. That's why I am committed to
having conversations with thought leaders around the country and
providing educational resources for Americans.
But an
educated citizenry is essential to self-government-and the future
of freedom. That's why I've issued a challenge to patriots like
you to read-or re-read-the Declaration of Independence as part of
our More Perfect Union Project.
Because
this important historical document is so rich with wisdom and
eternal truths, I've asked my team at ACI to put together a
helpful guide that offers a clear and exclusive analysis of this
piece of history.
And I'm
emailing you today to make sure you get a free copy of this
latest eBook: Breaking Down the Declaration.

When you
read this book, you'll discover:

The
historical context surrounding the Declaration of Independence
and why our Founders drafted it
The 3
essential elements of the Declaration and what they meant for the
establishment of our nation
How
many of King George's original offenses are being repeated by our
own government today

You can
get your free copy using this secure link:
https://offers.americancornerstone.org/breaking-down-the-declaration/
And I
hope you'll share it with your family, friends, and anyone you
know in our younger generations.
If we're
going stop history from repeating itself, it is critical that we
educate as many people as possible.
I really
hope you enjoy this book.
Please
use this link to get instant access right now:
https://offers.americancornerstone.org/breaking-down-the-declaration/

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
American
Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: The Inflation Reduction Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
It passed without a single Republican vote | | |
---
Folks, Today, the Senate passed the _Inflation Reduction Act_ —a major victory that will lower costs for Granite Staters and Americans. This bill is the largest investment in our country’s history to fight climate change. It allows Medicare to negotiate prescription drug costs, lowering health care costs. It strengthens our economy by taking on corporate special interests and supporting small businesses. **And it passed without a single Republican vote.** The _Inflation Reduction Act_ is one of the most important pieces of legislation we’ve passed in decades. It would not have been possible without supporters like you stepping up, getting involved, and electing a Democratic Senate majority. One vote made the difference to pass this bill. And you can bet that Mitch McConnell is doing whatever it takes to take back control and erase all our progress. Our work has never been more important. **And that’s why I’m reaching out to ask you for your help.** **[Please, can you chip in $5 or more today to protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48919157/360092592/-1829049351?refcode=mh-fr-20220807&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjQxYjk5NS05NDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BOc93LAnJ6hNch3spP3li3vK_xq0yQ291hghic4Mh9s=)** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48919158/360092593/-1829049351?refcode=mh-fr-20220807&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjQxYjk5NS05NDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BOc93LAnJ6hNch3spP3li3vK_xq0yQ291hghic4Mh9s=)

Dominic RapiniEndorsed Republican Candidate for Secretary of the State

subject: new poll in OH
body:
Derek,
A brand-new poll JUST released shows our campaign beating right-wing millionaire GOP extremist JD Vance by 2 points!
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220805_CGVA_Ryan [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220805_CGVA_Ryan]
If we win Ohio, we’ll expand our Democratic Senate majority and cut workers in on the deal. That’s why we’re launching an EMERGENCY $50,000 GOAL before midnight tonight.
Will you rush a $25 donation split between my campaign and CommonGood to make sure we hold on to our slim, 2-point lead, { {FirstName or "friend"}} ?
Look, no one thought we could pull this off. Everyone said Ohio is ruby red and we shouldn't bother trying to flip this open Senate seat blue. But poll after poll has our race against JD Vance in a “virtual deadlock.” Boom.
That’s why national Republicans and Silicon Valley billionaires are spending $80 million to buy this Senate seat—they think they can buy one of the closest races on the map.
So far, our grassroots movement is holding off the loads of dark money propping up JD’s campaign. But we can’t afford even one slip-up if we’re going to keep this 2-point lead.
That’s why I’m coming to you right now to send in a donation, split between my campaign and CommonGood. Will you chip in toward our EMERGENCY $50,000 goal before midnight to keep up our momentum? Friend, When you take a look at who's been funding Kevin McCarthy over the years, it starts to make sense why he continues to put corporate and radical special interests ahead of the people of the Central Valley: **❌ Big Oil:** Ever wonder why Kevin McCarthy was so quick to blame inflation and Democrats for rising oil prices? The proof is in the paycheck: oil companies have given McCarthy's campaign a whopping $55,000 in the last year to ensure he'll advocate for _them_ in Congress instead of his own constituents who are paying the price at the pump. **❌ Big Tobacco:** Kevin McCarthy and Big Tobacco's relationship is pretty simple: they give him thousands of dollars (over $30K _this year alone_), and he does their bidding in Congress. Back when Juul's and other flavored e-cigs first hit the market, **McCarthy was part of the committee that limited the FDA's ability to protect our nation's children from these products when they first hit store shelves.** **❌ Big Pharma:** If you were hoping for the cost of your prescription drugs to go down under McCarthy's leadership, think again. The more money pharmaceutical companies make, the more they donate to Kevin McCarthy's campaign war chest -- so you can bet he'll be doing their bidding in Congress instead of yours. **These special interest groups have a HUGE stake in keeping Kevin McCarthy in Congress in 2022. I'm depending on individual donors to flip this seat, so defeating him depends on your grassroots support:** [**Will you chip in $5 to help us keep pace with Kevin McCarthy's dark money machine? To support Marisa Wood's campaign,= We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . = Friend, When you take a look at who's been funding Kevin McCarthy over the years, it starts to make sense why he continues to put corporate and radical special interests ahead of the people of the Central Valley: ❌ Big Oil: Ever wonder why Kevin McCarthy was so quick to blame inflation and Democrats for rising oil prices? The proof is in the paycheck: oil companies have given McCarthy's campaign a whopping $55,000 in the last year to ensure he'll advocate for them in Congress instead of his own constituents who are paying the price at the pump. ❌ Big Tobacco: Kevin McCarthy and Big Tobacco's relationship is pretty simple: they give him thousands of dollars (over $30K this year alone), and he does their bidding in Congress. Back when Juul's and other flavored e-cigs first hit the market, McCarthy was part of the committee that limited the FDA's ability to protect our nation's children from these products when they first hit store shelves. ❌ Big Pharma: If you were hoping for the cost of your prescription drugs to go down under McCarthy's leadership, think again. The more money pharmaceutical companies make, the more they donate to Kevin McCarthy's campaign war chest -- so you can bet he'll be doing their bidding in Congress instead of yours. name: Josh Harder
subject: A look inside our program
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| | Hey Peter, To echo what Camille wrote yesterday, our Latino organizing program is one of my favorite parts of our campaign, and one of the most critical to our success. Our goal is to raise $10,000 this weekend to continue these organizing efforts, and with just a few hours left to go, we've raised $7,293! We're so close, but the deadline is at midnight. [**I know that if everyone reading this chips in just a few dollars, we 'll meet our goal and then some. Can I count on you to lend your support with a donation right now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/iucCxeqhOxzx9dRJESaZfFNtLymi9ojRKdD5-f1Oiuc=?refcode=E17501-20220807-LatinoOrganizing2-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/iucCxeqhOxzx9dRJESaZfFNtLymi9ojRKdD5-f1Oiuc=?refcode=E17501-20220807-LatinoOrganizing2-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)** [CHIP IN](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/iucCxeqhOxzx9dRJESaZfFNtLymi9ojRKdD5-f1Oiuc=?refcode=E17501-20220807-LatinoOrganizing2-SB-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) While we're doing the hard work of connecting and listening to our Latino communities, the GOP is doing just the opposite by carrying out their targeted Spanish-language misinformation campaign. **That 's why it's especially important right now to make sure we're well-funded to reach out to families in all corners of our district.** [**Peter, if you are able, I could really use your help to get us over the finish line this weekend! Can you please rush in a donation right now to help us close out our goal and fully fund our Latino organizing program?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/iucCxeqhOxzx9dRJESaZfFNtLymi9ojRKdD5-f1Oiuc=?refcode=E17501-20220807-LatinoOrganizing2-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) Thanks,
Josh

_\----FORWARDED MESSAGE----_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/iucCxeqhOxzx9dRJESaZfFNtLymi9ojRKdD5-f1Oiuc=?refcode=E17501-20220807-LatinoOrganizing2-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) Hey Peter, As we're nearing election day, I want to talk a little bit about a core part of our campaign that's incredibly personal to me - our Latino organizing program. **And in a moment, I 'll ask for your support in keeping this key program funded - but if you want to skip ahead and chip in now, you can do so here:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Aug2022-FR-LatinoOrganizing**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/iucCxeqhOxzx9dRJESaZfFNtLymi9ojRKdD5-f1Oiuc=?refcode=E17501-20220807-LatinoOrganizing2-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) Peter, I'm in this fight for my family. I was born and raised between Florida and Puerto Rico, where I was taught to put community first. In key races like this one, where over 35% of our neighbors identify as Latino, it's a strategic imperative that we connect authentically with our voters. From Day 1, my top priority as Campaign Manager has been to make sure our team reflects our community. That's why over 50% of our team identify as Latino. It's also why we invested the earliest we ever have in a full-scale Latino organizing program. And thanks to your support, we've now brought on an additional 3 organizers to keep the momentum growing! From phone banks and relational organizing, to attending churches and community events, our campaign has strived to be _a part_ of the Latino community, and not just take Latino voters for granted - or even worse, only talk to them the final week of the election. We're deeply invested in making sure every voter in our community understands what's at stake this election, and why Josh is the best candidate to help our families. **What makes this outreach to the Latino community even more critical is that the GOP continues to escalate how they target Latinos with misinformation.** Instead of seeing the diversity of our communities as a strength, they see it as something to exploit: they're carrying out a coordinated and extremely well-funded campaign to spread Spanish-language misinformation and conspiracy theories on social media, messaging apps, and even AM radio shows. _And these efforts have real consequences._ In order to fight back against the GOP's misinformation campaign and have enough resources to keep this critical outreach going, we need your support. My goal is to raise $10,000 this weekend so we can keep funding this vital program that means so much to us. $10,000 may seem like a lot, but I know we can do it! [_**Will you help us reach our goal by chipping in any amount right now?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/iucCxeqhOxzx9dRJESaZfFNtLymi9ojRKdD5-f1Oiuc=?refcode=E17501-20220807-LatinoOrganizing2-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/iucCxeqhOxzx9dRJESaZfFNtLymi9ojRKdD5-f1Oiuc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E17501-20220807-LatinoOrganizing2-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**
---
| **[$22](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/iucCxeqhOxzx9dRJESaZfFNtLymi9ojRKdD5-f1Oiuc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E17501-20220807-LatinoOrganizing2-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)**
---
| **[$50](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/iucCxeqhOxzx9dRJESaZfFNtLymi9ojRKdD5-f1Oiuc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E17501-20220807-LatinoOrganizing2-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=50)**
---
| **[$100](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/iucCxeqhOxzx9dRJESaZfFNtLymi9ojRKdD5-f1Oiuc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E17501-20220807-LatinoOrganizing2-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=100)**
---
| **[$250](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/iucCxeqhOxzx9dRJESaZfFNtLymi9ojRKdD5-f1Oiuc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E17501-20220807-LatinoOrganizing2-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=250)**
---
| **[Other](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/iucCxeqhOxzx9dRJESaZfFNtLymi9ojRKdD5-f1Oiuc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E17501-20220807-LatinoOrganizing2-EG-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA)**
---
Thank you for reading!
Camille Torres
Campaign Manager
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/wZFCHEMUV05vM92O3foAjr17TQO33soAZ0NERmhjLzo=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/MmfrxBbdgPV8SN9-J-5lOfcFU5O1owZdZCfETUaqJS4=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-9 is one of our country's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/QU_AYhvi5Tz1TxoR4uY0MrckaKvmAM34hB0TQwhYjRI=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/fVxWLyPEr_M9cRd-VRhTIAhWdtRmzd6ErHfsrJaPLog=/8LWFvzuW12mnt1TAiKMzodeOvnRdF1P02h90YLy8lJo=) here.

In key races like this one, where over 35% of our neighbors identify as Latino, it's a strategic imperative that we connect authentically with our voters. From Day 1, my top priority as Campaign Manager has been to make sure our team reflects our community. That's why over 50% of our team identify as Latino. It's also why we invested the earliest we ever have in a full-scale Latino organizing program. And thanks to your support, we've now brought on an additional 3 organizers to keep the momentum growing! From phone banks and relational organizing, to attending churches and community events, our campaign has strived to be a part of the Latino community, and not just take Latino voters for granted - or even worse, only talk to them the final week of the election. We're deeply invested in making sure every voter in our community understands what's at stake this election, and why Josh is the best candidate to help our families. What makes this outreach to the Latino community even more critical is that the GOP continues to escalate how they target Latinos with misinformation. Instead of seeing the diversity of our communities as a strength, they see it as something to exploit: they're carrying out a coordinated and extremely well-funded campaign to spread Spanish-language misinformation and conspiracy theories on social media, messaging apps, and even AM radio shows. And these efforts have real consequences. In order to fight back against the GOP's misinformation campaign and have enough resources to keep this critical outreach going, we need your support. My goal is to raise $10,000 this weekend so we can keep funding this vital program that means so much to us. $10,000 may seem like a lot, but I know we can do it! If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for reading! Camille Torres Campaign Manager * = =

| | Hey Peter! It might feel early, but today is the perfect time to check your voter registration. Why now? Because Republicans like Buddy Carter continue to do everything they can to make it harder for you to cast your ballot. They continue to spread lies about voter fraud and push voter restrictions that will disproportionately impact communities of color, seniors, and students. **We can’t let them win. If you want to be a part of making a difference this November, there are two things you should do today:** 1\. No matter which state you’re in, [**make sure you're registered to vote at your current address at www.iwillvote.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48919463/360094447/-1612268846?state=GA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjliM2UyZS05YTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W8UZBGkd29JqNpiCIR_HwXG1QF1GwkNcwcOhobT6zEs=&emci=3d90bc17-9216-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=969b3e2e-9a16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=23694845) 2\. Forward this email to three friends and make sure they're registered too! In Georgia, the final deadline to register to vote or update your registration for the general election this November is October 11th – but don’t wait! In 2016, millions of Americans missed their chance to vote because they missed a registration deadline, didn't update their registration, or didn't know how to register. If they had checked their registration earlier, our country & the Supreme Court might look different today. You have a voice & a vote, and we're asking you to use it. [**Take a minute now to check or update your registration so your vote can count in this year's critical election.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48919464/360094448/-1612268846?state=GA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjliM2UyZS05YTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W8UZBGkd29JqNpiCIR_HwXG1QF1GwkNcwcOhobT6zEs=&emci=3d90bc17-9216-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=969b3e2e-9a16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=23694845) Thanks for helping us make history, The Wade Brigade

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48914904/360071081/1135070380?amount=3&refcode=UD_20220807_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlZDE3MWEzLTc4MTYtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EpDRLVb9ViwMQXHx6rSoA8UIYR-sjA7-PFF3yIi9Gbk=) Peter —

It’s official: We have our Republican opponent in Arizona. Here’s what that means for our race:

Experts all over the country agree: Arizona is going to be one of the closest races in the country this year. And now that the stage is set for November, all eyes are on us.

And with more attention comes more money. Our opponent is backed by an out-of-state billionaire in the Silicon Valley, and his Super PAC can spend virtually unlimited sums of money on this race — whatever it takes to defeat us. National Republicans, corporate special interests, and dark money groups are ready to spend millions of dollars on attack ads.

To top it all off, my opponent has the full support and endorsement of Donald Trump. So we can expect more rallies and attacks from the former president aimed at amping up his base. All the strength Trump can drum up is on its way.

I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails from me recently, but we can’t start the general election off on the wrong foot. And right now, we’re falling behind our fundraising goals.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeremy=20Munson?=
subject: See You In Rochester Tonight!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
body:
Meet me for the Patriots meeting in Rochester tonight! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremymunson/breaking-i-am-running-for-congress-in-minnesotas-1st-district-9054225?e=f4c2e54596)
---
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=f646eda829&e=f4c2e54596)
Peter,It is the Grassroots vs Corporate Super PACs. While my opponent has taken hundreds of thousands from lobbyists and special interest groups, making the rounds with large donors, we have been on the phones and at the doors talking with people just like you.Tonight, I will be at the Rochester Eagles Club for the Southeast MN Patriots Meeting alongside my friends Ken Navitsky, Wendy Phillips, and Rochester Mayor candidate Brit Noser. Doors open at 5:30. I hope to see you there!
**Munson Honored with LEA Award for Constitutional Voting Record**[The Legislative Evaluation Assembly of MN](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=b2c41dda60&e=f4c2e54596) has published the list of the most constitutional conservative, pro-liberty, pro-freedom legislators in St Paul. Spoiler alert: the list is short. I am honored to have top honors for the fifth year in a row – making that 5 of 5 years I voted to support the taxpayer and not special interest groups.
LEA bases its evaluation on our declared American founding principles of self-evident truths and inalienable rights. These principles provide a basis for a constitutionally limited government established to sustain life, liberty, justice, property rights and free enterprise.The LEA isn’t the only organization that knows conservatives when they see them.Right now, great conservatives are speaking at the ACU’s CPAC event in Texas. They have rated me as [one of the highest scoring conservatives](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=fb078abacb&e=f4c2e54596) in the country year after year for my work to protect liberty and the taxpayer, and **in this economy, we need someone looking out for the taxpayer.**
**It’s Time to Cut Spending to Get us out of this Recession** Today Democrats are pushing through the “Inflation Reduction Act” (also known as $700 Billion in NEW taxes) as I write this. **In the middle of a recession, we need hard votes to cut spending** and help the taxpayer who is being crushed by inflation. Every step of the way in St Paul, I voted to _cut_ spending and help you keep your hard earned money. Finstad on the other hand, authored the bill spending over _$500 Million_ in taxpayer money to fund the Twins Stadium and then increased his taxpayer-funded budget by 60% while at the USDA Rural Development (including hand-outs for wind farms and solar developers).**There is a massive amount of wasteful spending in Washington. We need to send someone who will cut it, not add to it.** Please make a few calls today and tomorrow to friends, neighbors, and family members who live in the district and can cast a ballot for Munson on Monday at their [county election office](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=d1cf96fff8&e=f4c2e54596) or Tuesday at their [local polling station](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=cce9132970&e=f4c2e54596). We win this race by making calls and making the ask of our friends. Corporate PACs and special interest money is working against us. Now is the time to take a stand!
Jeremy Munson
Candidate for Congress
Personal cell: (507) 200-8448
|
---
| [Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
---
| | | | [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=e8503ebdaa&e=f4c2e54596)| [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=7b790dd0d3&e=f4c2e54596)| [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=aabd3fad04&e=f4c2e54596)

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Pramila wants to hear your thoughts on this big piece of legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Democrats in the House and Senate are working to pass the Inflation Reduction Act, a bill to invest $369 billion in clean energy and fight climate change, empower Medicare to help lower prescription drug costs, and tax the rich and corporations.
Pramila, as Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, will play an integral role in passing this bill through the House. So, she wants to hear your thoughts on the major piece of legislation.
[**Can you take two minutes to share your progressive priorities with us? As always, it will help Pramila understand where her supporters stand on important issues.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/inflation-reduction-act-survey/?source=em20220807-1489&t=1&akid=1489%2E420207%2EPSYKRt)
**[Take the survey →](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/inflation-reduction-act-survey/?source=em20220807-1489&t=2&akid=1489%2E420207%2EPSYKRt)**
Thank you for sharing your thoughts and being a part of Pramila’s work.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220807-1489-footer&t=3&refcode2=1489_420207_PSYKRt&akid=1489%2E420207%2EPSYKRt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=4&akid=1489%2E420207%2EPSYKRt)

clean_body: Peter, Democrats in the House and Senate are working to pass the Inflation Reduction Act, a bill to invest $369 billion in clean energy and fight climate change, empower Medicare to help lower prescription drug costs, and tax the rich and corporations. Pramila, as Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, will play an integral role in passing this bill through the House. So, she wants to hear your thoughts on the major piece of legislation. Thank you for sharing your thoughts and being a part of Pramila’s work. In solidarity, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

clean_body: Take a look at Flood’s “one-party rule” in action. | = | | Friend, after only two weeks in Washington, Mike Flood has done nothing but try to score points with his party leaders in D.C. Just take a look at his abysmal congressional voting record to date: = = Nebraska, when our leaders show their true colors,believe them. The very “one-party rule” that Mike Flood railed against is the same one bankrolling his campaign while he votes to turn his back on you and me in Congress. His agenda is a carbon copy of our previous congressman’s dangerous plan to keep power out of the people’s hands and in the GOP’s back pocket — and our district has had enough. Our state needs a leader like Patty Pansing Brooks who can build consensus and actually get things done. Working with both Democrats and Republicans in the Nebraska Legislature, Patty has never let the letter behind someone’s name stand in the way of working toward real progress for the people of our communities — and her stance on protecting our fundamental human rights will never be for sale. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed instantly. | | = = | = = | = = Nebraskans, we can do better than Mike Flood. Do you remember Attorney General Bill Barr?
* The man who attacked mail-in voting prior to the 2020 election.
* The man who knew Trump’s claims of voter fraud were fake but did nothing about it.

Yeah, that’s him.
Barr and other high-ranking conservative officials are launching what they refer to as an “election integrity” organization. But we’ll let you in on a little secret: when they say “election integrity,” what they may as well say is **voter suppression.**

name: Strategy Memo (via Jen Jordan for AG)
subject: Inherent challenges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jen Jordan, Inc
body:
Here's the honest truth: for a long time, Democrats have not paid enough attention to down ballot races (such as Attorney General)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48919887/360096919/1460579386?refcode=EM_FR_220807WK_N_SM_FULL_9_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTUzYTIxMy05ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxJ-giF97_4RE8gWRzURKysFZB5qvo3iLkownO0xTAY=)
---
In a minute, we're going to ask you to make a $10 contribution to Jen's campaign. ([**If you don't need an explanation, you can donate here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48919888/360096920/1460579386?refcode=EM_FR_220807WK_N_SM_FULL_9_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTUzYTIxMy05ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxJ-giF97_4RE8gWRzURKysFZB5qvo3iLkownO0xTAY=) Otherwise, please read on!)

Let's start by being frank: for a long time, Democrats have not paid enough attention to down ballot races. And we've paid a price for that.

Republicans have managed to build up state legislative majorities and elect Attorneys General across the country who have worked to shape and enforce regressive laws. **In the wake of Roe v. Wade being overturned, we are seeing just how critical the long-term impact of state and local elections can be.**

Jen has always understood the importance of the down ballot. She first ran for the State Senate in 2017, flipping a Republican seat and ending the Georgia GOP's supermajority in the chamber. Now, she's running for Attorney General because the office will have a profound impact on Georgians' rights.

There are inherent challenges in running for down ballot offices like Attorney General. They don't often get the media coverage of Governor, Senate, or even House races. And because of that, many voters aren't fully aware of all the ways that an Attorney General can affect their lives.

**From the first day of this campaign, Jen has resolved to reach as many people as possible, and raise awareness of just how important the office of Attorney General is for protecting our rights and creating accountability.**

In recent weeks, it's clear that the rollback of abortion rights — and the possibility that marriage equality and access to contraception could be reversed next — is spurring folks to take a closer look at the officeholders who enforce state laws.

**This will be an Attorney General race like none other, and we're building a campaign that's equipped to handle the high-profile attention. But we can't do it alone.**

[**Please, can you make a donation of $10 or more? Grassroots support is essential for maintaining our field outreach and building up our ads budget for the next stretch of this election. And to stay on pace, we're aiming to raise another $4,749 this week.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48919889/360096921/1460579386?refcode=EM_FR_220807WK_N_SM_FULL_9_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTUzYTIxMy05ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxJ-giF97_4RE8gWRzURKysFZB5qvo3iLkownO0xTAY=) ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48919890/360096922/1460579386?refcode=EM_FR_220807WK_N_SM_FULL_9_NG_N_B1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTUzYTIxMy05ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxJ-giF97_4RE8gWRzURKysFZB5qvo3iLkownO0xTAY=)**** Thank you,

The team at Jen Jordan for AG | | | **Democratic State Senator Jen Jordan (pronounced Jer-Dun) has spent her legal career fighting for Georgians. Because of her real-life experience in the courtroom and out of it, Jen knows that now, more than ever, we need an Attorney General who will take a stand and fight for the rights of each and every Georgian.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48919891/360096923/1460579386?refcode=EM_FR_220807WK_N_SM_FULL_9_NG_N_BioBox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTUzYTIxMy05ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxJ-giF97_4RE8gWRzURKysFZB5qvo3iLkownO0xTAY=)****
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48919892/360096924/-737921463?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTUzYTIxMy05ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxJ-giF97_4RE8gWRzURKysFZB5qvo3iLkownO0xTAY=&emci=8f7dbc6d-8416-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=de53a213-9f16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=32707168) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48919893/360096925/1663983557?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTUzYTIxMy05ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxJ-giF97_4RE8gWRzURKysFZB5qvo3iLkownO0xTAY=&emci=8f7dbc6d-8416-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=de53a213-9f16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=32707168) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48919894/360096926/1489251599?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTUzYTIxMy05ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxJ-giF97_4RE8gWRzURKysFZB5qvo3iLkownO0xTAY=&emci=8f7dbc6d-8416-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=de53a213-9f16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=32707168)

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: URGENT SENATE UPDATE: Senate Takes Action to Build Better Future for All
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501161273%2501100611%2b-%2b08-07-2022%2beNewsletter%250115534.37418495.5867414.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501161273%2501100611%2b-%2b08-07-2022%2beNewsletter%250115534.37418495.5867414.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501)
---|---
| | | **August 7, 2022** |
---|---|---|---
| | | This afternoon, the United States Senate passed the Inflation Reduction Act. It took all night and much of today to break through Republican obstruction, disruption, and distraction, but my colleagues and I in the Democratic Senate majority stayed united and got this [bold, transformative legislation](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1556025532692791298&redir_log=511014523083374) done for the American people. Our bill is now off to the House of Representatives for a final vote - and I am confident that we will soon get it to the President's desk for signature. [This is a historic win for the American people](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1556359353535549443&redir_log=381489925862374). With today's passage of the Inflation Reduction Act, we're taking action to address [some of the biggest challenges our nation faces](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1555975922641244160&redir_log=606075966524373): [the worsening climate crisis](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1556135545733988352&redir_log=511014523083374), [sky-high prescription drug costs](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1556102295561162752&redir_log=288762219147373), [a tax code that unfairly puts corporations and the wealthy before working Americans](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1556111637693845504&redir_log=928469094165373), and [inflation](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1555682143409475586&redir_log=535045088052374). This bill will address each of these challenges head-on, while reducing our national debt and creating thousands of good-paying jobs. I was proud to author [two key provisions](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-secures-two-climate-provisions-in-newly-released-inflation-reduction-act-applauds-progress-on-combatting-climate-change-rising-costs&redir_log=869127390721384) that are included in this proposal: one will provide rebates to help Americans [make their homes more energy efficient](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-welch-introduce-bipartisan-bicameral-legislation-to-cut-energy-costs-for-homeowners-invest-in-clean-energy-jobs-and-technology&redir_log=035660466121339) so they can reduce their heating and cooling bills. The other provision creates a Greenhouse Gas Reduction Fund, which will provide resources that can be used to launch a [National Climate Bank](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fsenators-van-hollen-markey-and-rep-dingell-re-introduce-legislation-to-create-a-clean-energy-and-sustainability-accelerator&redir_log=112383926461239) to partner with the private sector and community-based lenders to make an array of investments in clean energy technologies and energy efficiency improvements. This will serve as a force multiplier for the development and deployment of clean energy, with a large focus on underserved communities. In addition, [the centerpiece of the health care provisions](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1556336496017346568&redir_log=517689834684374) in this bill marks the culmination of a years-long battle I've been leading with colleagues to give Medicare the power to negotiate lower drug prices. I've cosponsored legislation to do just that throughout my time in Congress, and I'm very proud to see such a provision included in the Inflation Reduction Act. America's seniors shouldn't have to worry about being able to afford the prescriptions they need - and this provision in our bill will ensure that older Americans are no[ longer forced into financial ruin because of prescription drug costs](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1555995874836217856&redir_log=546934482381375). We face a pivotal moment in our nation - from our fight against the climate emergency, to our battle to lower the costs of prescription drugs and other important needs, to our efforts to build an economy that invests in more prosperity and opportunity for all Americans. This transformative measure will help build a better future for our nation and our world. Chris Van Hollen
---
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.37418495.5867414.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)

name: Steven Olikara
subject: Russ Feingold
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
https://www.stevenolikara.com [https://www.stevenolikara.com]
Hi all,
The number one question you should ask before voting for any candidate is this: what are they prepared to lose their office over to do what’s right?
I believe there is a deficit of political courage in Congress.
One of the most inspiring things I saw in my formative years was seeing Russ Feingold cast the only vote in the Senate against the PATRIOT Act. His foresight that the measure would undermine our civil liberties proved to be true. We need to elect more people to the Senate who are called to a mission larger than themselves.
I’m prepared to lose my job in office to do what’s right because this campaign is not about me. It’s about you and what we can build together.
We need to rebuild political courage. That is why I am running. I want to represent you – not corporate interests or lobbyists.
But I can’t do it alone. I need each and every one of you to help us reach out to voters. To volunteer to call, canvas, or text voters sign up at: stevenolikara.com/volunteer [http://stevenolikara.com/volunteer?emci=b2f07393-6f16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
We only have two full days to outwork the political establishment and shock the world.
Are you in?
Thank you,
Steven
Want to help our campaign in the final days?
1. Remember to make a plan to VOTE. You can do that here: MyVote.wi.gov [http://myvote.wi.gov/]
2. Think of as many friends or family members that you can and ask them to vote for Steven and make sure they have a plan to vote.
3. Consider volunteering to text or call voters in these final days, even an hour helps! Sign up here: stevenolikara.com/volunteer [stevenolikara.com/volunteer]
Ready to shock the world on August 9th? Help get the word out about our campaign – $25 pays for a yard sign, $250 covers a neighborhood, and $2,500 gets us on TV [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamolikara?refcode=augemail3] .
Paid for by Olikara for Senate.
https://www.facebook.com/olikaraforsenate [https://www.facebook.com/olikaraforsenate] https://twitter.com/stevenolikara [https://twitter.com/stevenolikara] https://www.instagram.com/stevenolikara/ [https://www.instagram.com/stevenolikara/] https://www.tiktok.com/@stevenolikara [https://www.tiktok.com/@stevenolikara]
Olikara for Senate
P.O. Box 510216
Milwaukee, WI 53203
United States

name: Joe Goldberg via, EricForIllinois.com
subject: Kevin McCarthy just admitted it.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48916416/360077544/-1752180686?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNkNTQwMi03ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-J-pVFjH_vFWcrMg5UySAqtAEWKI1-m6qEkoWL4Clc=)
Peter, It's no secret that Eric's campaign to keep IL-17 blue will be a close, but we now have a clear idea at just how tight this race is expected to be. **According to 538, our race is *literally* the most competitive House race in the country._Seriously, Peter, we're on the top of the list._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48916417/360077545/-295409223?refcode=em-8.6.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNkNTQwMi03ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-J-pVFjH_vFWcrMg5UySAqtAEWKI1-m6qEkoWL4Clc=) **[We can’t leave anything up to chance. Can you chip in $5 to help our campaign pull ahead in this 50-50 race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48916418/360077546/-295409223?refcode=em-8.6.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNkNTQwMi03ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-J-pVFjH_vFWcrMg5UySAqtAEWKI1-m6qEkoWL4Clc=)** A few things happened this past week that we can't ignore: **First of all, GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy came out and said his chances of taking the gavel hinge on defeating us in November (his word, not ours). We also found out that his super PAC is doubling down on their pledge to spend nearly $3 million against us.** Here’s the truth: We don't need millions of dollars in special interests cash to win this race, but we do need to run _**our**_ race effectively. That means hitting our internal fundraising goals. We’ve done it every time and I’m not willing to let this be an exception that costs us on election day. [**If you’re ready to win this race and prevent the far-right takeover in Congress, consider chipping in a donation of any amount today. It’s only you and the rest of this grassroots team who can make sure we aren't outspent.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48916419/360077547/-295409223?refcode=em-8.6.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNkNTQwMi03ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-J-pVFjH_vFWcrMg5UySAqtAEWKI1-m6qEkoWL4Clc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48916420/360077548/-295409223?refcode=em-8.6.22-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNkNTQwMi03ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-J-pVFjH_vFWcrMg5UySAqtAEWKI1-m6qEkoWL4Clc=)

clean_body: | = Peter, It's no secret that Eric's campaign to keep IL-17 blue will be a close, but we now have a clear idea at just how tight this race is expected to be. According to 538, our race is literally the most competitive House race in the country.Seriously, Peter, we're on the top of the list. = = A few things happened this past week that we can't ignore: First of all, GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy came out and said his chances of taking the gavel hinge on defeating us in November (his word, not ours). We also found out that his super PAC is doubling down on their pledge to spend nearly $3 million against us. Here’s the truth: We don't need millions of dollars in special interests cash to win this race, but we do need to run our race effectively. That means hitting our internal fundraising goals.
