name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA), who works about half the year, is complaining because he has to go in to work. No problem. Help Mike Franken to be the next Senator from the great State of Iowa, and Chuck Grassley’s can spend all the time at home that he wants!
body:
Mike Franken for Chuck Grassley’s retirement committee!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Republican Senators, who work about half the year, are complaining because they have to go to work.** **Senator Chuck Grassley of Iowa, who is running for his EIGHTH TERM, and would be 95 years old when it ends** if elected, tweeted out his anger at the fact he has to be in Washington for a job he just can't seem to quit, voting on truly groundbreaking legislation. This is what he tweeted: Are you kidding me? Can you imagine if any of us whined about a job where we work 171 days of the year--including every Friday off--the way Grassley does here? We'd be fired, of course. If poor Chuck, who first got to the Senate in 1980, when the Rubik's Cube came out, John Lennon was shot and The Empire Strikes Back was released, hates this job so much, why is he running for another six-year term, just like the past seven times? [**We need Admiral Mike Franken in Washington. Can you give $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to help send him to Washington and Chuck Grassley back to Iowa where he'll be far from electoral college certification and can attend all the family reunions he'd like?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad2b5a40-52c1-4ab1-8878-0aacb91b77c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Worse yet the bill Grassley is complaining about--the Inflation Reduction Act--includes the biggest step ever taken by the U.S. to fight climate change, allow Medicare to finally bulk negotiate for prescriptions, saving many seniors thousands of dollars every year, place a minimum tax on big corporations so they can't get away with paying little to nothing and will crack down on wealthy tax cheats. Grassley, who voted for Trump's ludicrous budget-busting tax cut, is set to vote against this while talking about a "responsible fiscal agenda." Grassley, of course, was also suspiciously close to Trump's coup, tweeting out on January 6th that he'd be certifying the electoral votes, something historically done by Vice Presidents. Why didn't Grassley expect Mike Pence to be there? What did he know that we didn't? I sure hope the Jan 6th Committee gets to the bottom of it.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: MIKE FRANKEN FOR IOWA!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ff7d804-3357-4f07-9409-dd2d888a4517/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| We can send this seditionist who refused to impeach Trump like seven of his Republican colleagues and every Democrat, to all the reunions he wants to go to in the future and get him the hell out of Washington where he's dangerous and apparently doesn't like being. We can support Grassley's Democratic opponent, Admiral Mike Franken. Yes, we have a retired three-star admiral who spent 36 years in the Navy running for the U.S. Senate. Someone who spent his life serving the United States, not debasing himself in service of Donald Trump's authoritarianism. Admiral Franken wouldn't be complaining about doing his job, he'd be doing it. He wouldn't be whining about a bill that does so much to help seniors, working people and our climate, he'd be proudly voting for it. And he wouldn't be seemingly aiding and abetting a coup, and then voting to let the perpetrator off afterwards. [**We need Admiral Mike Franken in Washington. Can you give $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to help send him to Washington and Chuck Grassley back to Iowa where he'll be far from electoral college certification and can attend all the family reunions he'd like?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40abf34b-0c15-46e6-b757-1b694c65afdd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks as always my friends. For engaging in this fight and every other one like it. Cliff

clean_body: Mike Franken for Chuck Grassley’s retirement committee! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, Republican Senators, who work about half the year, are complaining because they have to go to work. Senator Chuck Grassley of Iowa, who is running for his EIGHTH TERM, and would be 95 years old when it ends if elected, tweeted out his anger at the fact he has to be in Washington for a job he just can't seem to quit, voting on truly groundbreaking legislation. This is what he tweeted: Are you kidding me? Can you imagine if any of us whined about a job where we work 171 days of the year--including every Friday off--the way Grassley does here? We'd be fired, of course. If poor Chuck, who first got to the Senate in 1980, when the Rubik's Cube came out, John Lennon was shot and The Empire Strikes Back was released, hates this job so much, why is he running for another six-year term, just like the past seven times? Worse yet the bill Grassley is complaining about--the Inflation Reduction Act--includes the biggest step ever taken by the U.S. to fight climate change, allow Medicare to finally bulk negotiate for prescriptions, saving many seniors thousands of dollars every year, place a minimum tax on big corporations so they can't get away with paying little to nothing and will crack down on wealthy tax cheats. Grassley, who voted for Trump's ludicrous budget-busting tax cut, is set to vote against this while talking about a "responsible fiscal agenda." Grassley, of course, was also suspiciously close to Trump's coup, tweeting out on January 6th that he'd be certifying the electoral votes, something historically done by Vice Presidents. Why didn't Grassley expect Mike Pence to be there? What did he know that we didn't? I sure hope the Jan 6th Committee gets to the bottom of it. | | | | | | We can send this seditionist who refused to impeach Trump like seven of his Republican colleagues and every Democrat, to all the reunions he wants to go to in the future and get him the hell out of Washington where he's dangerous and apparently doesn't like being. We can support Grassley's Democratic opponent, Admiral Mike Franken. Yes, we have a retired three-star admiral who spent 36 years in the Navy running for the U.S. Senate. Someone who spent his life serving the United States, not debasing himself in service of Donald Trump's authoritarianism. Admiral Franken wouldn't be complaining about doing his job, he'd be doing it. He wouldn't be whining about a bill that does so much to help seniors, working people and our climate, he'd be proudly voting for it. And he wouldn't be seemingly aiding and abetting a coup, and then voting to let the perpetrator off afterwards. Thanks as always my friends. For engaging in this fight and every other one like it. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

This is a huge development: following this week’s Republican primary, **The Cook Political Report has changed the rating of our race from “Toss-Up” to “Lean Democrat.”**

National experts are recognizing the strength of our campaign. But we can’t let up for one second. We must continue our voter outreach and organizing efforts to make sure folks across the district know that West Michigan needs an advocate in Congress and Hillary is the best candidate for the job.

But just because we have a slight edge doesn’t mean we have this race wrapped up. It’s been over 50 years since West Michigan sent a Democrat to Congress, and this district has never sent a woman to Congress on their behalf. But with your support, we can change that!

name: Real Talk with Senator Kennedy (Pt. 1)
subject: If you don’t like what I say, I don’t care.

name: Bruce Poliquin 2022
subject: it happened
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRUCE POLIQUIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter, Biden's recession is real.
Peter, It happened. Over the last few days, our nation slid into recession. Two quarters of a shrinking economy. Joe Biden and liberal partner Democrat Jared Golden inherited an economy in recovery. **_It only took a short time for Joe Biden and my opponent Jared Golden to drive that economy into the ditch. We now have the highest inflation since Jimmy Carter._** I have successfully run small businesses for 40 years. I helped create hundreds of jobs. I know how to build a strong economy - with little inflation. I helped manage and protect the pensions savings for thousands of workers at Bath Iron Works, where our nation builds our Navy destroyers. Jared Golden and Joe Biden have no experience creating jobs, in the real world economy, and it shows. **Biden and my opponent Golden claim to be moderate, trying to fool voters. We now know they are not. Golden votes 89% with radical Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. Biden and Golden's extreme agenda is hurting our families with sky high prices for heating oil, gasoline, electric bills, groceries.** We must change Washington. We must start fixing this mess created by Biden, Pelosi, AOC, Golden and their failed one party Democrat majority. **Help me fight back. name: Christina Cammon
subject: mom doesn't just sit by
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
You see, right now, there’s a compassion deficit in Washington.
| | |
---
Hi there, Peter. I'm Trudy's daughter, Christina. This is a bit of a longer email, but I hope you'll take a moment to read it – that would mean so, so much to me.
**You see, right now, there’s a compassion deficit in Washington. Far too many politicians respond to tough times with a quick photo op and****a one-way ticket****back to D.C.** They fail to lead hurting communities to a place of healing and progress. And they refuse to take bold action to prevent these tragedies from happening again.
My mom is nothing like them. **Time and time again, when faced with tragedy, she has taken action in the wake of heartbreak.**
When my mom was only 17, she lost her 8-year-old sister – the very girl I was named for – in a brutal car crash. But instead of turning toward hopelessness and despair, she faced the tragedy with bravery and compassion. My mom sat by her sister's bedside for 12 long days, watching the nurses and doctors do everything they could to save her. And then, she resolved to become a pediatric nurse to help save lives and comfort families.
Decades later, my dad was diagnosed with cancer. My mom again stepped up to serve and care for him. When he died at only 49, and while she coped with her own loss and grief, she led my five siblings and me through one of the hardest periods of our lives with empathy, tenderness, and so, so much love. And then, once our family had found its footing, she found purpose in her pain once more and began providing hospice care, helping comfort patients and families through some of their darkest moments.
And nearly two years ago, after a years-long battle with addiction and almost 500 days of sobriety, my brother died from an opioid overdose. Again, she turned her heartbreak into action. Mom channeled it into running for Senate to end the opioid epidemic, making sure other moms don't have to experience the unimaginable pain she feels.
**Somehow, while almost everyone else is paralyzed by grief, my mom wields her pain into something powerful, and she uses it to change others' lives for the better.**
In the Senate, you can trust that my mom isn’t going to just sit by and do nothing while gun violence wrecks family after family, while we are being stripped of our constitutional rights, or while daily life is becoming more and more expensive. **Instead, she'll take bold, compassionate action to heal communities, confront these crises, and lead us forward.**
Even in the midst of the worst, most personal tragedies, my mom has done the hard work for her community. And that is exactly that type of leader that she will be in the U.S. Senate. **But she needs your help to get there, Peter.[So please, before my mom's next midnight fundraising deadline, will you make a grassroots donation to bring compassion and action back to Washington? Your support is so important to winning in November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48920593/360099693/-1843232826?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk188-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTc3NGQ1ZC1hNTE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=64c097pN2FWVW8iQsNAavbGE2HzIdwy2Ld2cg3i2g9I=)**

clean_body: You see, right now, there’s a compassion deficit in Washington. | | | Hi there, Peter. I'm Trudy's daughter, Christina. This is a bit of a longer email, but I hope you'll take a moment to read it – that would mean so, so much to me. You see, right now, there’s a compassion deficit in Washington. Far too many politicians respond to tough times with a quick photo op anda one-way ticketback to D.C. They fail to lead hurting communities to a place of healing and progress. And they refuse to take bold action to prevent these tragedies from happening again. My mom is nothing like them. Time and time again, when faced with tragedy, she has taken action in the wake of heartbreak. When my mom was only 17, she lost her 8-year-old sister – the very girl I was named for – in a brutal car crash. But instead of turning toward hopelessness and despair, she faced the tragedy with bravery and compassion. My mom sat by her sister's bedside for 12 long days, watching the nurses and doctors do everything they could to save her. And then, she resolved to become a pediatric nurse to help save lives and comfort families. Decades later, my dad was diagnosed with cancer. My mom again stepped up to serve and care for him. When he died at only 49, and while she coped with her own loss and grief, she led my five siblings and me through one of the hardest periods of our lives with empathy, tenderness, and so, so much love. And then, once our family had found its footing, she found purpose in her pain once more and began providing hospice care, helping comfort patients and families through some of their darkest moments. And nearly two years ago, after a years-long battle with addiction and almost 500 days of sobriety, my brother died from an opioid overdose. Again, she turned her heartbreak into action. Mom channeled it into running for Senate to end the opioid epidemic, making sure other moms don't have to experience the unimaginable pain she feels. Somehow, while almost everyone else is paralyzed by grief, my mom wields her pain into something powerful, and she uses it to change others' lives for the better. In the Senate, you can trust that my mom isn’t going to just sit by and do nothing while gun violence wrecks family after family, while we are being stripped of our constitutional rights, or while daily life is becoming more and more expensive. Instead, she'll take bold, compassionate action to heal communities, confront these crises, and lead us forward. Even in the midst of the worst, most personal tragedies, my mom has done the hard work for her community. And that is exactly that type of leader that she will be in the U.S. Senate. But she needs your help to get there, Peter.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Christina Cammon | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate are not tax deductible. | | 2022 | Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate PO Box 11826 Clayton, MO 63105 United States

name: Team Jared
subject: Early Voting starts soon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
body:
There’s so much at stake

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jm-email-august?refcode=voting [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jm-email-august?refcode=voting]
Team,
There’s so much at stake in this election, from abortion rights to gun violence prevention to the health of our democracy to economic issues – we’ve got too much on the line to be complacent or take anything for granted.
That’s why Jared Moskowitz is committed to continuing his lifetime of service to South Florida by tackling the most pressing issues we face head-on.
We need proven Democratic fighters like Jared in Congress. In Washington, Jared will protect our democracy, work to prevent gun violence, protect abortion rights, and fight to lower inflation.
In-person early voting begins on Monday, 8/8 in Palm Beach County and on Saturday, 8/13 in Broward County. Click below to make sure you’re prepared to vote.
Check My Status [https://registration.elections.myflorida.com/CheckVoterStatus]
Find My Polling Place [https://makeaplantovote.com/]
From passing historic gun violence prevention legislation through the Florida legislature as a State Representative to fighting back against COVID-19 as Florida’s Director of Emergency Management, Jared has never shied away from confronting the issues that matter the most.
Now, Jared needs us to show up and vote to send him to Congress in order to allow him to continue fighting for our community and our country. Please make your plan to vote today!
Thanks,
Team Jared
Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
Jared Moskowitz for Congress
PO Box 8784
Coral Springs, FL 33065

clean_body: There’s so much at stake [] Team, There’s so much at stake in this election, from abortion rights to gun violence prevention to the health of our democracy to economic issues – we’ve got too much on the line to be complacent or take anything for granted. That’s why Jared Moskowitz is committed to continuing his lifetime of service to South Florida by tackling the most pressing issues we face head-on. We need proven Democratic fighters like Jared in Congress. In Washington, Jared will protect our democracy, work to prevent gun violence, protect abortion rights, and fight to lower inflation. In-person early voting begins on Monday, 8/8 in Palm Beach County and on Saturday, 8/13 in Broward County. Click below to make sure you’re prepared to vote. Check My Status [] Find My Polling Place [] From passing historic gun violence prevention legislation through the Florida legislature as a State Representative to fighting back against COVID-19 as Florida’s Director of Emergency Management, Jared has never shied away from confronting the issues that matter the most. Now, Jared needs us to show up and vote to send him to Congress in order to allow him to continue fighting for our community and our country. Please make your plan to vote today! Thanks, Team Jared Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress Jared Moskowitz for Congress PO Box 8784 Coral Springs, FL 33065 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Charity Barry
subject: Victory!
body:
Join Our Final Push and Celebration
| | | |
---
| | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nzuhaLIPHH4SlGApaM2rEnDQ-cRbaMABc2QjsL1N3fcEBN65xMSye9uNw1EzwQLPozlRb4rOQpbJf5xMaRp5B48jp_-pdZz4iG-bFroGjbJL9c37YIY1O76pZC0MbqCCH1E4FFBTcL6ZJkWNsY5-mQ==&c=WvIed_2kUlVgYE1X9CSayE0g-nsQ7ViCYo1I7bAQCei3UufDXIhZgQ==&ch=IgxkNKyeTRtVzv6qfO6WaG3TqhuiexON19m0pgx4okHTi_dymvLI0A==)
---|---
|
Dear Friends,

The primary election is almost here. I am humbled by all the support I've received. I gave my first campaign speech at a Dane County Pints & Politics on May 4, 2021. I have not stopped campaigning since. I've driven over 40,000 miles around the 2nd Congressional District since then and have met thousands of voters. Change is in the air in the 2nd Congressional District. People have had enough. But before I can take on Mark Pocan I need to win Tuesday's primary. My campaign has been going nonstop.

* Last week over 16,000 pieces of campaign literature were mailed.
* Over the course of the past few months, hundreds of yard signs have been put up.
* Field signs are going up across the district.
* My radio ads are now playing. Click on the image to listen to one of them.
* Thanks to a generous donor we even have a 40-foot banner on a Lake Mendota boathouse.

| |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Phone Callers Needed
We need volunteers to make get out the vote phone calls on Monday. If you are willing to volunteer, please let my campaign know how many calls you are willing to make and we'll send you names and phone numbers.

Email: info@charitybarryforcongress.com

| |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Vicki McKenna
WIBA 1310 AM

I will be on Vicki McKenna's radio program Monday at 4:00 pm.

| |
---
| Election Watch Party Tuesday
We will be holding an election watch party Tuesday at the [5th Quarter Bar & Grill](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nzuhaLIPHH4SlGApaM2rEnDQ-cRbaMABc2QjsL1N3fcEBN65xMSye9uNw1EzwQLPmPQpp6PfFYzqBio_gb59isN74CFllHwQJvl27aEj3a9Ipi-hyu68GfTLgiHpNqFbfDte7IQ5mcT1gJ5qs-fBFg==&c=WvIed_2kUlVgYE1X9CSayE0g-nsQ7ViCYo1I7bAQCei3UufDXIhZgQ==&ch=IgxkNKyeTRtVzv6qfO6WaG3TqhuiexON19m0pgx4okHTi_dymvLI0A==), 161 Horizon Dr, Suite 110, Verona from 7:00 to 10:30 pm.

name: Nikki Fried
subject: WTF?!
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,
This week, kids across Florida will head back to school. And while most of the back to school preparations will be the same, there’s no question that this school year will be different.
It’s different because Ron DeSantis has decided to make our children’s education a battleground in his fake culture war.
Not only will students, teachers, and parents be contending with DeSantis’ bigoted “Don’t Say Gay” bill, they’ll also be taught that slavery wasn’t that bad.
This latest authoritarian move is part of DeSantis’ “civics” initiative, which dictates that Florida educators should teach a racist, hateful, and false version of our history and spread DeSantis’ propaganda to our students.
There are no words, Peter — no words to describe just how dangerous this is for our students and for our state.
But I can tell you this: those of us who care about equality and freedom — about stopping government overreach and giving our kids the opportunity to succeed — will never stop fighting back against DeSantis’ authoritarian agenda. Will you chip in $20 to join the fight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-aug-2022?refcode=807backtoschool]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-aug-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=807backtoschool] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-aug-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=807backtoschool] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-aug-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=807backtoschool] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-aug-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=807backtoschool] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-aug-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=807backtoschool] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-aug-2022?refcode=807backtoschool]
Throughout history, authoritarians like Ron DeSantis have focused their energy on controlling education — telling educators what they can and can’t say, forcing teachers to teach a blatantly false version of history, and using schools to spread their propaganda.
It’s disgusting, Peter. It’s dangerous. And it has no place in Florida. But the only way we can put a stop to it is at the ballot box on November 8th.
We need to defeat DeSantis. For the sake of our children. For the sake of our teachers. And for the sake of our state. If you’re with me, click here to chip in $20 and help us fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-aug-2022?refcode=807backtoschool]
Thank you for your support.
— Nikki

clean_body: Peter, This week, kids across Florida will head back to school. And while most of the back to school preparations will be the same, there’s no question that this school year will be different. It’s different because Ron DeSantis has decided to make our children’s education a battleground in his fake culture war. Not only will students, teachers, and parents be contending with DeSantis’ bigoted “Don’t Say Gay” bill, they’ll also be taught that slavery wasn’t that bad. This latest authoritarian move is part of DeSantis’ “civics” initiative, which dictates that Florida educators should teach a racist, hateful, and false version of our history and spread DeSantis’ propaganda to our students. There are no words, Peter — no words to describe just how dangerous this is for our students and for our state. But I can tell you this: those of us who care about equality and freedom — about stopping government overreach and giving our kids the opportunity to succeed — will never stop fighting back against DeSantis’ authoritarian agenda. Will you chip in $20 to join the fight? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. Express Donate $10 [] Express Donate $20 [] Express Donate $50 [] Express Donate $100 [] Express Donate $250 [] Another Amount [] Throughout history, authoritarians like Ron DeSantis have focused their energy on controlling education — telling educators what they can and can’t say, forcing teachers to teach a blatantly false version of history, and using schools to spread their propaganda. It’s disgusting, Peter. It’s dangerous. And it has no place in Florida. But the only way we can put a stop to it is at the ballot box on November 8th. We need to defeat DeSantis. For the sake of our children. For the sake of our teachers. And for the sake of our state. If you’re with me, click here to chip in $20 and help us fight back. [] Thank you for your support. — Nikki Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor Nikki Fried for Governor 6619 S Dixie Hwy No. 148 Miami, FL 33143 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

| | Huge news — the voting went all through the night and into the afternoon, but the Senate finally passed the Inflation Reduction Act a few minutes ago. **And there's a lot to be excited about:** ✅ Dramatically reduces carbon pollution while creating good, made in America, union jobs. ✅ Empowers Medicare to negotiate some drug prices and bring down health premiums for families. ✅ Makes corporations and billionaires pay their fair share in taxes. This bill will be the biggest investment in clean energy development in our nation's history, reduce carbon pollution by 40% by 2030, and restore America's role as a leader in the global fight to combat climate change. I'm not going to pretend there aren't some tough pills to swallow here, too. There are some egregious fossil fuel giveaways, for example. I'm all in to keep pushing back and fighting to end oil and gas drilling and the subsidies for polluters. But make no mistake: even with these bad provisions, this bill will transform America's energy usage. [**We should celebrate this big victory over polluters and big Pharma and Wall Street billionaires. And then we need to get back to work! There is still so much to do on voting rights, reproductive rights, filibuster reform and more. name: Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
subject: First → Then → Now
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
The truth is, emails like this one are a major way that we fund this campaign.
#
**FIRST:** Immediately after Cheri Beasley clinched the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate, she had to beat back $6 million in attack ads from the NRSC.
**THEN:** Despite millions in false attack ads, recent polling shows the race tightening in our favor. Cheri is in a tie with our opponent.
**SO NOW:** Three more GOP super PACs have bought ads in North Carolina — including Mitch McConnell’s Senate Leadership Fund. They’ve pledged to spend nearly $30 million combined trying to defeat Cheri, and we’re asking for your help to ensure we have the resources to fight back against whatever lies come our way next.
The truth is, emails like this one are a major way that we fund this campaign. We’re proud to have the support of tens of thousands of people who believe in Cheri Beasley and are ready for change in North Carolina.
**But Cheri cannot do it alone. So we are asking:**
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution TODAY to Cheri Beasley’s campaign to flip North Carolina? We can fight back against the lies coming our way, but it will not be easy. It’s going to take all of us getting involved.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-aug22.dwKUnu&refcode=em220807-2-ma&t=1&akid=1389%2E357359%2EfWoo7G)
**[DONATE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-aug22.dwKUnu&refcode=em220807-2-ma&t=2&akid=1389%2E357359%2EfWoo7G)**
Thank you! When we win North Carolina and flip this senate seat in November, know that your support today played an important role in our success.
\- Team Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611

---
[My district is one of the most competitive districts in the entire country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48921450/360108418/1375693006?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220807_FR_5DOLLARS_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjE2ZDAyNC1hZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JKDtFFnDR1Qg_YBzRjUrrPuGYA1dk7NfpqbjAWxpFjI=) It narrowly went to Trump in 2020 and we can take it back this year. Democrats’ House majority is hanging in the balance and this seat could decide which party controls Congress.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Which of these stickers do you like better?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
These are going quick.
#
Derek,
These are the two top-selling official campaign stickers right now (seriously, we’ve already had to restock twice).
Tbh, we really can’t even decide which one we love the most. 😉
[**_Shop our top-selling stickers in our online store right now before we run out of stock again! Every purchase in our official online campaign store helps fund our people-powered campaign to elect John and defeat Dr. Oz._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48469?t=1&akid=6784%2E434096%2EGxSQq3)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48469?t=2&akid=6784%2E434096%2EGxSQq3)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48469?t=3&akid=6784%2E434096%2EGxSQq3)
**[Shop Stickerz →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48469?t=4&akid=6784%2E434096%2EGxSQq3)**
Look, these stickers are all in good clean fun. And we hope to keep raising a lot of money off of them (because we’ll need it).
**But what’s not funny is that a Hollywood fraudster like Dr. Oz can move to another state and spend millions of his own dollars to buy himself a Senate seat.**
In the most important Senate race in the nation (Pennsylvania NOT New Jersey), we can’t let the GOP take this seat. And we can’t let Dr. Oz win.
[**_So do your part today + support John Fetterman by claiming one of our top-selling stickers. Hurry, they’re selling quick!_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48469?t=5&akid=6784%2E434096%2EGxSQq3)
**[Shop Stickerz »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48469?t=6&akid=6784%2E434096%2EGxSQq3)**
— Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220807-6784-footer&t=7&refcode2=6784_434096_GxSQq3&akid=6784%2E434096%2EGxSQq3)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=8&akid=6784%2E434096%2EGxSQq3)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=6784%2E434096%2EGxSQq3)

name: Team Catherine
subject: Letter to the Editor: The Scarsdale Inquirer
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Approved by Catherine For Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48921532/360110972/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTEwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWVjZTU0Mi1iMDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rdgzv0KHWGaxtbbc12IeyoKH3ANHhk4_Hfp7iWz4SY8=&emci=a9e148c1-ac16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=21ece542-b016-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=43401410)
---
| | We’ve seen time and again how Congress has failed to address some of the most pressing issues of the day. And while the Safer Communities Act passed this past month was a good step forward, there is far more to do to improve gun safety. [I have the tools and experience to deliver results to make our communities safer, just like I’ve done right here in the district.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48921533/360110973/-1073546493?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTEwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWVjZTU0Mi1iMDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rdgzv0KHWGaxtbbc12IeyoKH3ANHhk4_Hfp7iWz4SY8=&emci=a9e148c1-ac16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=21ece542-b016-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=43401410) As the Democratic Majority Leader for the Westchester County Board of Legislators, I helped pass two vital pieces of legislation making our communities safer:
---
|
---
| | LEGISLATION BANNING GUN SHOWS at the County Center sent a strong message that Westchester will no longer put up with America’s gun crazed culture LEGISLATION PUSHING FOR NEW YORK’S RED FLAG LAW to take guns away and keep it out of the hands from those pose a threat to themselves and others, those who suffer from mental illness and have a record of domestic abuse On August 23rd, you will have the choice to elect a representative with a proven track record of delivering results. [I hope I have earned your vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48921534/360110974/-2112431742?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTEwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWVjZTU0Mi1iMDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rdgzv0KHWGaxtbbc12IeyoKH3ANHhk4_Hfp7iWz4SY8=) -Catherine
---
| |
---
| P.S. Moms Demand Action has recognized my successful record of protecting Westchester and Bronx families as a “Gun Sense Candidate”. With this seal, you’ll know I’ll continue to deliver for you.
---
| | ******************************************************************************************** Learn more by visiting Catherine’s website, or follow her on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48921535/360110975/810181882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTEwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWVjZTU0Mi1iMDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rdgzv0KHWGaxtbbc12IeyoKH3ANHhk4_Hfp7iWz4SY8=&emci=a9e148c1-ac16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=21ece542-b016-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=43401410), [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48921536/360110976/749946185?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTEwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWVjZTU0Mi1iMDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rdgzv0KHWGaxtbbc12IeyoKH3ANHhk4_Hfp7iWz4SY8=&emci=a9e148c1-ac16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=21ece542-b016-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=43401410), or [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48921537/360110977/1773438519?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTEwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWVjZTU0Mi1iMDE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rdgzv0KHWGaxtbbc12IeyoKH3ANHhk4_Hfp7iWz4SY8=&emci=a9e148c1-ac16-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=21ece542-b016-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=43401410). clean_body: | | | | | We’ve seen time and again how Congress has failed to address some of the most pressing issues of the day. And while the Safer Communities Act passed this past month was a good step forward, there is far more to do to improve gun safety. As the Democratic Majority Leader for the Westchester County Board of Legislators, I helped pass two vital pieces of legislation making our communities safer: | | | LEGISLATION BANNING GUN SHOWS at the County Center sent a strong message that Westchester will no longer put up with America’s gun crazed culture LEGISLATION PUSHING FOR NEW YORK’S RED FLAG LAW to take guns away and keep it out of the hands from those pose a threat to themselves and others, those who suffer from mental illness and have a record of domestic abuse On August 23rd, you will have the choice to elect a representative with a proven track record of delivering results. = -Catherine | | | P.S. Moms Demand Action has recognized my successful record of protecting Westchester and Bronx families as a “Gun Sense Candidate”. With this seal, you’ll know I’ll continue to deliver for you. | | ****************************************************************************************** Learn more by visiting Catherine’s website, or follow her on , , or . = Important Dates for this Summer Primary Monday, August 8: , if you’ll be traveling. Saturday, August 13 - Sunday, August 21: Early voting begins, August 23: Election Day, .****************************************************************************************** | | = | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Approved by Catherine For Congress PO Box 592 Mamaroneck, NY 10543 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Matt
subject: What I’ve learned on the trail:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress PO Box 2451, Glens Falls, NY 12801

Nothing is more important to me than listening to top-of-mind issues for voters in NY-21

| My favorite part of being on the campaign trail is meeting folks in local restaurants across the district: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918511/360089881/-151693572?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=MCFC_20220807_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGRmMDNiNi04ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wmfXGZglPRB_VEFjm9Z2Oy_0m4KSDh3dXL-LmjRGRVg=) _Here I am with voters at the Main Street Ice Cream Parlor in Chestertown!_ **Nothing is more important to me than listening to top-of-mind issues for voters in NY-21.** That’s why last month I embarked on a 15 county tour of the district and this week we began our 15-county weekly Town Hall series.

[**Unlike far-right Elise Stefanik, I’m doing the work to incorporate the issues upstate New Yorkers want solved in this campaign. If you’re with me, will you chip in $3 so I can continue our voter outreach efforts before our must-win primary in a few short weeks?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918512/360089883/-151693572?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=MCFC_20220807_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGRmMDNiNi04ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wmfXGZglPRB_VEFjm9Z2Oy_0m4KSDh3dXL-LmjRGRVg=) | [$5,000 WEEKLY GOAL: CHIP IN $3 TO ELECT MATT CASTELLI »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48918514/360089884/-151693572?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=MCFC_20220807_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGRmMDNiNi04ZjE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wmfXGZglPRB_VEFjm9Z2Oy_0m4KSDh3dXL-LmjRGRVg=)

Look, voters want a change from the ultra-partisan games Stefanik is playing in Washington.

_I know this because it’s what voters on both sides of the aisle tell me in my travels across the district._

It’s past time to put country before party and weed out ultra-MAGA politicians like Stefanik — **the people of NY-21 deserve more.**

[**Let’s do this together! The future of America is on the line - and what happens today will decide everything. Joe Biden & Chuck Schumer just dropped a whopping $30+ MILLION bucks to destroy my friend & GOP candidate, Adam Laxalt, in the MOST important Senate race on the map. If the Democrats beat us in this must-win race in Nevada, it's all over. ** **** ** ** ******** **** **** ************ ************ Adam is a former Naval Officer & Iraq War Veteran, and a God-fearing American like us. He is everything the radical Left fears the most. Adam has my full support, and I hope he will have yours too. But he won't stand a chance if we don't see a rush of grassroots support. The Democrats have all the connections, power & ritzy mega-fundraisers. Believe me when I say, this is the single most important thing you can do to help save America. We're out of time. I am the Trump-endorsed, America First Conservative running for U.S. Senate in North Carolina. | | ---|--- | | | As your next U.S. Senator from North Carolina, I will never sit back and watch Democrats attack our freedoms and rights. I will fight for our brave law enforcement officers and make sure we have a secure Southern Border. As a proud gun store owner, I will always fight to protect the right to bear arms and make sure ALL your rights are protected. | ---|--- | | | My Radical Democrat opponent, Cheri Beasley, will turn North Carolina into a Socialist Wasteland. It is up to you and me to stop her. | ---|--- | | - | Thank you, Ted | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The Left is Spreading a Mind Virus
body:
**[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7047c73cbf9943239cf3b2d4e74c2479&_e=GzBK5m_cq7lP_vuus94zTKWKK_szKQ9dj00D_2Gt1NAK553NKaRYjngERRspWYq8ZppBwSZQo9EtW5B34csQM-ZgcorrQOBQMb7RUct9twquNx4HYzujA01lQPkExV-E0ctTuURwhEGDnPWlegU-F4iILELR00BAdoQiM5XOxFDWX40T4yFjckkOG-CIJOYo5mtNGwWiJ_zhposRK37OlqAmD_3fPsdxK-Mdz_VRaxvTHiHyFV1oUowVW9LbTwcs9w0uwFwz8qOvPXC1Mbz5d4UhMwMTB6EsqvE6lrk9srpuatnTGE87Ks457Pa8RWfSTSxR5UQhsqynusf96KK2cRHab6u1cXU3b7kFx0pLOzdKTACiHXbnUrocXFDAg6Z3ypASsE7x1MgY1XmV28SJzw%3D%3D)**

Peter,
Florida is the freest state in the nation because we reject the wokeness that has taken over other states and institutions. While blue states and corporate America fully embrace this mind virus, Florida has stood strong against ideologies that seek to incite division and hate amongst our citizens.

You don't need me to tell you that our country is heading down a dangerous path. The Democrat Machine is infecting our nation from the inside out,**and the root of it all is a woke and destructive ideology.**

This incessant need to control every aspect of our lives and force one point of view on us all or risk being "canceled" is a **mind virus** that is destroying any institution that it gets hold of.

We've seen this in all corners of our lives, but most egregiously in our education system. Other states have bent the knee to the woke mob, injecting Critical Race Theory and gender ideologies into our youngest and most impressionable kids -- but I can tell you in the state of Florida, we've drawn a very clear line in the sand. **We've said that the purpose of our education system is to educate our kids, not to indoctrinate our kids.**

**[EDUCATION NOT INDOCTRINATION>>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7047c73cbf9943239cf3b2d4e74c2479&_e=GzBK5m_cq7lP_vuus94zTKWKK_szKQ9dj00D_2Gt1NAK553NKaRYjngERRspWYq8ZppBwSZQo9EtW5B34csQM-ZgcorrQOBQMb7RUct9twquNx4HYzujA01lQPkExV-E0ctTuURwhEGDnPWlegU-F4iILELR00BAdoQiM5XOxFDWX40T4yFjckkOG-CIJOYodid7AgLry9QqBlzL861FKH_ohdFxzSu3PMO2LM5lEot6w1TaodPWjyz3NYdtUDDrkgEsNIObSabT3SLhr6JO4p8J3uKoEWRNb1ixDHWVi-0eeCKl4RwRN2W5z3Pbxd69zlvw1gwv4rCUKAn3FpM8d8-fH5_2i8EEZE64Pm0b8XemP-3Z1dOG1TmM3IYX2n6Gra0Aspz9ab06l-RKSFcqyg%3D%3D "https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0214ef3e5edb5e884130c9eb2a66974c70509f7004d0d3225be96c62de8b3af47502485555c4d8982ee029fe9ae8f7b3faa0f8844999ceb9")**

The Left wants to use CRT to distort American history in an effort to delegitimize our Founding Fathers and the principles of this country with the goal of replacing it with their Leftist ideology.

You and I both know that will be a disaster for our society and our country, Peter. We know this woke ideology is rejected by the overwhelming majority of Americans. **In Florida, we reject that.**

The truth is this woke agenda has injected itself into the inner workings of elite institutions and poisoned their entire frameworks.

**[REJECT THE WOKE AGENDA>>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7047c73cbf9943239cf3b2d4e74c2479&_e=GzBK5m_cq7lP_vuus94zTKWKK_szKQ9dj00D_2Gt1NAK553NKaRYjngERRspWYq8ZppBwSZQo9EtW5B34csQM-ZgcorrQOBQMb7RUct9twquNx4HYzujA01lQPkExV-E0ctTuURwhEGDnPWlegU-F4iILELR00BAdoQiM5XOxFDWX40T4yFjckkOG-CIJOYobrNUXWKN4CwiUoELrCcrHoYkRKguSR_aTgPtt45lA79kKAg98KSriquLG-Ann6mhL-hNtX-AkkUs2JSei-g42X6BMJUXnhy6tfYZFa8copuBKIyGIH9AP5jTYkrZgBDjBQJUPC4G7zBJnULwaL9CaX5N93d-3cjKvACD9YMyHe1ON8ndpWSWD0e8ZabTudDlz6gY2FzO1LbArLRpKTZ9eA%3D%3D "https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0214ef3e5edb5e8842817a647a459cf75ba72d7e752857d001075cd15d7de62128cf9526a182261f85b580e096bb8872fbc2a3c860e036e6")**

We see it at the universities. We see it in corporate America. We even see it in the military. They're trying to take the basic structure and purpose for these organizations and turn them into parasites for the Democrat Machine. Corporate media and Big Tech long ago abandoned their purpose to inform and connect people and transformed into the censorship arm of the Democrat Party, stifling dissent, stifling conservative voices, and silencing any and all points of view that differ from their own.

**[PROTECT FLORIDA FROM THE DEMOCRAT MACHINE>>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7047c73cbf9943239cf3b2d4e74c2479&_e=GzBK5m_cq7lP_vuus94zTKWKK_szKQ9dj00D_2Gt1NAK553NKaRYjngERRspWYq8ZppBwSZQo9EtW5B34csQM-ZgcorrQOBQMb7RUct9twquNx4HYzujA01lQPkExV-E0ctTuURwhEGDnPWlegU-F4iILELR00BAdoQiM5XOxFDWX40T4yFjckkOG-CIJOYoxm5KwAqFQrAwUMvg3iKI6cxRFyQOfzYR1-FlPzeVkrzXxh9VoG4rXIPPeDit5DyEzYjnzgasmVqH_D6hFj5HKPM3oQqHomzaEF0Zvv67CjQJ90SfD72LFlvURyPROmsYL6iAR_wGBk9cnoyIYXw5b89-oFuZb1o4dd-gDeryaDG8xWswibLAeXELd48IP_XoIDgHRfU0bYzjoTNiejse-g%3D%3D "https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0214ef3e5edb5e882cc8ce0057e03b2e0f53dd421eb0d462a7e408dbfd8aa51ffe9be661a8ba4d7b9463e72de44d01dfb2cebdbb0b11bb8c")**

In Florida, we've rejected these woke ideologies seeking to further divide us rather than unite us. We're standing up to the Democrat Machine, to the legacy media, and to woke corporations. We're sending a strong message while doing it: your lies might fly in California, but they will not be tolerated in the state of Florida.

Democrats have taken note of our Freedom Agenda, and they've made Florida their number one target for elections this November. **They know we are the greatest threat to their war on democracy because we are the strongest soldiers in the battle for liberty and freedom.**

**I will never back down from the fight to Keep Florida Free.** As we get closer to November, I need to know I can count on your support to protect our great state. **[The battle has only just begun, are you with me?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7047c73cbf9943239cf3b2d4e74c2479&_e=GzBK5m_cq7lP_vuus94zTKWKK_szKQ9dj00D_2Gt1NAK553NKaRYjngERRspWYq8ZppBwSZQo9EtW5B34csQM-ZgcorrQOBQMb7RUct9twquNx4HYzujA01lQPkExV-E0ctTuURwhEGDnPWlegU-F4iILELR00BAdoQiM5XOxFDWX40T4yFjckkOG-CIJOYoChxHzuYwqRd9TjksjnjKnIpLm88wvcyVn4i33FSBvtrYnpOgNx2vXmaSze3phQhH2bil6ut7i0m21pisIDvzA6rOvq6OSaP31lv67m-a0zShfURNPKevLdgPpP5y5A3kjhtL9-W3kwY3edRk436M6_9sjQh03pZ7r_p3wlRezE2rxAMfVMKMQsqdd8slgwGX3bK5PAXDRWCSAmiwA3r8Pw%3D%3D "https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0214ef3e5edb5e88307c48ae6c69abc377924245774b39b576d99bc7b209ec3c330d4a369fc19ffdf8171b7b41dca6b050a92eb9e3377319")**

**[KEEP FLORIDA FREE>>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7047c73cbf9943239cf3b2d4e74c2479&_e=GzBK5m_cq7lP_vuus94zTKWKK_szKQ9dj00D_2Gt1NAK553NKaRYjngERRspWYq8ZppBwSZQo9EtW5B34csQM-ZgcorrQOBQMb7RUct9twquNx4HYzujA01lQPkExV-E0ctTuURwhEGDnPWlegU-F4iILELR00BAdoQiM5XOxFDWX40T4yFjckkOG-CIJOYoIuZWs8bqXg-i_PCbZP3ADjSRXTf1yT_IBG5cTAAdYsq0PdW0MA8RTwI-mViqw99RgcvYSqrHFnojDgsdz1Xyc_J15sHY-glQ8Jt-KT9owgFD7-Pm7pUi15106LIm2wMD2r1JocsL8I-X8LWCWOdfNPkcuR7xlcsX1HB_a6PFm9JIiYnMTKSlzXwcM7vm-QQy0JhkbPDwaeH4uxGSU_G8MQ%3D%3D "https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0214ef3e5edb5e884dd78c1744afaaded815e52742249797e8bbf6c64a4208dcf20594408ce40d999bceb2f9d1ddd746ccb10f9e344a2975")**

Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

body:
We must codify marriage equality into law.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48921874/360128496/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjMxODczNi1iODE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WPNoz82nNTUlFQjFBGV5BIJgnc5M8SOPOG3XIQbbBM4=&emci=c632ded1-0f15-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=42318736-b816-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Marriage equality is the law of the land right now because of a Supreme Court decision in 2015. But the Supreme Court showed their willingness to toss precedent out the window when they overturned _Roe v. Wade_. It is crucial that the Senate act to codify marriage equality into law as soon as possible. _[**Sign our petition if you support marriage equality, and want the Senate to codify it into law this year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48921875/360128497/-79202688?ms=mw_em_220807_1&refcode=mw_em_220807_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjMxODczNi1iODE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WPNoz82nNTUlFQjFBGV5BIJgnc5M8SOPOG3XIQbbBM4=&emci=c632ded1-0f15-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=42318736-b816-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)_ The House has already taken the important step of passing a bill to codify marriage equality into law. Doing so would limit the Supreme Court’s ability to take marriage equality away simply by reversing their decision in the landmark 2015 case _Obergefell v. Hodges_. All that is needed is for the Senate to act. It will take 60 votes to get this to pass, and Mark is working hard to make sure the Senate acts to keep these rights secure. Adding your name today will let Mark know you’re with him, and help in his conversations with his colleagues who may determine the outcome of the bill. _[**Sign our petition now: Demand the Senate act to protect marriage equality.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48921876/360128498/-79202688?ms=mw_em_220807_1&refcode=mw_em_220807_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjMxODczNi1iODE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WPNoz82nNTUlFQjFBGV5BIJgnc5M8SOPOG3XIQbbBM4=&emci=c632ded1-0f15-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=42318736-b816-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)_ Thank you, Team Warner **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48921877/360128499/-79202688?ms=mw_em_220807_1&refcode=mw_em_220807_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjMxODczNi1iODE2LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WPNoz82nNTUlFQjFBGV5BIJgnc5M8SOPOG3XIQbbBM4=&emci=c632ded1-0f15-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=42318736-b816-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)**

body:
| | | **MUST-READ: Justice Sonia Sotomayor resolves to keep fighting for what's right**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8449?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220807-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorLetsFightRFx2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220807-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorLetsFightRFx2-Pros-sl1&akid=5716%2E9716520%2EWWCDD_)
**Stand with Justice Sotomayor:****[Sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition by midnight to show that you stand for reproductive freedoms!](https://go.dscc.org/go/8449?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220807-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorLetsFightRFx2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220807-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorLetsFightRFx2-Pros-sl1&akid=5716%2E9716520%2EWWCDD_)**

---

Team, the Supreme Court’s decision to OVERTURN _Roe v. Wade_ was a nightmare: Thanks to Mitch McConnell and the GOP, an unfairly stacked Supreme Court ripped away a _fundamental right_.

But the fight's not over. Justice Sotomayor says that at times like this, we need to channel our anger into action -- **_and she's RIGHT._**

We've launched a CRITICAL petition to show that Democrats will ALWAYS protect a woman's right to make her own health care decisions, and we can’t emphasize this enough: It has _never_ been more crucial to raise our voices. **Let's fight:**

**[Stand with Justice Sonia Sotomayor and sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition to show that you stand for reproductive freedoms>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/8449?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220807-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorLetsFightRFx2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220807-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorLetsFightRFx2-Pros-sl1&akid=5716%2E9716520%2EWWCDD_)**

**_Goal: 250,000 signatures needed!_**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8449?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220807-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorLetsFightRFx2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220807-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorLetsFightRFx2-Pros-sl1&akid=5716%2E9716520%2EWWCDD_)
| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/8449?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220807-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorLetsFightRFx2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220807-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorLetsFightRFx2-Pros-sl1&akid=5716%2E9716520%2EWWCDD_)

Thank you for taking action in this critical moment,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

subject: Humbly asking for a few minutes of your time. Please read.

body:
| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=57d04d093a0046d1b4ffd93949ebee3f&_e=-sMugrxAhqgv6HHphcx4k5xEu3_sKJTauYJ9RY-6QgO1e9eKuXnTiMguKhwYNtcWCb80464NdieJlskhBYoWwIOm0nXWlDUqEVkJ0hprCZH6BP_X2G7IkBl4YawfuypW9I6RMuvBAr9xESS2J4-gpcUbLQ4ElHrCmv3dak7696MFrEbHNp1qCoDiINGabdpIv9aCafNebxLMcMYIAXJ_SoXWe8EreVHedvXklgaYZeNaBc2fx0TSh1DRKTspd3IvyVka8N5BSUX3WrHiTNRqloyPsqK5aU3jycsLhbI8YFpLFPVICieQLy0x7F_Jq-GrIjb97VC7bVVHR4xpBHEoyIU9KUFAxZS5Z-dSJX23YN1-hvbIxzGeaI4zgCR2fgGLQ5r-c_jzua3RS9J8F7gGm-kYqovIuvAMzB4ETQn1tLn2T9Rr5LNzXR22VTgik0x3yQtNO7dFyhPuVmzyBpxw42KUc3ppoFRzj7FKNjXC4R22ntnwaEOV5rNCh-ZmzPaKpYmrQ9sP0wmxCgC9rXQ2Iw%3D%3D)

Friend,

Before we get started and I go any further, I’d just like to take a moment to thank you for your time and previous support in advance. It’s what powers our campaign to fight for hardworking Americans across the country. Look, I know it gets old with our campaign texting, emailing, and calling you nonstop, but I’d be lying if I didn’t say that your support is the **LIFEBLOOD OF OUR CAMPAIGN.** | [**RUSH A DONATION TO OUR CAMPAIGN HERE**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=57d04d093a0046d1b4ffd93949ebee3f&_e=-sMugrxAhqgv6HHphcx4k5xEu3_sKJTauYJ9RY-6QgO1e9eKuXnTiMguKhwYNtcWCb80464NdieJlskhBYoWwIOm0nXWlDUqEVkJ0hprCZH6BP_X2G7IkBl4YawfuypW9I6RMuvBAr9xESS2J4-gpcUbLQ4ElHrCmv3dak7696MFrEbHNp1qCoDiINGabdpIv9aCafNebxLMcMYIAXJ_SoXWe8EreVHedvXklgaYZeNaBc2fx0TSh1DRKTspd3IvyVka8N5BSUX3WrHiTNRqloyPsqK5aU3jycsLhbI8YFpLFPVICieQLy0x7F_Jq-GrwJBALqD081PD_n-XkfOztgnPz8KxCpFPsH1BvI1A7qsmYrx8ufSRAVWuRZwVwniQcsMekrLfDO0-0HpLeD5aq_psJtIUjSN1CJ03ZQgNCP6yjj6Hv9zAop-0iDJuJmcjvx2UI9-t1rVvp5mqZIJT3AqoWOfAI7AD9qdbdFqQrxK9lzUcU_s5ze2Wc05PmNIsC5iQy8WO0AEVTxCkMRhYjw%3D%3D)
---

I hope you know that the main reason I’m running for the U.S. Senate seat in Ohio is because I care deeply about my state, my country, and the issues that we’re facing right now.
[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=57d04d093a0046d1b4ffd93949ebee3f&_e=-sMugrxAhqgv6HHphcx4k5xEu3_sKJTauYJ9RY-6QgO1e9eKuXnTiMguKhwYNtcWCb80464NdieJlskhBYoWwIOm0nXWlDUqEVkJ0hprCZH6BP_X2G7IkBl4YawfuypW9I6RMuvBAr9xESS2J4-gpcUbLQ4ElHrCmv3dak7696MFrEbHNp1qCoDiINGabdpIv9aCafNebxLMcMYIAXJ_SoXWe8EreVHedvXklgaYZeNaBc2fx0TSh1DRKTspd3IvyVka8N5BSUX3WrHiTNRqloyPsqK5aU3jycsLhbI8YFpLFPVICieQLy0x7F_Jq-Gr0EGSp42RLC-w_P9oKrMzDt7e5HE6t8MM5vXUCBhcKzS2Qef1djQ1XHbCQtj3frjih4RXzHVwh0lg0n5YZzly0kThVKecaavW3YCPMXzeho4FaoFojuQo0s9Z0wqJQG3r-zxNoeJIxii0NQcqDAhvJo4YPw7_tkJJj2OZZVVQvHrKwKqCTRoXzTEJ5iWz_5E_2wdAH8Sx9E7y4mt8GSJJjQ%3D%3D)
I grew up in Middletown, Ohio. Middletown was once a booming manufacturing town where Ohioans could live a middle-class life. As I got older, I realized that the jobs and economic opportunities that were once present in my hometown were fading away and it left the community around me grasping for hope.

Look, I won’t sugarcoat it, my home life wasn’t all peaches and cream. I had my fair share of turbulence at home as a kid, with my dad leaving home when I was young, and my mother struggling with drug addiction her entire life. I’m so lucky that I had someone who helped me turn everything around and keep me straight. That person was my Mamaw (my grandmother).

My grandmother taught me tough love, discipline, and that the world wasn’t just going to hand you what you wanted. She kept me straight and focused through her dedication to faith, family, and the hope of a better life that lay ahead (or it could’ve been the 19 handguns she owned.)
[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=57d04d093a0046d1b4ffd93949ebee3f&_e=-sMugrxAhqgv6HHphcx4k5xEu3_sKJTauYJ9RY-6QgO1e9eKuXnTiMguKhwYNtcWCb80464NdieJlskhBYoWwIOm0nXWlDUqEVkJ0hprCZH6BP_X2G7IkBl4YawfuypW9I6RMuvBAr9xESS2J4-gpcUbLQ4ElHrCmv3dak7696MFrEbHNp1qCoDiINGabdpIv9aCafNebxLMcMYIAXJ_SoXWe8EreVHedvXklgaYZeNaBc2fx0TSh1DRKTspd3IvyVka8N5BSUX3WrHiTNRqloyPsqK5aU3jycsLhbI8YFpLFPVICieQLy0x7F_Jq-GrnuAp7tJ2IpIT27vh-gj8bLTXh3BOTUVreHGTXeonk_1yGDGyxgwWEhnTAGtXZvu3XT8Wwy2BceKyKKrG8YNVL0h04vmz5h7KCklAZG5v9SxU1qQViqH-aq0f6_Rgj6Bt5WO_j9PBqJZh0O1QsN4wanc860xDTg03_wT3tk0IzN97VE-iARR29w3V9YmbEXrlSlwodjdKayb6l4hfjK3H9g%3D%3D)
You wouldn’t believe it from the photo above, but I went on to serve my nation in the Iraq War as a proud Marine, graduated from The Ohio State University, received my law degree from Yale Law School, and wrote a bestselling book.

That wasn’t enough. I wanted to do more. I wanted to do more for my state and my country.

That’s why when I moved back to Ohio and saw the state I love devastated by job loss, addiction, economic turmoil, and much more, I started a business in Cincinnati focused on growing companies that create well-paying jobs.

I’m not done yet though, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because Ohio and America need a true conservative who’s focused on standing up to Communist China, securing our Southern Border, and looking out for the people who’ve been left behind. Because I know what that feels like.

So, if you’re committed to putting America First again, if you’re committed to standing up to the Woke Left’s Socialist Agenda, and you’re focused on protecting your freedoms and conservative values, [**_please rush a donation below to support our campaign. We can’t do it without your help._**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=57d04d093a0046d1b4ffd93949ebee3f&_e=-sMugrxAhqgv6HHphcx4k5xEu3_sKJTauYJ9RY-6QgO1e9eKuXnTiMguKhwYNtcWCb80464NdieJlskhBYoWwIOm0nXWlDUqEVkJ0hprCZH6BP_X2G7IkBl4YawfuypW9I6RMuvBAr9xESS2J4-gpcUbLQ4ElHrCmv3dak7696MFrEbHNp1qCoDiINGabdpIv9aCafNebxLMcMYIAXJ_SoXWe8EreVHedvXklgaYZeNaBc2fx0TSh1DRKTspd3IvyVka8N5BSUX3WrHiTNRqloyPsqK5aU3jycsLhbI8YFpLFPVICieQLy0x7F_Jq-GrR5Bmb2cmGipAYhmlFT6C1TYkqzm0ql-CjAtLVdHRdNOYYeVusBgZb6NfKCH9iythjJpHX1HWhJFjIuHedok605fnCxMoCxG8_nT8hHFGcIVtchmMKJrLuYM5m9JEKtQcqVAxOX1iBBWg6GWAxhoZTSO4p8ff8W4kWpHxtvrxTzFdvVHmI46frRJ1vteD6kxGa_WK8wlNhLEErKJaZaRW4Q%3D%3D) [**RUSH $500**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=57d04d093a0046d1b4ffd93949ebee3f&_e=-sMugrxAhqgv6HHphcx4k5xEu3_sKJTauYJ9RY-6QgO1e9eKuXnTiMguKhwYNtcWCb80464NdieJlskhBYoWwIOm0nXWlDUqEVkJ0hprCZH6BP_X2G7IkBl4YawfuypW9I6RMuvBAr9xESS2J4-gpcUbLQ4ElHrCmv3dak7696MFrEbHNp1qCoDiINGabdpIv9aCafNebxLMcMYIAXJ_SoXWe8EreVHedvXklgaYZeNaBc2fx0TSh1DRKTspd3IvyVka8N5BSUX3WrHiTNRqloyPsqK5aU3jycsLhbI8YFroBSH6d4CrZI9GHigq6PtkBIj73WUJvOyYiDOfHv9nghEBUm0yYEC72L1qYiN37tFDw0U23kxhLOsfGSFvk_GbEBrCQ9yFU9gtm7m1Jlt_ByPondaRMnsRx2scng8QS0-hwzBX5FgTqi05KQOy4WC89pQBvbVbg_WhsxDETZNGJ6Ed6UaXtqxygiV6xODzCb7ukP76LA2MjJJ9a50938Ex7A4t5xzXcC4fPAA9bipx93pq-252Ie975wGdRXLUiPk%3D)

clean_body: | Friend, Before we get started and I go any further, I’d just like to take a moment to thank you for your time and previous support in advance. It’s what powers our campaign to fight for hardworking Americans across the country. Look, I know it gets old with our campaign texting, emailing, and calling you nonstop, but I’d be lying if I didn’t say that your support is the LIFEBLOOD OF OUR CAMPAIGN. | I hope you know that the main reason I’m running for the U.S. Senate seat in Ohio is because I care deeply about my state, my country, and the issues that we’re facing right now. I grew up in Middletown, Ohio. Middletown was once a booming manufacturing town where Ohioans could live a middle-class life. As I got older, I realized that the jobs and economic opportunities that were once present in my hometown were fading away and it left the community around me grasping for hope. Look, I won’t sugarcoat it, my home life wasn’t all peaches and cream. I had my fair share of turbulence at home as a kid, with my dad leaving home when I was young, and my mother struggling with drug addiction her entire life. I’m so lucky that I had someone who helped me turn everything around and keep me straight. That person was my Mamaw (my grandmother). My grandmother taught me tough love, discipline, and that the world wasn’t just going to hand you what you wanted. She kept me straight and focused through her dedication to faith, family, and the hope of a better life that lay ahead (or it could’ve been the 19 handguns she owned.) You wouldn’t believe it from the photo above, but I went on to serve my nation in the Iraq War as a proud Marine, graduated from The Ohio State University, received my law degree from Yale Law School, and wrote a bestselling book. That wasn’t enough. I wanted to do more. I wanted to do more for my state and my country. That’s why when I moved back to Ohio and saw the state I love devastated by job loss, addiction, economic turmoil, and much more, I started a business in Cincinnati focused on growing companies that create well-paying jobs. I’m not done yet though, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because Ohio and America need a true conservative who’s focused on standing up to Communist China, securing our Southern Border, and looking out for the people who’ve been left behind. Because I know what that feels like. So, if you’re committed to putting America First again, if you’re committed to standing up to the Woke Left’s Socialist Agenda, and you’re focused on protecting your freedoms and conservative values, Let’s ride. It’s time to get back to work. God Bless you and your family, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance for Senate Inc. JD Vance for Senate Inc., P.O. Box 6564 Cincinnati, OH 45206 Copyright © 2022 JD Vance for US Senate, All rights reserved.

Dear Peter,

After holding the line on several key votes over the past year, Senator Joe Manchin just blew up the dam holding back liberal priorities.

**Higher taxes.** More spending. **More inflation.** Green New Deal nonsense. Government price controls.

And this - _**87,000 new IRS agents.**_

clean_body: | | | | Higher taxes. More spending. More inflation... What's next? Dear Peter, After holding the line on several key votes over the past year, Senator Joe Manchin just blew up the dam holding back liberal priorities. Higher taxes. More spending. More inflation. Green New Deal nonsense. Government price controls. And this - 87,000 new IRS agents. This bill is a liberal's dream. And it's all because of Joe Manchin. He caved. Help us send a message to Senator Manchin that you oppose Build Back Better II and don't want Manchin to capitulate to the far-left. | | | | | | Thank you. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General 2018 GOP Nominee against Joe Manchin | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. Gas hit $5 per gallon. Moms can’t find baby formula. Grocery prices are skyrocketing. The border is in crisis. And what are Democrats in Congress doing about it? Nothing.

We must restore our Republican majority and save our country. subject: Mitch McConnell is freaking out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4927%2E3611125%2EYQ7IRM ][IMG]

Mitch McConnell is freaking out, folks.

Don’t believe us? Fine—just follow the money.

$1 million: That’s how much the National Republican Senatorial Committee
announced they’re helping JD Vance’s campaign spend on a new TV ad so
McConnell and his right-wing cronies can take back Senate control.

$3.8 million: That’s how much One Nation (a Mitch McConnell-aligned dark
money group) announced they’re spending to flood Ohio’s airwaves with
far-right attack ads against Tim because they KNOW this race will decide
Senate control.

We don’t need $5 MILLION (!!) in GOP dark money receipts to tell us what
we already know, folks:

Mitch McConnell MUST take down Tim and win Ohio if he wants any chance at
retaking the Senate majority in 2022.

subject: within the margin of error
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=4000%2E878179%2E2nQnUk)._
---

name: Beto for Texas
subject: What you should know about Beto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

As an
essential member of this team, here are 10 important things for you to
know about Beto:

1. Beto is a fourth-generation Texan, born and raised in El Paso where he
has served as a small business owner, a city council representative,
and a member of Congress who delivered for veterans from the
community.

2. Beto's traveling over 5,600 miles on our 49-Day Drive for Texas to
meet Texans where they are, listen to their concerns, and share his
positive, unifying vision for the state.

3. As Governor, Beto will fight for a woman's freedom to make her own
decisions about her own body, health care, and future — and that
includes fighting to repeal Greg Abbott's extreme abortion ban with no
exceptions for rape or incest.

4. Beto is committed to working with Democrats, Republicans, and
Independents to unite around commonsense solutions that make a real
difference in people’s lives.

5. Beto knows that being a good leader is all about listening because
people have thought through the solutions to the challenges before
them — they just need someone to take action and deliver for their
community.

6. During Abbott’s deadly grid failure in 2021, Beto organized thousands
of volunteers to make over a million phone calls to check in on Texas
seniors.

7. Beto can win — since launching our campaign, Beto has cut Abbott's
lead by 10 points, and he's not slowing down.

8. Beto doesn't accept a cent of corporate PAC money — because he’s
running to represent Texans, not corporations or special interests.

9. Thanks to more than half a million contributions in four months, Beto
recently set a new record for the most money raised in a single
reporting period by a state-level candidate in Texas history, but
Abbott still has more cash in the bank than us.

10. Greg Abbott and GOP super PACs will spend record amounts of money to
attack Beto before Election Day, so we're counting on this grassroots
team's support.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220807-2.CXHfhK&refcode=ema20220807-202056&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=202056%2E444211%2EJA2RsV ]Please, if you're
with Beto in this movement to elect a leader ready to defeat Abbott and
represent ALL Texans, will you chip in your
first
$3 donation today?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220807-2.CXHfhK&refcode=ema20220807-202056&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=202056%2E444211%2EJA2RsV ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Team Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=202056%2E444211%2EJA2RsV

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

clean_body: She’s the one I chose to FLIP Wisconsin. | Friend, If we can flip the pivotal battleground state of Wisconsin this year, we could change the political landscape for years to come. But that all starts by FIRING radical liberal Tony Evers and electing a strong, proven fighter and experienced leader to take back the Badger State. That’s why with just days to go in Wisconsin’s GOP primary, I’m asking every grassroots conservative across the country to help me ensure the candidate I trust to defeat Evers – Rebecca Kleefisch – wins the nomination. I endorsed Rebecca because she’s a fighter the likes of which I’ve never seen... She’s fought as a reporter exposing corruption, as a mother battling cancer, and as lieutenant governor fighting the “woke” mob with Governor Scott Walker. Simply put, we need a fighter like Rebecca if we’re going to send Tony Evers packing this November. Make no mistake, defeating Evers is not going to be some walk in the park now that he’s amassed a war chest of more than $20 MILLION. But Rebecca is the only one polling within the margin of error of beating him. That’s why I’m turning to grassroots patriots like YOU at this critical hour to make sure she’s victorious come August 9. Evers will be watching closely on the night of August 9. And it’s clear he’d give anything to avoid a general election where he has to go toe-to-toe with Rebecca. But with YOUR help, we can give him the exact matchup he so deeply fears. Thank you, Ted Cruz Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: If Sen. Grassley (R-IA) wants to spend less time in DC, and more time with his family, that’s perfect! Admiral Mike Franken would be a great Senator for Iowa, and he’ll be glad to represent voters in the Senate.
body:
Join Chuck Grassley’s volunteer retirement committee!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, did you see this? **Republican Senators, who work about half the year, are complaining because they have to go to work.** **Senator Chuck Grassley of Iowa, who is running for his EIGHTH TERM, and would be 95 years old when it ends** if elected, tweeted out his anger at the fact he has to be in Washington for a job he just can't seem to quit, voting on truly groundbreaking legislation. This is what he tweeted this last Friday: “ _Each Dec Schumer puts out schedule for Senate I set Grassley family reunion based on schedule. For 2nd yr in row I won’t be at reunion I’m in DC to fight Dems irresponsible tax &spend bill. Need a Republican majority hv schedule we can count on & a RESPONSIBLE FISCAL AGENDA_” Are you kidding me? Can you imagine if any of us whined about a job where we work 171 days of the year--including every Friday off--the way Grassley does here? We'd be fired, of course. If poor Chuck, who first got to the Senate in 1980, when the Rubik's Cube came out, John Lennon was shot and The Empire Strikes Back was released, hates this job so much, why is he running for another six-year term, just like the past seven times? [**We need Admiral Mike Franken in Washington. Can you give $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to help send him to Washington and Chuck Grassley back to Iowa where he'll be far from electoral college certification and can attend all the family reunions he'd like?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc61872cb-0836-41f0-8a1a-c69d987363d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Worse yet the bill Grassley is complaining about--the Inflation Reduction Act--includes the biggest step ever taken by the U.S. to fight climate change, allow Medicare to finally bulk negotiate for prescriptions, saving many seniors thousands of dollars every year, place a minimum tax on big corporations so they can't get away with paying little to nothing and will crack down on wealthy tax cheats. Grassley, who voted for Trump's ludicrous budget-busting tax cut, is set to vote against this while talking about a "responsible fiscal agenda." Grassley, of course, was also suspiciously close to Trump's coup, tweeting out on January 6th that he'd be certifying the electoral votes, something historically done by Vice Presidents. Why didn't Grassley expect Mike Pence to be there? What did he know that we didn't? I sure hope the Jan 6th Committee gets to the bottom of it.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: MIKE FRANKEN FOR IOWA!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc27b9a1-cefb-4e5f-a27c-7101d86136c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| We can send this seditionist who refused to impeach Trump like seven of his Republican colleagues and every Democrat, to all the reunions he wants to go to in the future and get him the hell out of Washington where he's dangerous and apparently doesn't like being. We can support Grassley's Democratic opponent, Admiral Mike Franken. Yes, we have a retired three-star admiral who spent 36 years in the Navy running for the U.S. Senate. Someone who spent his life serving the United States, not debasing himself in service of Donald Trump's authoritarianism. Admiral Franken wouldn't be complaining about doing his job, he'd be doing it. He wouldn't be whining about a bill that does so much to help seniors, working people and our climate, he'd be proudly voting for it. And he wouldn't be seemingly aiding and abetting a coup, and then voting to let the perpetrator off afterwards. [**We need Admiral Mike Franken in Washington. Can you give $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to help send him to Washington and Chuck Grassley back to Iowa where he'll be far from electoral college certification and can attend all the family reunions he'd like?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9777b397-514a-4248-bafe-a0c886bde1c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks as always my friends. For engaging in this fight and every other one like it. Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: SUPPORT MIKE FRANKEN FOR US SENATE!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te198e61e-f615-4156-8e72-4a9c6a67dddf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
