name: AlessandraBiaggi.com
subject: Over $100,000 in outside dark money spending
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
With only 16 days left in this primary, the corporate and political establishment are pulling out all the stops.
#

Here comes the kitchen sink, team.
Over the last 48 hours, outside spending groups and dark money super PACs have launched over **_$100,000_** in direct mail advertising and texting campaigns attacking Alessandra.
You can be sure this is just the start — with only 16 days left in this primary, the corporate and political establishment are pulling out all the stops.
Our opponents are ready. So we've got to be ready too. And with your support today, we will be.
[**Can you rush a $3 contribution to stand with our campaign today? We can't let these attacks on Alessandra go unanswered, and it's going to take a lot of resources to fight back against six figures in outside dark money.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?refcode=em220807-1-t1&refcode2=994_59515_sDC93K&akid=994%2E59515%2EsDC93K)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220807-1-t1&refcode2=994.59515.sDC93K&akid=994%2E59515%2EsDC93K)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220807-1-t1&refcode2=994.59515.sDC93K&akid=994%2E59515%2EsDC93K)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220807-1-t1&refcode2=994.59515.sDC93K&akid=994%2E59515%2EsDC93K)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220807-1-t1&refcode2=994.59515.sDC93K&akid=994%2E59515%2EsDC93K)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220807-1-t1&refcode2=994.59515.sDC93K&akid=994%2E59515%2EsDC93K)**
---
****
| **[Or another amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&refcode=em220807-1-t1&refcode2=994.59515.sDC93K&akid=994%2E59515%2EsDC93K)**
---
****
The truth is that these groups have poured so much cash into this race so late in the game for one reason: _they know what we know._
They know that our campaign's vision for bold progressive change can win, and so long as our movement stands together here in the final two weeks, it will.
That's why your donation to fight back against these attacks is so important today. Thank you for adding one if you can.
\- Team Biaggi

name: State Dems HQ
subject: Will you own a piece of this fight?
body:
Trump is using these rallies to fire up his base – we have to do everything we can to ensure they don’t gain momentum: | | |
---
| | **FIRST ➟** The ultra-conservative Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , leaving abortion rights in the hands of state legislatures. **THEN ➟** Republican state legislatures rushed to pass dangerous abortion bans and restrictions across the country. **SO NOW ➟** Vice President Kamala Harris is meeting with state legislators and abortion rights activists across the country, building grassroots support for state Democrats ahead of the midterm elections. clean_body: Trump is using these rallies to fire up his base – we have to do everything we can to ensure they don’t gain momentum: | | | | | FIRST ➟ The ultra-conservative Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , leaving abortion rights in the hands of state legislatures. THEN ➟ Republican state legislatures rushed to pass dangerous abortion bans and restrictions across the country. SO NOW ➟ Vice President Kamala Harris is meeting with state legislators and abortion rights activists across the country, building grassroots support for state Democrats ahead of the midterm elections. With less than 100 days until the midterm elections, we’re thrilled that Vice President Harris is using her platform to help support state Democrats! By electing pro-choice state Democrats this November, we can fight back against the Supreme Court’s dangerous decision and secure abortion protections in the states. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Electing Democrats to state legislatures this fall is vital to protecting our most fundamental rights and freedoms against a hostile SCOTUS and congressional gridlock. My Dear Friend,

Going against the deep pockets of the East Coast Democrats is going to be a **battle**. They realize they are _losing support and are terrified_ of the momentum we are building.

[**This fear results in them spending giant amounts to take me down, which is why we must fight back and hit our fundraising goals.**](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=8fb98da4f1ab429b9531f5df5e2b00a9&_e=fKOFcDHlvJf8T1X2CH7u6VCilsPtaGlsgYIyqk012icXhdbNe_hZk9WIi3SFAqFLzaOULPnOfidhEOb430UCoBj2jk_MNpDt-lBYcsHbg93C7-CrsDGn34UDI_ZatjtYrBqZZKggnAkYHaWFXQVWB35JeCn_7apX_CxhaL_z-M9G-dzXThEzYQgn1p7zxUBYMdJ-ji8L9ZvIDKTuUfBW-QuPK_-jAkPmyAnl1XW4lyOIi_vg108FpA8o72qGWKh4ZM2Jj-qiGPQHyeorUhwPsrNEjtyDCto_th0uHobVLUGqEtK3l1lRHT551EnNlVjLmxlSzpwJLBqM5uks5sI_Ap2J1LGIljazIsdaGX7LomivCe2J9ctIP9UgAAx_Wbyw3blKKNMiYNHQ9VF8fGvZhrsAhqvcvbZWvN5CleRBLzjTDdPrnGOoipbhCStCmLELy5mJ6u9gtW_2Foc_evHPyrkd6N74_fKMCc5m5sd8Ka0QMcFYYqzSdUrsF32N628Xt0sy8pQ3wU6Jhx_Km9Eagw%3D%3D)

_Every. Single. Dollar. Counts._

We will send a resounding message to the Radical Left and raise that **$4,000 by midnight tonight.** But this can only happen with the support of fellow patriots like **you.**
[**RUSH $10 BEFORE MIDNIGHT**](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=8fb98da4f1ab429b9531f5df5e2b00a9&_e=fKOFcDHlvJf8T1X2CH7u6VCilsPtaGlsgYIyqk012icXhdbNe_hZk9WIi3SFAqFLzaOULPnOfidhEOb430UCoBj2jk_MNpDt-lBYcsHbg93C7-CrsDGn34UDI_ZatjtYrBqZZKggnAkYHaWFXQVWB35JeCn_7apX_CxhaL_z-M9G-dzXThEzYQgn1p7zxUBYMdJ-ji8L9ZvIDKTuUfBW-QuPK_-jAkPmyAnl1XW4lyOIi_vg108FpA8o72qGWKh4ZM2Jj-qiGPQHyeorUhwPsrNEjtyDCto_th0uHobVLUHXTm0fod18kq1qayRsAGTtcWNKEYrRSvSyRVRQHBMk_9FGAzps8jjt5vDP-ZjOjZu1DS_UUFNdwZ9GmdQDsj7BzfVCUOle75_SVIhpdvlN_bsy8CCYlbXJ7WbcGiMt8zkR9ZMNRSBCrwi1Fvi4IgiFoZqoPFcK_JNtQTvnGQWCLGDmVhr6Hda035ivayVhDuoTopzOrkomjFXrcN2hQdLXPZyf6KAM0jCwUPxBtBGTKu1dwTVhrRGCsZ7JJDvq9O8%3D)

[**Will you please help?**](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=8fb98da4f1ab429b9531f5df5e2b00a9&_e=fKOFcDHlvJf8T1X2CH7u6VCilsPtaGlsgYIyqk012icXhdbNe_hZk9WIi3SFAqFLzaOULPnOfidhEOb430UCoBj2jk_MNpDt-lBYcsHbg93C7-CrsDGn34UDI_ZatjtYrBqZZKggnAkYHaWFXQVWB35JeCn_7apX_CxhaL_z-M9G-dzXThEzYQgn1p7zxUBYMdJ-ji8L9ZvIDKTuUfBW-QuPK_-jAkPmyAnl1XW4lyOIi_vg108FpA8o72qGWKh4ZM2Jj-qiGPQHyeorUhwPsrNEjtyDCto_th0uHobVLUGqEtK3l1lRHT551EnNlVjLL1bxx66OKHM6588Xr6BVPVAgWP7heYCW7frCFhrzNpNzoT7oFnTcbeMwhnuRX2AK8B42y0Ddmj9W9NWuf_HCS7t61Bwx9wslPWgPiuB3app5iDGgG0pKLIWOl7mW9hYYDFZ_3KPmyLq-NiNIaMsU5um_jQoqZawZLEUmS3ue5Mcz7-CP-iwbSJS6KmsdxwGEk_a9zmY-x2ipnZIsJAWObw%3D%3D) **Even the smallest amount can be put to immediate use to help _Take Back the Senate majority and turn Pennsylvania_ RED.**

body:
Tthe Texas Observer published an interview about Michelle and our fight on the ground to elect the kind of leader TX-15 deserves | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03d2lWi8XD6LF6lPmMk7Os3mZKeGHEBI2BOA_-pgPF4vEcpTkQT69yqZAzr6WT73ZU7T4DbaDcq8h_0htvokWKHJg8PZCnpgw4l7PetSsXjCyYC_zudq4Fkb0ayc8udCG9lXQpG41gwEda2GKiNmbxakQmh2bsv9QHVsJU_Ayv3krMrimQm0dKW-9fNPEifa33B/3oe/j2EgD83vQxG9bOLuW7VvCQ/h0/0zTsGvjgLodG77O2RCZq-v_NsyidzB3E9ii3qjWjvGU)

Peter, the Texas Observer published an interview about Michelle and our fight on the ground to elect the kind of leader TX-15 deserves. [**Can we count on you to help power that fight? Make a donation right now to our campaign for the people.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wj0IZ8dCDR2RipYyjhotr5qpn_pDEXhS2XQKdgikwCRD35wgqWCm60X38kbZlQL1wx1HwOrrI7M7ETCqoCmBzGt491d4UtFKy8_y2ldRnSwU2gbofSybJr9arM1ZfWZQjq3l47ENyg9_Jvgt2UrZQO8kzI9MX83hR08UHgyqNRpbpObrypArMLlhML3I1FW5CbFxJDLVa-hogK4_CjwfQQ8R2ao_KOdZoPnHGWQvzMKIlyiK6KUEovt_0INnmx36wpEzTp2_AUBn2j9Eyo3HDOvx1zq_tfKz6zUo2BalD70wFL4ZxSVtqQH4BfqOv4Zki0dj_aSQ-uNauaeGb94hltTzRv5nHvN-7Em6TBETAoCWP1YdGbmS5AnhSzk-11rCg/3oe/j2EgD83vQxG9bOLuW7VvCQ/h1/TKC7VkOuF0V1TSao8laORBoZl0JJLdRLBk4V5Y_jy-Q) Michelle took the opportunity to talk about the issues her district is facing, how we can do things differently, and the way we are seeing our opponent and the right weaponize our border: _"When we have elected officials who come to the border to put on press conferences and then they put it on Fox News with images of people coming across the border or whatever kind of images they want to portray, yes, that is chaos: the fact that there are different narratives being spoken about when it comes to our home.**And an opponent and a candidate like Monica De La Cruz exacerbates that."**_ This is the difference between how we are campaigning vs. our opponent. Monica is using the border wall, and our region, as a way to scare people or be used as a photo op just for political gain, not for improving anything in our community. Instead of fear-mongering, Michelle wants to lead by working with everyone across the board so that we can find some common-sense solutions to issues our friends and family are facing here in South Texas. It’s time to elect a new kind of leader for TX-15, someone who is a part of this community has pride in their home and feels honor for where they live and how we live, instead of using it as a prop. **That leader is Michelle.** [**Can we count on you to make a donation right now to fund our fight to elect a leader whose only focus will be working for the district, not using it for her own political gain?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wj0IZ8dCDR2RipYyjhotr5qpn_pDEXhS2XQKdgikwCRD35wgqWCm60X38kbZlQL1zrJ0DLzFE8UJUysMG0Aj6NcITmva4KRWZ5WRxQUGBdIpEyk_QMHxbJ8OkxMdWx0p_xod6ZjFbNvcNakv4b1QqJIVwzvnpK3MM3GMvZ5xlPZOvBOyqqEaDcSbpotxcr70bOxlwJFqQcvpz1o6V6ToaVouE9EtN0BaLZUrm49rIWD8QkFhuIyeBKffEU-WSDlpWWo5YPd69FGdzhL9uKEYRiF-fKQ5PHbXc04xS-MMogSSyIFCMC632UmAfWJiTlLchx2YI0cH_S6NiY5SRlz5NO-EB3NzMIoEg0CV9d8TRXC2nPQvBIqrKsZRgm_XsXGKg/3oe/j2EgD83vQxG9bOLuW7VvCQ/h2/555KrtpWZ0l69So6ZimuZu3RBDJa91wCt2RhwCYcQJc) clean_body: Tthe Texas Observer published an interview about Michelle and our fight on the ground to elect the kind of leader TX-15 deserves | | | Peter, the Texas Observer published an interview about Michelle and our fight on the ground to elect the kind of leader TX-15 deserves. Michelle took the opportunity to talk about the issues her district is facing, how we can do things differently, and the way we are seeing our opponent and the right weaponize our border: "When we have elected officials who come to the border to put on press conferences and then they put it on Fox News with images of people coming across the border or whatever kind of images they want to portray, yes, that is chaos: the fact that there are different narratives being spoken about when it comes to our home.And an opponent and a candidate like Monica De La Cruz exacerbates that." This is the difference between how we are campaigning vs. our opponent. Monica is using the border wall, and our region, as a way to scare people or be used as a photo op just for political gain, not for improving anything in our community. Instead of fear-mongering, Michelle wants to lead by working with everyone across the board so that we can find some common-sense solutions to issues our friends and family are facing here in South Texas. It’s time to elect a new kind of leader for TX-15, someone who is a part of this community has pride in their home and feels honor for where they live and how we live, instead of using it as a prop. That leader is Michelle. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly to Michelle Vallejo: | And when asked why she believes we can win this, Michelle kept it simple: “ We have already proven [ourselves in] two upset races by showing up, doing the work, staying connected to our grassroots way of connecting with the community. ” Let’s keep proving ourselves, Team Vallejo | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573
